Control of the Senate majority will likely hinge on our Georgia election. | $9.8 million is an incredible sum of money to raise in three short months. If we're going to pull off a win in November, we MUST close the gap financially. Peter, Our opponent just announced his 4th quarter fundraising report, and it was significantly more than what we raised. In fact, it was the most raised by any senate candidate in the whole country! While there was little doubt that national Democrats and special interests would pour money into our opponent's bank account last quarter, it was an eye-popping amount. Over 90% of the money came from outside Georgia! We were outraised the last two quarters, but we still have time to close the fundraising gap. Our opponent is the top fundraiser in the entire U.S. Senate, so any gift you make will help us chip away at his financial advantage and grow our media fund. Control of the Senate majority will likely hinge on our Georgia race, which is a dead heat according to recent polling. I'm not a politician, and I've never run for office before. While I know money certainly isn't everything in campaigns, it's still important for candidates who are running in statewide races like we are. This race is a TOSS-UP. Because of the cash advantage our opponent holds over us, he will be able to start reaching out to voters sooner than we can via TV ads, radio ads, social media ads, direct mail and billboards. subject: Pelosi Congress Claims Sovereign Immunity in Federal Court to Keep Secret January 6 Videos and Emails
body:
Judicial Watch announced that it filed an opposition to the U.S. Capitol Police’s (USCP) effort to shut down Judicial Watch’s federal lawsuit for January 6 videos and emails. Through its police department, Congress argues that the videos and emails are not public records, there is no public interest in their release, and that “sovereign immunity” prevents citizens from suing for their release.

| | | Because no one is above the law! | February 02, 2022

# [Pelosi Congress Claims Sovereign Immunity in Federal Court to Keep Secret January 6 Videos and Emails](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57790&L=26729&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcGVsb3NpLWNvbmdyZXNzLWNsYWltcy1pbW11bml0eS1pbi1jb3VydC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)
Judicial Watch announced that it filed an opposition to the U.S. Capitol Police’s (USCP) effort to shut down Judicial Watch’s federal lawsuit for January 6 videos and emails. Through its police department, Congress argues that the videos and emails are not public records, there is no public interest in their release, and that “sovereign immunity” prevents citizens from suing for their release.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57790&L=26729&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcGVsb3NpLWNvbmdyZXNzLWNsYWltcy1pbW11bml0eS1pbi1jb3VydC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)

### [Transgender Offender Manual Orders Prisons to Offer Special Services, Bans “Mis-Gendering” ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57790&L=26731&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHJhbnNnZW5kZXItb2ZmZW5kZXItbWFudWFsLW9yZGVycy1wcmlzb25zLXRvLW9mZmVyLXNwZWNpYWwtc2VydmljZXMtYmFucy1taXMtZ2VuZGVyaW5nLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz) Judicial Watch The Biden administration has issued a Transgender Offender Manual directing federal prisons to give special accommodations and taxpayer-funded services to certain convicts serving sentences in jails throughout the nation. The Department of Justice (DOJ) issued the new guidelines a few weeks ago to ensure that the Bureau of Prisons (BOP) “properly identifies, tracks, and provides services to the transgender population.” The BOP houses some 155,554 inmates at 122 facilities around the U.S. and the agency estimates that approximately 1,300 are transgender. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced that it filed an opposition to the U.S. Capitol Police’s (USCP) effort to shut down Judicial Watch’s federal lawsuit for January 6 videos and emails. Through its police department, Congress argues that the videos and emails are not public records, there is no public interest in their release, and that “sovereign immunity” prevents citizens from suing for their release. | | | Because no one is above the law! | February 02, 2022 ---|---|--- | | == == Judicial Watch announced that it filed an opposition to the U.S. Capitol Police’s (USCP) effort to shut down Judicial Watch’s federal lawsuit for January 6 videos and emails. Through its police department, Congress argues that the videos and emails are not public records, there is no public interest in their release, and that “sovereign immunity” prevents citizens from suing for their release. == | | | The Daily Wire NBC News faced backlash over a report that it published this week that sought to paint those who want transparency in what their children are taught as “conservative activists” who pose a threat to free speech. Tom Fitton, Judicial Watch: “Agenda piece by @NBCNews helpfully reminds parents that leftists illegally abusing kids with racist CRT propaganda fear transparency.” CNS News The government watchdog group Judicial Watch has filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) for communications between then-CIA Director Gina Haspel and Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff General Mark Milley in 2020-21, which reportedly involved the targeting of President Donald Trump. Judicial Watch The Biden administration has issued a Transgender Offender Manual directing federal prisons to give special accommodations and taxpayer-funded services to certain convicts serving sentences in jails throughout the nation. The Department of Justice (DOJ) issued the new guidelines a few weeks ago to ensure that the Bureau of Prisons (BOP) “properly identifies, tracks, and provides services to the transgender population.” The BOP houses some 155,554 inmates at 122 facilities around the U.S. and the agency estimates that approximately 1,300 are transgender. = = | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2022, All Rights Reserved = |

Just under a year ago, I launched this campaign with no expectations of where it could go — all I knew is that I wanted to give this fight everything I’ve got because the people of our district deserve better in Washington. Today, I want to say THANK YOU. **The 2021 fundraising numbers were reported by the FEC (Federal Election Commission) and I am thrilled to say that together, we were the top-fundraising Democratic campaign in this race.** You made that possible. Whether you gave a little, gave a lot, or somewhere in between, this is because of you. Even if you haven’t given yet, becoming a part of our movement has made it stronger. By now, you probably know I don’t accept a dime from corporations and corporate PACs looking to make a profit from their influence. **That’s why your support means so much.** Every single dollar coming from a grassroots donor like you has gotten this far. To be honest, folks, I’m just blown away by it all. I’m a U.S. Navy veteran, a former Ironworker, and now a working actor. Like a lot of you, my path hasn’t always been conventional. I didn’t expect I’d ever get into politics. But I come from experiences where I formed a deep sense of solidarity and service. Knowing I could put that to use and fight for a better future for folks in the Central Valley is what pushed me to serve this country one more time — by running for Congress. No one can do this alone. As we look ahead to the next four months before our primary in June, I can’t wait to keep building this movement with all of you. [**The best way to get that started is by becoming a monthly donor — thank you to everyone who has already become one! Even if it’s just $1, that gets us $1 closer to victory. If you can, click here to set up a recurring contribution of any amount so we have the resources to go all the way to Bruno has been backed by VoteVets, an organization committed to helping veterans run for office. He is running to fight for universal healthcare, economic justice, and real investments in education, and so much more. He's not taking a dime from corporations or corporate PACs — because he's running to work for the people. Supreme Court Justice Stephen Breyer
is planning to retire from the Supreme Court

Friend, when I heard this I immediately started thinking that we as conservatives need to gear up for the fight of our lives. We have to stop Joe Biden from pushing through a Radical Left pawn who will continue the assault on our God-given rights to Life, religious liberty, and the Second Amendment. **For the sake of our children’s future. | [](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=1311a4bd4f2c40bb9bb9c6500b8184d4&_e=51rb5V5J-PpvzTXEUe-KkqlmjhEMIpesQEsTCW9_mmUmGEqWhaUPWKGlWBuoOxt1igPsxjUw20raABdvQIHcT7Inool0JCClJx3V1ogmggIws7ApYEbbAzOjWGlrTDis8X37SS9e1LTwn09OCfKzX0Y6Txzw6pGF5IfXYqHlrI_OMmw99hpNHhim6ChcXnApPgUmitOHT2K9yytCczuEKxB8iv2uL_dnRBirEvQLHeQZHLQWb9MYNzYWpfKjAJG_VyhY7QUAvNCbqZo1kEHPeRMBWW2IJC6-HmxSS3-5OiGHt7esVBxkPcxlAPuaBQVFpNe8wzzZVWYefK7ru5nGRF8YdmyY8YqpnNDSJ8NLcNIGnocwntaKc3D0aTQ8h1U8MFkCKAIEs49y8EoMHfsXdGQssSzKVREguiEP2hx95wkYZBKhv-1rCrWyYl6KX1Mftzfd595nTn7nmgeQ1I6k6EA5qtiUhehEYCY47Zh6HoJB341WX204mwAEpanX0P2UL9MBjuImFWsHnKsg_aFM6QVrDjEd_sVQ8xuQ0vAf0Iz2L2aPbr-x8F49IQ8dt6_C)
---
The games have to stop.

The Left is using **COVID** and the **CDC** as a distraction for all their failed policies, from Southern Border security to inflation. It’s time for the President to step up and start looking at the facts.

_**FACT:**_ **Vaccines don’t completely prevent infection or transmission of COVID-19, especially the Omicron variant.**

**_FICTION:_** **The Left’s mask and vaccine mandates are the answer to solving the pandemic and getting our country back on track.**

Dear Friend,

I hope your 2022 is off to a great start!

January was an incredible month for our campaign. We met with Marylanders across the state and posted an historic fundraising haul that reiterates our strong standing in the race for governor.

Thanks to your effort and support, we surpassed our goal and raised more than $1.5 million, the most ever for a non-incumbent Republican candidate for governor in state history. And with 95% of our campaign contributors from Maryland, we truly are building a statewide grassroots movement.
---
---
Last month I made the difficult decision to leave my position as Secretary of Commerce in Governor Hogan’s administration, in order to give my full focus to the campaign. It was an incredible honor to serve the State of Maryland over the last seven years, and working daily to improve the lives of Marylanders was an honor of a lifetime.

We accomplished a lot together, from leading nationally recognized job training and apprenticeship programs to making Maryland the most improved state for business in the entire nation. And we stood firm in opposing tax cuts, and FIGHTING for tax relief to make Maryland more affordable for our families, small businesses, and retirees.

I am forever thankful to Governor Hogan for entrusting me with such great responsibilities. And as your next governor, I look forward to building upon the successes of his administration.

Even amongst the fundraising deadline and leaving my cabinet post, we continued to travel around the state as I work to earn the trust and support of your friends and neighbors

I had the pleasure of meeting with Republican volunteers in Howard County, who are excited to get to work in helping elect candidates up and down the ballot, and spent time on the Eastern Shore, in Frederick, and in Carroll County talking with Marylanders and thanking members of law enforcement. We closed out the month by attending the Isaac H. Taylor Jewish Music Festival in Pikesville, where we had a lot of fun.
---
---
Once again, thank you for your continued support of our campaign. I’m excited to be in this race, and I can’t wait to see you at an upcoming event!

There’s still a lot of work to be done and I am grateful to have you as a friend and supporter. By working together, we can and will make history this year.

Sincerely,
---

clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend, I hope your 2022 is off to a great start! January was an incredible month for our campaign. We met with Marylanders across the state and posted an historic fundraising haul that reiterates our strong standing in the race for governor. Thanks to your effort and support, we surpassed our goal and raised more than $1.5 million, the most ever for a non-incumbent Republican candidate for governor in state history. And with 95% of our campaign contributors from Maryland, we truly are building a statewide grassroots movement. Last month I made the difficult decision to leave my position as Secretary of Commerce in Governor Hogan’s administration, in order to give my full focus to the campaign. It was an incredible honor to serve the State of Maryland over the last seven years, and working daily to improve the lives of Marylanders was an honor of a lifetime. We accomplished a lot together, from leading nationally recognized job training and apprenticeship programs to making Maryland the most improved state for business in the entire nation. And we stood firm in opposing tax cuts, and FIGHTING for tax relief to make Maryland more affordable for our families, small businesses, and retirees. I am forever thankful to Governor Hogan for entrusting me with such great responsibilities. And as your next governor, I look forward to building upon the successes of his administration. Even amongst the fundraising deadline and leaving my cabinet post, we continued to travel around the state as I work to earn the trust and support of your friends and neighbors I had the pleasure of meeting with Republican volunteers in Howard County, who are excited to get to work in helping elect candidates up and down the ballot, and spent time on the Eastern Shore, in Frederick, and in Carroll County talking with Marylanders and thanking members of law enforcement. We closed out the month by attending the Isaac H. Taylor Jewish Music Festival in Pikesville, where we had a lot of fun. Once again, thank you for your continued support of our campaign. I’m excited to be in this race, and I can’t wait to see you at an upcoming event! There’s still a lot of work to be done and I am grateful to have you as a friend and supporter. By working together, we can and will make history this year. Sincerely, | | Follow Us! | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Kelly Schulz P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. Treasurer: Sam Malhotra

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Can't Believe What Happened Last Night
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=can_t_believe_what_happened&n=1)
---
## What Happened Last Night
### Wednesday - February 2nd, 2022
Friend, What happened last night was amazing. My team has been delivering reports to me from all across the state. **Thousands upon thousands** of Action 4 Liberty supporters showed up to their precinct caucuses. So many of you became delegates last night and passed the Never Again Resolution and Stop Vaccine Mandates Resolution in your area. **Thank you so much for doing that.** As you remember, we are doing this to make our demands for liberty well known to these politicians. We WILL NOT stand for their inaction any longer! In doing so, we want to be able to deliver you a report of who is with us on the Never Again bill and stopping vaccine mandates and who is opposed to it. **Would you please do me a quick favor? Take 60 seconds and click on the link below to let us know if you became a delegate and passed your resolutions.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/caucus_results?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=can_t_believe_what_happened&n=2 "Let Us Know") [Let Us Know](https://www.action4liberty.com/caucus_results?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=can_t_believe_what_happened&n=2)
---
Patriots from all across the state made their voice heard. The Political Class is shaking in their boots right now because so many of us showed up.
Thank you. Thank you. Thank you!
**Jake Duesenberg**
**Action 4 Liberty**
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=can_t_believe_what_happened&n=3 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=can_t_believe_what_happened&n=3)

name: Christian Nascimento
subject: UPDATED: Our Support is Surging
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Friends of Christian Nascimento
body:
_Peter, it’s no secret._ **The Congressional Majority**** _WILL_****be decided here in Pennsylvania** – _and whether Nancy Pelosi’s career is ended, comes down to our race in Pennsylvania's 4th Congressional district._ In case you don’t know me.**_I’m Christian Nascimento, a businessman and proud son of immigrants running for Congress to restore Pennsylvania’s hometown-grown conservative values to Washington D.C._** –a place absent of those values for far too long.
**_Nancy Pelosi and Madeleine Dean_** _have for too long supported the policies putting our families out of work–keeping our kids out of school–and making even groceries unaffordable_ –**I think it’s about time to say ‘**** _ENOUGH_****.’**[](https://a.crowdskout.com/v1-1/email-click/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9mcmllbmRzLW9mLWNocmlzdGlhbi1uYXNjaW1lbnRvL21tX3BldGl0aW9uX2hmX2VuZG9yc2VtZW50XzAyMDEyMg?b=eyJjc0lkIjo5OTI3OTc0MDcsImNsaWVudElkIjozNDA2LCJvcmdhbml6YXRpb25JZCI6IjIxODU1NTMiLCJzb3VyY2VJZCI6IjI5NDQyIiwiZW1haWxpbmdJZCI6bnVsbCwidjJFbWFpbGluZ0lkIjoxMjE0NCwiZnJvbSI6ImY4OTdkMWYxLTRiNTEtNDg0Yy1iYmMyLTdjZTllNWM4YmExZCJ9) **Pennsylvania deserves better– _I’m proud to be the ONLY Republican stepping up to fight back._** **_I’m proud to be joined by NUMEROUS community leaders who agree and have endorsed our historic campaign._** Community leaders like...
* **State Senator, Bob Mensch**
* **Upper Frederick Supervisor, Sean Frisco**
* **Skippack Township Supervisor, Nick Fountain**
* **Ret. Deputy Executive Director of the CIA, Marin Petersen**
* **Boyertown School Board Member, Jeffrey Zawada**
* **Methacton School Board Member, Marissa Rocco**
* **Methacton School Board Member, Greg Young**
* **Perkiomen Valley School Board Member, Jason Saylor**
* **Perkiomen Valley School Board Member, Rowan Keenan**
* **Perkiomen Valley School Board Member, Matthew Dorr**
* **Upper Dublin Commissioner, Liz Ferry**
* **Abington Township Commissioner, Dennis Zappone**
* **Former Lower Frederick Supervisor, Chuck Liedike**

Thank you for all you do. For Pennsylvania,

subject: Bill McSwain Wins Strong Second Place In SEPA GOP Straw Poll
body:
McSwain clinched a second place win in tonight's Southeast GOP Caucus straw poll | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/bill-mcswain-wins-strong-second-place-in-sepa-gop-straw-poll?e=b1ec95759b)
---
| |
---
| **PRESS RELEASE
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**February 2, 2022
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
| |
# Bill McSwain Wins Strong Second Place in PA GOP Southeast Straw Poll
**West Chester, Pa.** **\-- **Bill McSwain, Republican candidate for Governor, distinguished himself among a field of 11 represented gubernatorial candidates, clinching second place in today's Southeast GOP Caucus Straw Poll. McSwain, a Chester County native, received strong support across the Southeast counties, surpassing longtime Congressman and 2018 U.S. Senate nominee Lou Barletta, as well opponents Doug Mastriano and Jake Corman.

McSwain addressed a crowded room of State Committee members ahead of the vote, taking questions from attendees and sharing his vision for a stronger, safer, more secure Pennsylvania:
---
|
> _**"I am a limited government, free market, law and order, constitutional conservative. As Governor, I will restore freedom and the rule of law. I will ensure that every child has a quality education by implementing statewide school choice. I'll revive our economy by cutting taxes, reducing regulations, and shrinking the size of government. I'll protect life, defend the Second Amendment, and restore election integrity by repealing Act 77 and instituting voter ID, and will always defend the liberties of hardworking Pennsylvanians." **_
---
|
---
| McSwain explained that his tough on crime stance and background as a prosecutor, US Marine, and US Attorney appointed by President Trump make him the only candidate who can beat Josh Shapiro:
---
|
> **_"To win in November, we need a candidate with a killer instinct, who will work himself to the bone for you, and that is who I am.
>
> I have the background and skills to defend Pennsylvanians from the woke agenda, and I am the only candidate who can beat Josh Shapiro. I am the only Republican candidate with law enforcement experience, and I am the conservative outsider who can expose Shapiro's record as a self-serving career politician. We are only one election away from taking back our state - and we will win, together." _**
---
| The final straw poll results are as follows:

Dave White - 30
Bill McSwain - 20
Jake Corman - 12
Charlie Gerow - 7
Guy Ciarrochi - 5
Lou Barletta - 4
Nche Zama - 1
Melissa Hart -0
Scott Martin - 0
Doug Mastriano - 0
Jason Richey - 0
---
|
---
|
---
| **BACKGROUND: **
Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as US Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available [here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=e7707f4c46&e=b1ec95759b)
###

body:

### [Is Hillary Running for President Again?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trulultd-kujkulhluu-j/)
Joe Biden's been a disaster. Kamala Harris is a disaster. So who's going to be the Democrat nominee for President in 2024. Hillary again? Read about it in this week's blog. And how about those Bengals!!! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trulultd-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trulultd-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [10 Things Republicans are FOR](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trulultd-kujkulhluu-d/)
In a speech recently, Joe Biden dared Republicans to give him one thing they were FOR. In this week's blog, I give him 10. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trulultd-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trulultd-kujkulhluu-k/)

Joe Biden gave a speech last week essentially alleging that Republicans are a bunch of racists. You can read my thoughts in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trulultd-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trulultd-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Democrats Want to Make it Easy to Cheat](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trulultd-kujkulhluu-n/)
Democrats currently control the House, the Senate, and the Presidency. They'd like to keep their stranglehold on power by passing "election reform" which would unfairly advantage them in future elections. Are they going to be able to do it? You can read about it in this week's blog. body:
| | | |
---
| | | Dear Friends,

We have a big day planned for Saturday!

That’s because, on Saturday, February 5th at 9 am, we’ll be hosting the grand opening of the Kevin Mullin for Congress Headquarters in Redwood City and we’d love to see you there!

Please come check out the space and chat with me about why I’m running for Congress. Then, join us for our canvass launch where we’ll be walking door-to-door to spread the word to voters about our plans to deliver results for San Mateo County families.

Interested? [Email Brian Rogers, our Kevin Mullin for Congress campaign manager, for more details about this weekend’s event and to let us know if you’ll be able to join!](mailto:brian@kevinmullinforcongress.com)

I can’t wait to see you all there. _**— Kevin**_
---

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I’m in trouble.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
It’s worse than I thought. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6788%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=raGuRlLJ2jNQnVUZyQbB%2bQ&sysid=1)
It’s worse than I thought.

| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69899%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9QdBuwN%2bDQ2LoGCTZ6ghKw&sysid=1)
---

Friend,

It’s not the easiest thing to admit, but I’m getting beat like a rented mule in fundraising by my new Radical Opponent. It’s not a good sign for me, you, or any other conservative in Louisiana as we start 2022\.

I’ll be blunt: If I don’t catch up to him and catch up quick, he’s going to blow me out of the water come November and threaten to turn Louisiana and the U.S. Senate into a Socialist safe haven. I won’t have it, and I hope you won’t either, but I’m coming to you in all sincerity when I say I can’t do this by myself.

I’ve got to have your help if I’m going to have a chance. I’ve got to have your help if we’re going to save America. It’s not up for debate. Your support is the answer. Your support is the only thing standing in the way of Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate wiping the floor with me this coming November. I’m humbly asking for your help. **Without it, they’ll keep burying me with their unlimited dollars.

I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP.

WITHOUT IT I CAN’T STOP THE LEFT. **
| | [RUSH AN EMERGENCY $500 DONATION](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69890%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oEdaRb%2f62BxcL%2fGuf7s7SA&sysid=1)
---
| [RUSH AN EMERGENCY $250 DONATION](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69891%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Aff%2bq%2fTxji5Yp1RVnn%2b7yQ&sysid=1)
---
| [RUSH AN EMERGENCY $100 DONATION](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69892%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GFwexZazbgzfj4hxmK0gXA&sysid=1)
---
| [RUSH AN EMERGENCY $50 DONATION](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69893%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Lo3eNCxNKZgNRLgDl5E8pQ&sysid=1)
---
| [RUSH AN EMERGENCY $25 DONATION](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69894%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Jw19rKpQvTW3ZC0hnI2oSA&sysid=1)
---

Thank you for your help. Thank you for your encouragement. Thank you for having my back.

God Bless you and your generosity,

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69899%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9QdBuwN%2bDQ2LoGCTZ6ghKw&sysid=1)

name: Hillsdale College via CIntel
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs3R1B7HkN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os3R1B7HkN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Good day,
fellow American.

You are
an informed citizen-I believe that wholeheartedly.

You love
this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S.
Constitution says and what it means, and you aren't afraid to
stand up for America's founding and the principles of liberty
that define our nation.

Your
leadership and knowledge are needed today…

We need
more citizens like you-informed citizens-because America is at a
turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold
thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the
Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism.

The
country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore
knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We
can't let that happen!

That's
why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of
Hillsdale College and our new, nationwide initiative-the CAMPAIGN
FOR INFORMED CITIZENS.

We are
the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and
teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal
of this new campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable
Americans who understand

WHAT
the Constitution says;
HOW
it relates to current issues and events; and
WHY
the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to
liberty.

If this
campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the
Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people,
that our education system failed.

These are
young people that "educators" deliberately deceived or who just
haven't learned about a proper understanding of American history
in school.

You are
essential to the success of this effort to make America more
knowledgeable.

That's
because we're seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach
the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to
10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative
starts with you-YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights.

And we
must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer
support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student
grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you
who want what's best for the country.

So
please, share your opinions by completing the National Survey on
the State of American Education today at the link below. Thank
you for reading my email!

https://lp.hillsdale.edu/survey-informed-citizen/

For our
children,

Bill Gray
Class of
2001
Associate
Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Firearm Man
subject: New military spy tech available to public
body:
If you like firearms, then you're in the right place. Remember you can unsubscribe

[http://https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/one_click_unsubscribe/294/56327/c34e714a778d5083f26439d9837500726ce40403]

here at any time.

[https://www.firearmman.com/]

February 3rd, 2022

[https://www.firearmman.com/]

This is horrible news,

It’s regarding your credit card purchase records.

They’ve been exposed.

As of February 3rd, 2022, over 13 government agencies have full access to your entire credit card purchase history.

Here’s why this is very bad for you,

Even if you think you have nothing to hide...

All it takes is for them to find ANY purchases they deem as “suspicious”... and they could easily:

Investigate you for “extremist activity”

Freeze your assets

Even throw you in jail!

So if you’ve purchased any guns, ammo, survival supplies, or anything like that in the past 10 years...

You need to know 3 simple steps to become invisible to this disgusting surveillance of your finances.

You can see exactly what they are in the new and FREE book “Avoiding the Eye” by Richard Marshall.

[http://c4network.go2cloud.org/aff_c?offer_id=275&aff_id=1072&aff_sub=ILMG_1634]

But your Free copy of this shocking book doesn’t just help you protect your purchase records...

Inside, you’ll also discover:

Which part of your car talks to Big Brother... and how to shut it up.

How common appliances spy on you

[http://c4network.go2cloud.org/aff_c?offer_id=275&aff_id=1072&aff_sub=ILMG_1634]

- and how to blindfold them for good.

Even though they can listen to your phone... you can do this simple thing to block them.

And more!

name: Brian Burley
subject: Porter is the Next Pelosi. Help Me Stop Her!
body:
My name is Brian Burley, and I am the America-First candidate running to defend a conservative California seat currently being v
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8sc2b0rtrjn7efvb8h4vej0qvbq5cs4rp3vb73g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrratj26moj8cbgskon3d9ke8pnat3gmup78s5mmtg71odlcjjbaoj7capr6olgcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6dj3cppl6jjr4sr666ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5j61o74sdj6aoh5u)
| | | |

---
---

Friends,
**My name is Brian Burley, and I am the America-First candidate running to defend a conservative California seat currently being vacated by an outgoing Republican. I need YOUR help to keep it from the clutches of the radical Left!**
This district is red-leaning and this district even voted to recall tyrannical Governor Newsom.
A Republican held this seat in 2020 and it’s currently open—** _which means the Marxist left is throwing everything they have to steal this seat from us!_**
I am the Pro-Trump, Constitutional Conservative that will defend this seat. I am also running to be our Youngest America-First Congressman as well as our first Filipino Republican Representative.
**_My opponent is Socialist Katie Porter and she is the second coming of Nancy Pelosi_**. Porter is a far-left extremist and the top Progressive leader in Washington DC. Even AOC answers to radical Democrat Katie Porter.
I’m leading the grassroots-fueled campaign to keep this seat in Republican hands—**and I** **need your help to fund it.**
[**This district is a must-win to regain control of the House. Will you help me fight back by donating $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or more?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zisoj5ev5vrqqnhqs0859fh66h86h4d42ndui800_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3ge9or6clh2bs)

---
| [< < <DONATE NOW! > > >](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z99pltup84m5m18m9r3uki2j1oe1piatomqc2h18_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3ge9or6clh2bs)
---
2022 is going to be a great year for Conservatives and I know voters in my district are happy to chant _‘Let’s Go Brian’_ Burley!
_The way Biden and his gang of crazy Socialists is going, even Dems will soon be begging for Trump’s return!_
According to recent polls, 1 in 5 Biden voters regrets their decision.
Biden’s approval ratings are circling the drain. And is it any wonder?
Look at what he’s done to this country.
He began his fraudulent term with 19 executive orders on the first day- something he himself said during the campaign is the “sign of a dictator”.
It just gets worse and worse from there...
We’ve lost control of our border as millions of criminal illegal aliens invade our country.
We’ve lost millions of jobs as our economy crumbles.
Inflation is out of control.
Americans are suffering as Biden has completely shattered our nation at every single turn.
If we do not elect Congressional Leaders that can put a check and balance on Biden, we are truly sunk.
---
| [< < < CONTRIBUTE HERE! > > >](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlqg7p6jnhibgrcpe1g8d5f6rno06nquqn7t00kg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3ge9or6clh2bs)
---
_Porter is far to the left of this Reagan Republican District!_ _Porter moved into this seat after redistricting as the radical left wants her to spread their radical agenda to conservative cities like my home of Huntington Beach._
I don’t say this lightly - Katie Porter is the most dangerous and extreme member of Congress. Porter’s best friends in Congress are Pelosi, AOC and Maxime Waters and her voting record shows it.
Porter voted twice to impeach the President, voted for Pelosi for Speaker at every opportunity, she has voted to expand ballot harvesting and other voter fraud methods, she has voted to raise taxes, and she has voted to take away our gun rights.
_Worst of all -__ she has done nothing during her time in Congress besides divide our country during a pandemic._
_I will bring us together_. I will stop Porter from squatting in this solidly conservative seat. We will win this seat and once I am in Congress, I will defend President Trump’s America First Vision!

_We do not need another McCarthy-backscratcher in Congress!_ We need someone to take down the establishment, not side with them.
I am currently the youngest Republican elected official in California as I serve on the Orange County Central Committee. In this position, I have taken on the Swampy establishment as I have fought tirelessly to rebuild the Orange County Republican Party into a group that fights like President Trump does.
I’m also a successful small business owner that knows how hard it is to run a business of any size in this economy—especially in a blue state like California.
_I am reaching out to loyal conservatives nationwide as we need all hands-on deck to win this seat and take back the house._ _I urgently need your help to take away Pelosi’s gavel for good, and Make Orange County Great Again!_
Beating Katie Porter won’t be easy, but I’m no stranger to winning tough fights.

My passion for public service came from the loss of my mother to cancer just ten years ago. Through that experience, I pulled myself out from underneath the poverty line to now owning an information technology and social media marketing business.

I believe in the American Dream of hard work and opportunity- because I’ve seen it.

_I can testify to the greatness of our country, because I’ve felt it!_
Pelosi and Porter’s days in Congress are numbered. Can you imagine a world where Pelosi is no longer Speaker?

I can - with your help!
This race is a must-win seat in order to regain control of the House and to stop the spread of Socialism! _That’s why I need your help so urgently!_
Stand with Trump, Elect Burley to Congress. Let’s Defend the America First Legacy
---
| [DONATE $5, $10, $25, $50, OR MORE!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq8m1mcqunjj6asmbgrn78eg239tcm2mtnm9m23g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3ge9or6clh2bs)
---
Thank you and God Bless,
Brian Burley
Republican Candidate, CA-47
Member, Orange County Central Committee
Businessman
America First Patriot

---

---
| [DONATE NOW!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2qo12huv466le8rmu8e2pgg3oce3iu2cfkpsqo0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3ge9or6clh2bs)
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.icyminews.com/prefs/9z2z0e11gq9gpp2bs5f8lvjcgpb95u45q6og99038l0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zilqlb5jmsgn8bd2c0sq4efs33e6iupghaetf0pg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c3ge9or6clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

subject: Quitters 🚨
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
It’s not often that reading the news makes you smile, but I’ll admit that this put a grin on my face:
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3f61p--fgxr-4qqlpo7&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)
|

---

It’s not often that reading the news makes you smile, but I’ll admit that this put a grin on my face:

---

**House Dems Beg Members Not To Quit In The Face of Fierce GOP Midterm Challenge**
Washington Times, 1/25/22

---

It looks like we’re making an impact! The Democrats know that we’re starting a Red Wave of historic proportions, and while many of the Democrats have already tossed in the towel, not all of them have gotten the message.

**It’s clear that Americans are fed up with the radical, broken leadership offered by the Democrats.** Our victories in November in Virginia and other states should have been the wake-up call to get their heads out of the sand, but Joe Biden and his Democrat allies in Congress have just stuck their heads in deeper.

It’s obvious now that they aren’t listening to Americans.

**[But, we can make them listen by delivering HUGE wins in the upcoming elections. To do that, I need you to make a quick donation to help us push our America First candidates to victory all across the country.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f61p-1wbnv-4qqlpo7/ "But, we can make them listen by delivering HUGE wins in the upcoming elections. To do that, I need you to make a quick donation to help us push our America First candidates to victory all across the country.")**

The 2022 midterm elections will be here before we know it, and it is more important than ever that we outraise the radical Democrats. That’s why getting your contribution in as soon as possible is so important.

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f61p-1wbnw-4qqlpo8/)
---
| | [CHIP IN TO GROW THE RED WAVE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f61p-1wbnx-4qqlpo9/)
---

When we say that we’re tired of empty grocery shelves and high gas prices, we’re told that those aren’t real problems or that the way to solve them is to hand Democrats even more power.

When we say that we want fair and secure elections with policies like Voter ID, we’re shouted down as racists, despite the fact that Americans across the board support Voter ID.

When we say that we’re DONE with closures, shut-downs and mandates, we’re told that we aren’t compassionate enough and that breaking the economy and violating people’s freedoms is necessary for public health.

---
| | [CHIP IN TO GROW THE RED WAVE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f61p-1wbny-4qqlpo0/)
---

**With a track record like this, it’s no wonder that Americans are turning their backs on the Democrats in droves and supporting GOP candidates who offer a better vision for America. **

Some Democrats are now waking up to the fact that they’ve earned the ire of the American people, but instead of shifting course and listening to them, they’re opting to call it quits and retire.

I’m committed to rolling with this Red Wave all the way to November, where I know we can deliver a historic victory for the American people. But our movement relies on people like you to keep us going.

**[I’m asking personally for you to chip in to help us turn the tide for America and deliver this Red Wave.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f61p-1wbnz-4qqlpo1/ "I’m asking personally for you to chip in to help us turn the tide for America and deliver this Red Wave.")**

Let’s kick the Democrats out of power and take our country back.

Never Give An Inch,

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f61p-1wbo0-4qqlpo8/)
---
Mike Pompeo
---
| |
Help Champion American Values: Text **CHAMPION** to **29910**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f61p-1wbo1-4qqlpo9/ "PompeoEmailFooter")
---

**A Personal Note from Mike Pompeo**

With the Freedom Fund, I am supporting candidates across America who will defend the freedoms and values that make America great. From Iowa to Texas to California, I’m supporting principled conservatives who we can count on to keep their promises and deliver results. But our efforts will only be successful if we have the financial resources necessary to counter the big bucks flowing into the Democrat campaigns.

**[If you love America and refuse to let the Democrats turn the American dream into a socialist nightmare, then I need YOU to step up right away with an emergency donation to our Freedom Fund.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f61p-1wbo2-4qqlpo0/ "If you love America and refuse to let the Democrats turn the American dream into a socialist nightmare, then I need YOU to step up right away with an emergency donation to our Freedom Fund.")**

It’s obvious now that they aren’t listening to Americans. "But, we can make them listen by delivering HUGE wins in the upcoming elections. To do that, I need you to make a quick donation to help us push our America First candidates to victory all across the country." The 2022 midterm elections will be here before we know it, and it is more important than ever that we outraise the radical Democrats. That’s why getting your contribution in as soon as possible is so important. | | | When we say that we’re tired of empty grocery shelves and high gas prices, we’re told that those aren’t real problems or that the way to solve them is to hand Democrats even more power. When we say that we want fair and secure elections with policies like Voter ID, we’re shouted down as racists, despite the fact that Americans across the board support Voter ID. When we say that we’re DONE with closures, shut-downs and mandates, we’re told that we aren’t compassionate enough and that breaking the economy and violating people’s freedoms is necessary for public health. | | With a track record like this, it’s no wonder that Americans are turning their backs on the Democrats in droves and supporting GOP candidates who offer a better vision for America. Some Democrats are now waking up to the fact that they’ve earned the ire of the American people, but instead of shifting course and listening to them, they’re opting to call it quits and retire. I’m committed to rolling with this Red Wave all the way to November, where I know we can deliver a historic victory for the American people. But our movement relies on people like you to keep us going. "I’m asking personally for you to chip in to help us turn the tide for America and deliver this Red Wave." Let’s kick the Democrats out of power and take our country back. Never Give An Inch, | Mike Pompeo | | Help Champion American Values: Text CHAMPION to 29910 | "PompeoEmailFooter" A Personal Note from Mike Pompeo With the Freedom Fund, I am supporting candidates across America who will defend the freedoms and values that make America great. From Iowa to Texas to California, I’m supporting principled conservatives who we can count on to keep their promises and deliver results. But our efforts will only be successful if we have the financial resources necessary to counter the big bucks flowing into the Democrat campaigns. "If you love America and refuse to let the Democrats turn the American dream into a socialist nightmare, then I need YOU to step up right away with an emergency donation to our Freedom Fund." Make sure you never miss an update from Mike Pompeo and CAVPAC! Add info@email.cavpac.com** to your address book! | | | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE. name: Nick Savas
subject: Buddy Carter buddies up with PACs – not people.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
Friend -
Thanks to you, we have been able to outraise incumbent Buddy Carter in individual contributions!
Since June, our campaign has raised $348,000 from individual contributions! Over that same time period, incumbent Buddy Carter has raised only $273,429.04 from individual donors.
Last quarter, Buddy Carter raised $103,995.00 from special interest groups, Political Action Committees, while only raising $78,305.54 from individuals.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringmomentum?refcode=020222whem [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringmomentum?refcode=020222whem]The fact that he’s received more money from Political Action Committees than individuals says it all – Buddy Carter places politics before the people of this District every time he gets a chance.
The First District deserves someone who’s focused on the people and families of Georgia – not the political action committees and special interests that are tearing our country apart .
Wade is not only outperforming the four-term incumbent with individual contributions, he has also surpassed any other Democratic candidate in the last 25 years for the amount of total contributions received for the entire election cycle.
Can you help us keep this momentum going with a contribution today? No amount is too small – $5, $10, $25, or more makes a big difference as we get closer to Election Day! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringmomentum?refcode=020222whem]
Thank you for your continued support,
Nick Savas
Campaign Manager | Wade Herring for Congress

disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
He’s racked up so many failures it can be hard to keep track of them all. |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41377013/328541514/-2095106638?refcode=20220203_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzVhZWQyZi1mODg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j-jiSFLes1KPrGzuwFV8STHTv-1E_lUA3msnU8GX-3I=)

Folks – After nearly a full term in office, Ron DeSantis has racked up so many failures that it can be hard to keep track of them all. That’s why we want to know what you think:
**What’s the WORST way Ron DeSantis has failed Florida?**
Here are just a few of the disasters DeSantis has been responsible for:
**A. He REFUSED to take COVID seriously** , and even tried to penalize school districts and officials who tried to implement basic public health measures. **[Click here if you think THIS is the worst way DeSantis has failed Florida.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41377014/328541515/621884850?refcode=20220203_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzVhZWQyZi1mODg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j-jiSFLes1KPrGzuwFV8STHTv-1E_lUA3msnU8GX-3I=)**
**B. He’s trying to BAN school books that make him uncomfortable** , in addition to going after educators who teach subjects that he finds personally objectionable. **[If you think THIS is the worst way DeSantis has failed Florida, click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41377015/328541516/-2099104334?refcode=20220203_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzVhZWQyZi1mODg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j-jiSFLes1KPrGzuwFV8STHTv-1E_lUA3msnU8GX-3I=)**
**C. He wants to allow Floridians to carry firearms in public without a license** , despite the objections of public safety officials and the history of gun violence in our state. **[Click here if you think THIS is the worst way he’s failed Florida.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41377016/328541517/239547826?refcode=20220203_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzVhZWQyZi1mODg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j-jiSFLes1KPrGzuwFV8STHTv-1E_lUA3msnU8GX-3I=)**
With so many horrific failures under his belt, it’s a wonder he’s even daring to run for re-election. But with your grassroots support, Charlie can win in November and finally start making Tallahassee work for Floridians again.
[PITCH IN TO HELP CHARLIE
BEAT RON DESANTIS!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41377017/328541518/-2095106638?refcode=20220203_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzVhZWQyZi1mODg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j-jiSFLes1KPrGzuwFV8STHTv-1E_lUA3msnU8GX-3I=)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8413%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Fzgv2R40ecjp9lG9JLkuOg&sysid=1)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up--that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13765%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zrFBJchm4tsSZvmPU2UB%2bw&sysid=1) [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13766%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GjNod7V34OK7gfRnvQ5izA&sysid=1)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13767%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TsReqOGLy%2bhoZgmHTdSscA&sysid=1) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13768%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KuAGjmDjZnKWxSRQJBSrxA&sysid=1) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

| _Copyright(C) 2021 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8413%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Fzgv2R40ecjp9lG9JLkuOg&sysid=1)_

|

body:

| | |

I'm worried, friend. With hours left to meet tonight's fundraising goal, **I'm still falling $7,481 short.** Please, let me explain why this is such a dire moment:
**I'm neck and neck with Marco Rubio in the race that will determine Senate control, and****CNN contributors like James Carville have "zero doubt" that I CAN win.**
The problem is that the GOP is stacking the cards against me because they KNOW this race is Democrats' best chance to expand our Senate majority. Far-right outside groups are dumping millions into Florida, and the chair of the RNC just attacked me _personally._
**I'm looking at my fundraising numbers now, and I won't be able to defend myself from these GOP attacks if I don't reach my goal in the next few hours.**
**[Missing this goal and falling behind in this race could mean handing the Senate right back to Mitch McConnell, so I have to ask: Will you donate $5 right now to help me defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41382349/328558415/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2341-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjgwMWI3OS1mZTg0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q_0j0aGxgNhtyEXdokP7Ie6tIjxFDUKe0MWv92dDyL8=)**

subject: They said it, not us: “2020 𝙨𝙤𝙧𝙚 𝙡𝙤𝙨𝙚𝙧𝙨 look to run the 2024 vote”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
Team, this report from CNN Politics couldn’t have put it better. The GOP still can’t accept their 2020 loss, so now they want to take over our elections before 2024! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=email_020322_1]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=email_020322_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=email_020322_1]
Many Republicans still believe that 2020 was “stolen” from Trump. Countless lawsuits and mountains of evidence have demonstrated the truth – that the election was fair and accurate.

The fight for voting rights would continue through the women’s suffrage movement of the early 20th century and the civil rights movement of the ‘50s and ‘60s. _We have come a long way in the last century._ **But now, the right to vote is under attack again, by radical Republicans determined to take us backward and hold onto power at any cost.** They’re passing legislation specifically aimed at decreasing voter participation — like restrictive voter ID laws and prohibitions on mail-in voting — and using ultra-partisan gerrymandering tactics to make sure that some folks’ votes count less than others. **We can’t stand for it, Peter, not after coming so far.** **[If you’re with Roy in the fight for voting rights, sign on to support national Democrats’ efforts to protect and expand access to the ballot box>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41385008/328569029/2056757003?refcode=ea.3ac812de-0285-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ms=ea.3ac812de-0285-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWM4MTJkZS0wMjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RT7IyxZ_NbGiBSyQGP-DZPk3ZxpXJqAf0CvEywt24nQ=&emci=754dc2d7-0285-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=3ac812de-0285-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=1049176)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41385010/328569031/2056757003?refcode=ea.3ac812de-0285-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ms=ea.3ac812de-0285-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWM4MTJkZS0wMjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RT7IyxZ_NbGiBSyQGP-DZPk3ZxpXJqAf0CvEywt24nQ=&emci=754dc2d7-0285-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=3ac812de-0285-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=1049176)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Here's the Truth...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene for Congress
body:
Peter:

CNN is facing a MAJOR Sex Scandal and the rats are deserting the ship.

**Twitter is facing increased backlash for banning me, President Trump and thousands of other Americans all for the crime of...telling the truth.**

The Biden White House is a disaster, and rumors are Bumblin' Joe now wants to deploy the military to stop a U.S. Freedom Convoy from reaching D.C.

And the D.C. establishment?

They want nothing more than to remove me from office.

The entire DC establishment has me in their targets.

**And it's because I'm just a regular person just like you.**

I'm not part of their Uniparty and they hate me for it.

Democrats and RINOs are going to spend MILLIONS to defeat me in 2022, so I need your help.

**[Will you stand with me](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59588792:ss3jS7HfN:m:1:2365227053:F4497E1AF2ECB71C0CDDF7A6EA1BEF2F:r)?** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59588792:ss3jS7HfN:m:1:2365227053:F4497E1AF2ECB71C0CDDF7A6EA1BEF2F:r) [_**STAND WITH MTG
CHIP IN $17.76 NOW!**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59588792:ss3jS7HfN:m:1:2365227053:F4497E1AF2ECB71C0CDDF7A6EA1BEF2F:r) Now more than ever I need your help to fight back.

**The establishment and their hand maidens in the media will do everything they can to shut me down and shut me up.**

But if you know anything about me, you know that isn't going to happen.

I didn't get in politics to be a quiet meek go-along-to-get-along milquetoast congresswoman.

I'm not here to get invited to all the cocktail parties and black-tie dinners.

**No. I ran for office to make a difference.**

To fight the radical socialists and their whiny defenders in BOTH parties.

Sure, it means I don't get the invites to the swanky parties Liz Cheney gets. But I simply won't be silent. I won't back down!

**And I won't go to parties with Liz Cheney anyway.**

So Big Tech canceled me.

The leftwing corporate media attacks me, Nancy Pelosi censored me, and even some of my fellow "Republicans" have come after me.

_But I have you_.

At least I pray I do.

**[Will you please chip in a contribution of $20.22, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or even the legal maximum of $2,900 per individual TODAY so I can keep fighting for Donald Trump's America First principles](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59588792:ss3jS7HfN:m:1:2365227053:F4497E1AF2ECB71C0CDDF7A6EA1BEF2F:r)?**

Peter: the radical socialists, CNN, Twitter, Facebook, the Democrats--they can't handle the truth!

**And I will NEVER stop speaking the truth.**

So I must have your support right away to keep speaking the truth and speaking up for our America First values.

**[Please stand with me in this all-important fight today! Chip in your most generous contribution right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59588792:ss3jS7HfN:m:1:2365227053:F4497E1AF2ECB71C0CDDF7A6EA1BEF2F:r)!** [_**STAND WITH MTG
CHIP IN $17.76 NOW!**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59588792:ss3jS7HfN:m:1:2365227053:F4497E1AF2ECB71C0CDDF7A6EA1BEF2F:r) Marjorie Taylor Greene [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59588792:ss3jS7HfN:m:1:2365227053:F4497E1AF2ECB71C0CDDF7A6EA1BEF2F:r) Congresswoman (R-GA)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59588792:ss3jS7HfN:m:1:2365227053:F4497E1AF2ECB71C0CDDF7A6EA1BEF2F:r)

name: Rushern Baker
subject: Black Future
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

Friend,
When reflecting on Black History in this country, it’s impossible to get the whole story without considering Black Present and Black Future.
The systemic chains of inequity are far from broken. Racial tensions are on the rise. We can’t keep accepting a reality where the color of your skin dictates whether or not you have the right to breathe. It’s time for a future of inclusivity and equity, and we can’t settle for anything less.
As I’ve said before, one of the guiding forces in my life is guilt. I’ve achieved what I have because I was lucky. I had the support of a loving community that lifted me up. Not every black man gets that, and I will continue to fight until they do.
If you want to help bring Maryland into a brighter future for ALL Marylanders, then Nancy and I are the ONLY choice. If you want to join us on this mission, please donate today. Together is how we get there. [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Thank you,
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Rushern L. Baker, III

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking the Hill
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/QtXEvfGc5s_GXF_JNfcGkYvPd2KSFeLet-Fhmuu2X_w=/9opM5kFUz7I4Jth-s6sgw6V6WPsLTbCj-ijrkrebGNc=)

Peter,

It's hard to believe that January has already come and gone.

February 1 marked the start of Black History Month -- a celebration of Black people and Black leaders who have shaped and continue to shape our nation. It is harrowing that the start of this celebration is marked by threats towards HBCU's. We must do better and we must remain committed to working towards justice and equity.

As we celebrate Black History Month, we are coming together to honor and celebrate the[ five Black Military Veterans currently serving in Congress](https://act.myngp.com/el/QtXEvfGc5s_GXF_JNfcGkYvPd2KSFeLet-Fhmuu2X_w=/ej7J-CwzAgvzSYdG7rp6ktqfPgA-BLDcx-0fVL8nGo4=).. Join me and Taking The Hill PAC, with the Congressional Black Caucus PAC, next Tuesday, February 8, at 6:30PM at 423 New Jersey Ave SE, Washington, DC. We will be celebrating these give Great Americans currently serving in Congress and it'd be great to have you there.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/QtXEvfGc5s_GXF_JNfcGkYvPd2KSFeLet-Fhmuu2X_w=/9opM5kFUz7I4Jth-s6sgw6V6WPsLTbCj-ijrkrebGNc=)

Attached is the invitation and you can rsvp [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/QtXEvfGc5s_GXF_JNfcGkYvPd2KSFeLet-Fhmuu2X_w=/ej7J-CwzAgvzSYdG7rp6ktqfPgA-BLDcx-0fVL8nGo4=). We are excited to see you there!

Yours in service,
Patrick

Patrick Murphy
Founder
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/QtXEvfGc5s_GXF_JNfcGkYvPd2KSFeLet-Fhmuu2X_w=/G3fx6R_XFGYSG50akJJ7qrgUqlrXxGuY5rsswq6as9M=)
To make a contribution, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/QtXEvfGc5s_GXF_JNfcGkYvPd2KSFeLet-Fhmuu2X_w=/ej7J-CwzAgvzSYdG7rp6ktqfPgA-BLDcx-0fVL8nGo4= "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rogermissotth").
Checks may be mailed to:
Taking the Hill PAC
PO Box 2134
Bristol, PA 19007

Paid for by Taking the Hill
---
Taking the Hill
PO Box 2134
Bristol PA 19007 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/QtXEvfGc5s_GXF_JNfcGkYvPd2KSFeLet-Fhmuu2X_w=/yXDtqFf6UVqZ0Fpb3gnaNF7sB-zTNrp_Q7q6QV8-L5o=).

subject: We tried to warn you but you kept ignoring us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:

We tried to warn you but you kept ignoring us.

Now, you are letting your fellow Republicans and our country down with each passing day.

**[This is your FINAL CHANCE to renew your 2022 Membership and help Republicans win back the House Majority!](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f7ah-1wcv4-4qqlpo1/ "This is your FINAL CHANCE to renew your 2022 Membership and help Republicans win back the House Majority!")**

---

You can be the patriot who finally helps FIRE Nancy Pelosi and stop the Democrats’ radical agenda in Congress.

Or you can ignore this message, do nothing, and watch Democrats destroy this country.

All we’re asking is that you **[RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f7ah-1wcv7-4qqlpo4/ "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")** to help Republicans beat the Democrats. We’ll even send you your very own ID card as a thank you!

There isn’t much time left, Fellow Conservative. Please make the right choice.

---

Thank you,

House Republicans

---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f7ah-1wcv9-4qqlpo6/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f7ah-1wcva-4qqlpo6/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Did you see our campaign's BIG NEWS this week?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Diehl for Massachusetts
body:
Read more about our campaign and show your support by making a donation to support Geoff today.
| | | |
---
| Dear Friend,
Did you see this week's BIG NEWS?

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume t
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmpbq87dc2iba8bsu3m8mdtcufnarplt3qqkb590_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfastkeqo62ptjemqm1pbgshj7cplkm9gbcc5h6mo7ac3hehg79c3iclo74pb2e3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm5cr4sur64phks2pm9ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdgmcp70c9h64p724no)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up—that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zacrn3nba8mvkal2v9nv70jt5195ifm7j7f3pcn8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjg64oj2cjh2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgj3i0hgcbsnn5jipr6s9mptfonsnfnp9qh4m9po_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjg64oj2cjh2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zadnvns8qdlv2gjitivg8javou3kcn0rmr6sl880_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjg64oj2cjh2bs) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhe2kf3hvoc6s8bad2a595srfurml3qifp86c4po_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjg64oj2cjh2bs) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2021 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ziuim3e0t6d50sjvj7rt3rbnimvk53uuhj01dch0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjg64oj2cjh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Team Holland
subject: This year is different
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holland for Kansas

During Black History Month, we are focused on both honoring the triumphs and struggles of Black Americans throughout our history, and recognizing how far we still have to go as a nation.

It is high time to bring a more diverse perspective to the Supreme Court. President Biden has the power to shape the court for decades to come, and has promised to choose a qualified and historical nominee.

**Meet Mark:** Reverend Mark Holland is a fourth generation Kansan and a third generation United Methodist Pastor. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years.
---

name: Casar News Alert
subject: San Antonio Express-News: Casar Best for Democratic TX-35 Primary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
body:
BIG NEWS, Peter : The editorial board of San Antonio’s biggest newspaper—the San Antonio Express-News —has endorsed Greg Casar in the Democratic primary for TX-35!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=01.03-email&amount=35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=01.03-email&amount=35]
This is a big one. This is the first major editorial board endorsement in the primary race for Texas’s 35th District. Here’s just a bit about what the San Antonio Express-News said in their endorsement:
“We recommend Greg Casar. We were impressed with his bold, progressive ideas and see someone who has the potential to be a powerful voice in Congress...Casar’s passion, policy understanding and eloquence set him apart.”
Our campaign is building momentum every day, Peter. But with less than two weeks until early voting starts, we need your support now to get out the vote from Austin to San Antonio. Can you pitch in $35 to help Greg Casar win in TX-35? Every donation helps us reach voters in this final stretch. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=01.03-email&amount=35]

Team Greg

Friend -- Jason Miyares swore an oath to represent all Virginians, but in three weeks, he's done nothing but pander to his far-right base. Rather than protecting us, he's endangering us. name: Brett Guillory for Texas
subject: Endorsement Alert: Dr. Joseph Varon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brett Guillory for Texas
body:
Nationally Recognized MD Supports Brett Guillory
| | | | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IBIARB8Bu3cK-isIiJjXAePrValXHdM2kxxy7zPQO8vOl3Ys2mEp86IxCZpueXIKQAobYQOr0E44nLxkt3HWzrUamiftHc3OepH-xdWLlwdCHk_H7DWRq3-wH3INMLG0oZfiPjdLSj-pd2K-RGNcgLgeK59-3VZK6CqGbj-Wsc8=&c=rAyane-CO5KQO_-vjL9iMjKQ7nsbmbI71ml3yD3wgxl2cmL6jskmFA==&ch=bnl2vZZdwYiwwJ3pPf94m2lU7gQitCPUPQ2hsBHCU9KlHOEGxlywWg==)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Neighbor,
I'm pleased to announce that I've received the endorsement of Dr. Joseph Varon for U.S. Congress.
---
---
In 2020, Dr. Varon received national attention for his tireless service to COVID-afflicted patients, working more than 280 days straight to care for their health. Since then, his selfless work has continued, but unfortunately, has not received the same, positive recognition from his peers or from a press which seeks to repress anyone that doesn't support their "approved" narrative.
Due to his use of Ivermectin as part of a protocol to treat his patients, Dr. Varon has faced backlash, censorship, and has even had his license threatened. The good news: patients from across the country and from Mexico still make their way to Houston to seek his care and the treatments they can't get from other doctors.
---
---
It goes without saying how honored I am to have the endorsement and support of such a courageous fighter, as well as, a man who - at great cost - puts first the health and lives of his patients. My commitment to both Dr. Varon and Dr. Mary Talley Bowden is to always fight for our medical freedom and to hold to account those that threaten these great doctors and their licenses.
---
---

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I need your help, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
| | |
---
Friend,
I'd prefer not to send you emails asking for money. My focus continues to be fighting for families like yours.
However, my finance team is telling me we're in a bit of a sticky spot. We have a significant gap in our fundraising, and we need to raise $50,000 by midnight tonight. **That's bad under normal circumstances, but with the GOP spending more against me than any other Senate Democrat in the country, it is the absolute worst time for our numbers to lag.**
As I said, asking for money is one of my least favorite things to do, but **Mitch McConnell and Republicans across the country have spent over $7 million to unseat me.** And if I miss this goal, it will invite even more dark money in New Hampshire. In a purple state like New Hampshire, that could be the difference between winning or losing.
That's why I need your help to get us out of this rut, friend. **[Will you please donate what you can right now to help close our fundraising gap and protect this seat – and the Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41390634/328595278/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk634-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWM3NmYzYS0wZjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dVQOVq5OTBlov8h9beDQXDI6s8NiCtlb2mzyVIfd_JU=)**

body:

| | Peter,

As Texas faces winter weather and freezing temperatures over the next few days, I hope you and your family are safe and warm.

Please heed the advice of local authorities, and don’t travel on icy roads unless there is an emergency.

[**You can follow Austin Emergency Management on Twitter for information on road closures, warming centers, and other helpful resources.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41390748/328595734/-498689143?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTk2NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWZkNzdmNC0wZjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rArYwiQQMIzpAijGJcNkyUZwk8yPH--jqKvaxao0G5w=&emci=59c76f3a-0f85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=fafd77f4-0f85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=39066839)

Stay safe this week, Peter.

More soon,

Eddie
