name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z57c2ok83pf17263gntkdastsahta4arenp793io_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqr7d3l6ur34s76m9hm8tlnc6onbc30c2qeaohlm1orcoj0cjh32tbgesqr0ob0cv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6dj35dpjcgrreoj661ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5j69o35c3h6coh5u)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up—that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztad7frfv66tlrac402ophavh6n2u4lclp4u7p58_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjg6ao72cph2bs) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfi7u9bctc9piaq1leh9es0t7mdmdbad88607alg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjg6ao72cph2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z31l4jig354bbe7ipscf2vtmv5t2h7615orovs9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjg6ao72cph2bs) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmi2n5u6mdueua6jk69m9efnhamqome152l8atj0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjg6ao72cph2bs) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2021 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

Clearly our campaign’s growing momentum has struck a chord with the GOP! The only reason they’re attacking us is because they know Gabe has the people power to defeat vulnerable incumbent Yvette Herrell, flip this swing seat blue, and protect our Democratic House majority in November. Hello,
63 years ago in 1959, Senator Chuck Grassley began his career as a politician when he was sworn into the Iowa House of Representatives:
> Dwight D. Eisenhower was president.
> The federal minimum wage was $1.00.
> A gallon of milk cost $0.25.
> A post stamp was $0.04.
> And Iowans who cast their first vote for Grassley are now at least 85-years-old.
**Times certainly have changed since 1959. And so has Chuck Grassley.** During his 63-year-long political career, Chuck Grassley has taken millions from the NRA, Big Pharma, and special interests. He orchestrated the unprecedented blocking of a Supreme Court nomination for 293 days. And he’s falsely perpetuated the Big Lie rather than stand up for the truth and be a voice of reason.
Iowa deserves better. **That’s why Admiral Mike Franken is running against Chuck Grassley to end his political career once and for all and turn Iowa blue.**
The early polls show a tight race, but Mitch McConnell is already raising millions into Super PACs to attack Mike and flip the Senate red. The only way to fight back and defeat Chuck Grassley is with help from grassroots donors like you now.
**We’re facing our first deadline of the month in a few days, and we’re still dangerously short of our goal and what we need to win and turn Iowa blue.**
[**Please, if you’re able to, will you chip in $5 or more right now – every dollar you can spare before our critical fundraising deadline – to help Admiral Mike Franken defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41391372/328599347/-42398318?refcode=em20220203mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjVmOTFiNy0xMjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hjrjud9ZcCq1wDPitC31HBnlrl_vQcbgmnlYV_9q8Pk=)

Peter,

I'll get right to the point. The fight for the future of America is happening right now. COVID tyranny has created a corrupt partnership between the radical left and the RINO establishment... name: Tim Ryan
subject: This was a risky decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
I knew the moment I supported abolishing the filibuster, right-wing groups would start flooding Ohio with cash and slamming our campaign with nasty attacks.

| | Derek, In a minute, [**I’ll ask you to split a critically important donation with my campaign**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41391433/328599577/-1623550794?refcode=20220203_CGVA_Ryan&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODY2YTA5MC0xMTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c74ZrjDgxphmjnG_1DCdDJKVPr78FqrVwmVuxbbewU4=)—a race that will decide Senate control. But first, can I have just a moment of your time to explain why your support today is so important? Coming out against the filibuster was a risky decision. I knew the moment I supported abolishing the filibuster, right-wing groups would start flooding Ohio with cash and slamming our campaign with nasty attacks. But it was the right thing to do. What’s the point of having a Democratic majority if we can’t accomplish anything? I’m proud of my decision and I won’t let anything stand in the way of delivering for hardworking Ohioans. But let me be clear: this makes us the GOP’s top target. They’re already spending upwards of $40 million (with millions more on the way) to make sure Ohio’s open Senate seat stays red. Abolishing the filibuster is the right thing to do, but it makes us especially vulnerable to right-wing attacks. **[That’s why I’m personally asking you to split a donation between my campaign and CommonGood today to help us fight back against the GOP and flip Ohio blue so we can make progress for Ohioans and all Americans. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41391435/328599612/-1623550794?refcode=20220203_CGVA_Ryan&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODY2YTA5MC0xMTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c74ZrjDgxphmjnG_1DCdDJKVPr78FqrVwmVuxbbewU4=)** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41391437/328599620/-368617150?refcode=20211212_CGVA_Kelly&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODY2YTA5MC0xMTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c74ZrjDgxphmjnG_1DCdDJKVPr78FqrVwmVuxbbewU4=)** | | | [DONATE $25 ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41391439/328599628/-367109815?refcode=20220203_CGVA_Ryan&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODY2YTA5MC0xMTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c74ZrjDgxphmjnG_1DCdDJKVPr78FqrVwmVuxbbewU4=)

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: Thank You 🙏
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41392303/328603703/-1401029323?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGMyMzA2Ny0xNDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zvtj97fY_W9_6moBoboxse8R5L2mXQFfOFPAraSehZk=) **Peter,** **From the bottom of my heart, thank you.** Because of your incredible dedication to preserving and expanding democracy in Tennessee, we were able to exceed our $30,000 goal for the month of January. **We raised $31,800 for our[legal fund](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41392304/328603704/-1401029323?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGMyMzA2Ny0xNDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zvtj97fY_W9_6moBoboxse8R5L2mXQFfOFPAraSehZk=), and every penny will be going toward suing the Tennessee Republican Party in court over their rigged district maps.** **When I say we can’t do this without you, I truly mean it.** The resilience and dedication of Tennessee Democrats is palpable, and it is that kind of tenacity that will ensure our eventual victory. **You are the reason we’re going to win in the end.** **Governor Lee will be signing the maps soon, and our lawsuit will drop shortly afterward. We’ll be sure to let you know when we file — we’re going to give it our all.** **Tennessee Democrats don’t quit.** This fight won’t be won overnight — we are in this for the long haul. But we know we’ll flip this state because of supporters like you, Peter. Thank you, Hendrell Remus he/him Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41392305/328603705/-1401029323?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGMyMzA2Ny0xNDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zvtj97fY_W9_6moBoboxse8R5L2mXQFfOFPAraSehZk=) | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41392306/328603706/-441869451?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGMyMzA2Ny0xNDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zvtj97fY_W9_6moBoboxse8R5L2mXQFfOFPAraSehZk=&emci=666344a2-4984-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=58c23067-1485-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=6362892) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41392307/328603707/-63984994?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGMyMzA2Ny0xNDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zvtj97fY_W9_6moBoboxse8R5L2mXQFfOFPAraSehZk=&emci=666344a2-4984-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=58c23067-1485-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=6362892) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41392308/328603708/-1736995537?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGMyMzA2Ny0xNDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zvtj97fY_W9_6moBoboxse8R5L2mXQFfOFPAraSehZk=&emci=666344a2-4984-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=58c23067-1485-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=6362892)

name: Team Heinrich
subject: re: Recovering America’s Wildlife Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
Here’s what needs to happen. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41392331/328603896/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmQwMzE5ZS0xNDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QICKB-gTAA_hpFQoRSy8Sya_RfPpkejBQsrFNBNHz2k=&emci=0d2e4568-8683-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=1bd0319e-1485-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=252045)
---
Folks, more than one-third of fish and wildlife species are at risk of extinction in the United States. That’s not okay, and it’s got to change. Martin knows that protecting fish and wildlife means protecting the future of our lands and water. That's why he's taken actionable steps that meet the scale of the crisis: _**FIRST:**_ Martin introduced the bipartisan _Recovering America’s Wildlife Act_ in the U.S. Senate, ensuring that states, territories, and Tribes have the resources to fund wildlife conservation efforts and prevent more species from endangerment. _**THEN:**_ The bill has gained momentum, with more than 32 U.S. Senators from both sides of the aisle signing on as co-sponsors in a bipartisan commitment to preserving our wildlife. The House Natural Resources Committee even advanced the bill, getting us one monumental step closer to saving thousands of species. _**NOW**_ : We need to support Martin — and other conservation-focused candidates — as he focuses on getting this critical legislation across the finish line in the U.S. Senate. __**SO:**__ **Will you chip in any amount to support our work to elect Martin and leaders who prioritize wildlife conservation up and down the ballot?** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41392332/328603898/-317129921?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmQwMzE5ZS0xNDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QICKB-gTAA_hpFQoRSy8Sya_RfPpkejBQsrFNBNHz2k=) | [$25 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41392333/328603899/-317129921?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmQwMzE5ZS0xNDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QICKB-gTAA_hpFQoRSy8Sya_RfPpkejBQsrFNBNHz2k=)

clean_body: Here’s what needs to happen. Folks, more than one-third of fish and wildlife species are at risk of extinction in the United States. That’s not okay, and it’s got to change. Martin knows that protecting fish and wildlife means protecting the future of our lands and water. That's why he's taken actionable steps that meet the scale of the crisis: FIRST: Martin introduced the bipartisan Recovering America’s Wildlife Act in the U.S. Senate, ensuring that states, territories, and Tribes have the resources to fund wildlife conservation efforts and prevent more species from endangerment. THEN: The bill has gained momentum, with more than 32 U.S. Senators from both sides of the aisle signing on as co-sponsors in a bipartisan commitment to preserving our wildlife. The House Natural Resources Committee even advanced the bill, getting us one monumental step closer to saving thousands of species. NOW : We need to support Martin — and other conservation-focused candidates — as he focuses on getting this critical legislation across the finish line in the U.S. Senate. SO: Will you chip in any amount to support our work to elect Martin and leaders who prioritize wildlife conservation up and down the ballot? # Peter,

As an elected leader of Oklahoma, election integrity is of the utmost importance to me. Elections are the easiest vehicle for we the people to address our grievances with our government... Election laws in Oklahoma should make it easy to vote... but hard to cheat. There are still lingering questions and concerns regarding the integrity of the November 2020 election. That's why I introduced four bills in the Oklahoma Senate to alleviate those questions and concerns: SB 1690 \- Calls for a forensic audit of the 2020 election SB 1748 \- Specifies valid reasons that individuals may ask for an absentee ballot SB 1805 \- Creates a system of perforated ballots, allowing voters to tear off a numbered section of the ballot to review online later. ALL ballots would be accessible to the public, but only the individual would be able to match their identifier to their ballot SB 1820 \- Requires every notary in the state to submit a copy of their receipt book for the 90 days preceding the election. Copies must be provided within 30 days of the election If passed, each bill will be implemented prior to the November. 2022 election... [Do you agree that Oklahoma must conduct a forensic audit of the 2020 elections, Peter? Make an URGENT donation to my campaign to support a nationwide forensic audit by clicking here today >>>](https://em.dahmforsenate.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rzSS04/VVvj9-6kFfT2N3WmDPk45gbDW70RWGB4F4_G-N7dHCv13lLBmV1-WJV7CgVPpN46lrQTN_FrwW6_76qt8nT1n8W5WnSmw5cqlP-Vf97447ClhbTW3wsw2r66thjjW3M84cW4vw1YmW4xbXvf2SfZXlW6sr79t3BzqyFN5m46Kq24zMwW2DNrV-81jdKyW5Br0PX8RfxVqW198Pz_8qmr5LW39FhL759qR7lW7Hq5Y_5_WzygW6KsMXl4tFmn0W4NkXq_8yQHR-V36GlJ29P0pNN4sT__JX7kDbW5X2RPN49Tw7MW2dxFjX1YTqh7W17tQDB9l9nq1W3jLwz46n4Kw53fc31) There are serious doubts about the integrity of the 2020 election. The radical socialists and spineless RINOs in Washington REFUSE to take action... body:
We're the only campaign this close | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a19234e2c9e8/neck-and-neck-with-tim-walz?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

Did you see the latest poll from KSTP? Coming off our overwhelming win in the MNGOP Gubernatorial [straw poll](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=d1ec48f279&e=33b11688c1) on Tuesday, our campaign is now neck and neck with Tim Walz.

We are the _only_ campaign within 3 (THREE) percent of him according to their latest poll. This is a [9 point improvement](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=fa2b5d4a65&e=33b11688c1) for us compared to their poll in December. We are surging:
---
|
---
| Your support since our announcement in March 2021 has led to a historic movement: we set a small dollar fundraising record (over $1.2 Million in 2021); we have had historic turnout at nearly every event we've had throughout the state; we won the gubernatorial straw poll by a large margin and nearly tripled the total of the next Republican competitor; and now polling is starting to confirm that we have the best shot at beating Tim Walz.

Our message of hope and healing is working! We will win if we focus on safety in our streets, students prioritized over broken institutions, science (NOT political science), and secure elections.

It is time to unify behind our campaign that can win and focus on Tim Walz. Peter --- we need you at our side over the next several months! Please consider [donating](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=607d943b73&e=33b11688c1), signing up to [be a volunteer](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=c991e9239e&e=33b11688c1), [getting signage](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=02995f99af&e=33b11688c1) for your home, or [purchasing merchandise](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=2b5f5b7ce7&e=33b11688c1). With your continued support, we will beat Tim Walz! The momentum is on our side. NOW is the time for unity and backing a candidate who can win!

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor - Minnesota

body:

| **REMINDER:** [Dr. Annie still needs you to sign on and demand accountability for the January 6th rioters!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41392551/328605256/702181211?refcode=AA_EM_SV_3MO_220203_1_2&refcode2=&contactdata=NRnZHCY7%2Fzli%2FpKbPakU3v48x8Ak2Z6oAVGNPPeUkbHY4QEAxMIIhepfeh6rw8rO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTE1YTk0Ny0xNjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7YBvLOpvGaVUx0RaahJuV_zkkS558MXHzT_DqzJWRNg=&emci=6956bf1e-1685-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=b515a947-1685-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=6125529)

Read her message below:
* * *

Team,

First, I want to thank everyone who helped us reach our goal of 1,000 online contributions in the first month of the election year. We can’t build a winning campaign without supporters like you on our team, and I couldn’t be more grateful.

This weekend, when former President Trump announced he would consider pardoning January 6th rioters if elected back to office, I was reminded of how important it is that we elect leaders who will defend our democracy and stand up for what’s right.

This campaign is worth fighting for because, after seven terms in the Senate, Sen. Grassley has left working families, like my own, behind.
This campaign is worth fighting for because I promise that nobody – _nobody –_ will work harder than I will to defeat Sen. Grassley and protect our Democratic Senate majority.
I know you care about this race, and your support means the world to me. Because of your belief in my campaign, we're able to truly compete. Because of you, we're going to _defeat_ Sen. Grassley and expand our Senate majority.

subject: With your help, we're unstoppable

body:
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41392705/328606093/-1658601434?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDQzNmZlYi0xNjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=63y6dRBs_u0AIT2efyTDYlI7kfe7vO_oxd7BOxLp9Fo=&emci=981a0941-4584-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=ad436feb-1685-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=8410825)
---
Friend,

We just wrapped up our first end-of-month fundraiser of 2022 and, first of all, we'd just like to say, _thank you._ Your outpouring of support helped Angela blow her fundraising goals out of the water, and we are beyond grateful.

This is exactly the kind of momentum that will keep the wind in Angela's sails so she can bring her message to Washington this year. We're not going to lie; it won't always be smooth sailing, but we know with a strong grassroots community behind her, **this campaign is unstoppable.**

We don't know what 2022 has in store, but one thing is certain – Angela's commitment to better the lives of all Marylanders. Her fierce, unrelenting spirit is exactly the type of voice we need in Congress and the person we need to challenge Maryland's all-male Congressional delegation.

We've got a lot of work to do in the coming months, but together, we'll see it through to help Angela cross the finish line.

Thank you so much for supporting our campaign and the people of this district.

– The A-Team

| | | **ATTN: Your Republican Membership has EXPIRED**
For the last **2 years** , you have consistently stood by House Republicans’ side. You’ve supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we’ve seen, **but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to have to tell you that for the first time ever, you’ve failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There’s good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f89q-1wea5-4qqlpo3/ "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")**

**[Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustaining Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f89q-1wea6-4qqlpo4/ "Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustain Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away? ")**

---

We’re approaching the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections will be the toughest election we’ve seen yet, and we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

**The Democrats raised over $130 MILLION last year alone.** We’re already behind, but with your help, we can close the gap, and take back the Conservative Majority in Congress.

You only have until **[11:59 PM](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f89q-1wea9-4qqlpo7/ "11:59 PM")** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **[Renew before it’s too late>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f89q-1weaa-4qqlpo7/ "Renew before it’s too late >>>")**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don’t let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

| | URGENT: To flip Florida blue we MUST defeat Ron DeSantis and elect Charlie Crist this November!

**[We CANNOT let DeSantis use a second term as a stepping stone to the White House. Will you please pitch in anything you can right away to help Charlie win this race and Flip Florida BLUE on Election Day?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41393191/328608210/-663416480?refcode=20220203_f_2_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWFkYmFiNi0xOTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gfvHXCHfku4xYAUFlYQiLRPFFXTnNup6C8eFkBGid-0=)** | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41393192/328608211/-663416480?refcode=20220203_f_2_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWFkYmFiNi0xOTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gfvHXCHfku4xYAUFlYQiLRPFFXTnNup6C8eFkBGid-0=)

As Charlie has said, Ron DeSantis doesn’t care about people. He cares about securing the Republican nomination for president in 2024. While COVID-19 cases skyrocketed, Gov. DeSantis let a stockpile of 1 million COVID-19 tests expire.

DeSantis is soft on COVID and more concerned with restricting a woman’s right to choose and suppressing voting rights than he is with protecting Florida from the impending threat of climate change. **If he wins another term, things will only get worse — which is why we MUST elect Charlie this November!**

The good news is that _Insider Elections_ calls this race a **“battleground,”** and last time around, DeSantis only won by **less than half a point**. Victory is well within reach, but we need to keep building a winning grassroots movement to get the job done!

**That’s why we’re coming to you, friend. Ron DeSantis has far-right billionaires from out of state bankrolling his campaign, and we’re counting on YOU to help us fight back. Can we count on your support right now to help Charlie flip Florida BLUE?**

**[Please, if you can, pitch in any amount right now to help us keep building a winning grassroots campaign. Every amount, no matter how small, will add up to make a BIG difference and help Charlie DEFEAT Ron DeSantis this November.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41393193/328608212/-663416480?refcode=20220203_f_2_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWFkYmFiNi0xOTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gfvHXCHfku4xYAUFlYQiLRPFFXTnNup6C8eFkBGid-0=)**

Hi there, Charlie Crist here.

I wanted to write to say thank you for everything you’re doing to help defeat Ron DeSantis. Florida can’t afford another four years of his divisive politics in the governor’s office, and I appreciate your support in this race.

Whether we have a governor who will fight climate change, protect our communities from COVID, and defend our most precious constitutional rights will depend on the outcome of this election. Governor DeSantis wants to use the governor’s office to advance an extreme, far-right agenda that he thinks will help him win the Republican nomination for president, and we can’t let that happen.

But while he has out-of-state billionaires writing check after check to his campaign, I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to pitch in anything you can to help me fight back. **[If you can, please click here to make a donation to support my campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41393211/328608301/-663416480?refcode=20220203_f_2_ND&amount=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWFkYmFiNi0xOTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gfvHXCHfku4xYAUFlYQiLRPFFXTnNup6C8eFkBGid-0=)**

Thank you again for your support. By working together, I know we can win this race and finally start to build a Florida that works for ALL Floridians.

Like me, Shannon's dedicated her career to jobs, justice, and opportunity. After a successful career in broadcast news, she left to serve her community in a different way, working in the Mayor's Office to help people across Baltimore find jobs and recruiting mentors with Big Brothers, Big Sisters.

In 2014, Shannon graduated from Emerge Maryland – an organization that works to prepare Democratic women to run for public office. Two years later, she defeated a two-time incumbent for her seat on the Baltimore City Council and immediately went to work as a champion for working families – often with her young daughter, Rae, in tow. A battle-tested leader, Shannon proudly pushed for transparency in city government; spearheaded efforts to help victims of police brutality heal from trauma; fought to expand accommodations for working moms; and protected workers' rights.

**With your support, Shannon and I will continue to fight for jobs, justice, and equal opportunity in Annapolis.** We **will** make history as the first Latino and first Black woman elected to statewide office in Maryland's history. And we **will** flip this seat from red to blue for the first time in eight years.

**_[Help kick off our historic partnership and send experienced, tested leaders like Shannon and me to Annapolis to fight for Marylanders. Please, pitch in $7 or whatever you can today>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41393276/328608572/-954075203?refcode=BPI-em-null-null-null-20220203-LtGov1-ND&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTk4ODIyNS0xYTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UxlSjduB8BRJloZ236pwMTMbs5oZVo72ojGBI8JQkJA=)_**

Thank you,

Tom

If you haven’t already seen the news, we’re hitting the road and going on tour again to talk about how Democrats are delivering a better future for Hoosiers in every corner of our state. Between the American Rescue Plan and the Jobs Act, Democrats have delivered nearly 9 billion dollars dedicated to fixing Indiana’s infrastructure. name: Peter Franchot
subject: My plan to support women entrepreneurs
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
In addition to being one of Montgomery County’s most dynamic legislators, Delegate Pam Queen is also an associate professor at Morgan State University. Recently, she published an article in the Journal of Accounting and Finance about the impact on our economy when women are not fully employed or flourishing as entrepreneurs.
This is an issue that does not get enough attention. Breaking the persistent glass ceilings that prevent upward mobility for women is crucial for our state’s long-term economic growth. That’s why as Maryland’s next Governor, I’ll make sure the state pursues a policy of economic inclusion that empowers our women entrepreneurs and small minority-owned businesses with the resources they need to thrive and prosper.
Here’s what you need to know about my plan to support women entrepreneurs and small business owners:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/PamQueen_AccesstoCapital_FINAL_1200x1200.png]As part of my plan, I’ll improve access to capital for our women entrepreneurs and minority-owned businesses by depositing state capital into local community banks and credit unions that are geared towards lending to small businesses within the state. I’ll also explore a state-owned bank designed to ensure credit access for our minority and women-owned businesses. Taking these steps will go a long way towards ensuring that our women entrepreneurs have better access to the resources they need to grow their businesses.
For far too long, our leaders have prioritized big business at the expense of our small businesses that employ the majority of our state’s workers. That will change under my administration.
If you agree that Maryland needs to elect a Governor who will help empower women entrepreneurs, then will you spread the word about my plan by sharing with your friends on social media?
Click here to view and reshare on Facebook. [https://www.facebook.com/photo?fbid=495053615320038&set=a.422901372535263]
Click here to view and reshare on Twitter. [https://twitter.com/peterfranchot/status/1484587711000424458/photo/1]
Click here to view and reshare on Instagram. [https://www.instagram.com/p/CZAFu0asLN1/]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

| | Team, We’re in this fight because political leaders aren't acting with urgency to deliver the solutions working families need. Massachusetts caucuses begin this weekend, so we’re reaching directly to hear which issues matter most to you. We’re a grassroots movement, and that means making sure everyone’s voices are heard and included. [_**Will you take a moment to share which issues matter most to you? Click here to take the survey now.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41393803/328610856/187531525?refcode=em_20220203_s_s_caucus&ms=em_20220203_s_s_caucus&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2I1MjY5ZC0xYjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xq4msBAiuwkskhUKKay1h8pMLaNpKguJzkAqQLh73oo=&emci=77c1d242-1185-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=d3b5269d-1b85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=14684840) Sonia’s energized from the conversations she’s been having with folks across the Commonwealth about what matters most — and we want to continue hearing from as many people as possible. In order to deliver the urgent solutions folks need, we need to continue hearing from you about your priorities. name: Valerie Foushee
subject: Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/fI2gZfCuHSAVF49y4WODXuGFLmXA-x_SUwtgdgwxkTw=/ALWW1_VNZk4NX2QQIUofvfErCSwz8m369WFQbYB7-Kw=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220203-1-EM)
---
| Peter,

February marks the start of Black History Month. While this month serves as a time to reflect on and celebrate the contributions of the Black community, it also requires us to analyze how we have yet to fully recognize the promise of liberty and justice for all.

In my lifetime, I attended a segregated school, became the first Black woman elected to the Orange County Board of Commissioners, and now [_**I 'm running to be the first Black woman elected to represent North Carolina's 6th Congressional district.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/fI2gZfCuHSAVF49y4WODXuGFLmXA-x_SUwtgdgwxkTw=/ALWW1_VNZk4NX2QQIUofvfErCSwz8m369WFQbYB7-Kw=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220203-1-EM)

We still have so much work to do. From the attacks on diversity and equity in our schools to the intentional disenfranchisement of non-white voters through targeted voter suppression, it is clear that we need elected representatives who will always champion civil rights. I've always fought against systemic racism and when I get to Congress, I will prioritize legislation that brings equity to all communities.

That is why I am humbled and honored to be running for Congress. [_**Representation matters, and if you agree, please consider contributing to my campaign today.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/fI2gZfCuHSAVF49y4WODXuGFLmXA-x_SUwtgdgwxkTw=/ALWW1_VNZk4NX2QQIUofvfErCSwz8m369WFQbYB7-Kw=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220203-1-EM)

Thank you for all you do.

Best wishes,
---

[**Custom survey prepared for dpwillis67@gmail.com
Deadline: 11:59 PM**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41394457/328613710/1554656473?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmQyZDFjMS0xYzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aIAlJk1yPNjmhm9XFawGEdzO9THKAcH3AwMZuMWO8gI=&emci=dca680ed-4a84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=36d2d1c1-1c85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=18634996)

Team,

Last month, National Republicans blocked reforms that would have made it easier and safer for Americans to vote than ever before. This isn’t the first time the GOP has attempted to halt common-sense reforms to laws protecting the right to vote, _and it won’t be the last_.

**Today is the anniversary of the ratification of the 15th Amendment, and we want to hear from _you_.** Our opponents are working to undermine the vote in 2022 with tactics from gerrymandering to voter identification laws, and we want to know which issues you feel affect you most. name: John King
subject: This is what speaks to me, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
As a former social studies teacher, a parent, and a Black Marylander, Black History Month has a special significance in my life.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41394494/328613915/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220203-b1_fr_actives-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220203-b1_fr_actives-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=b1_fr_actives&&&&utm_content=JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_term=&&&&amount=25&refcode2=b875e9ec-1c85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODc1ZTllYy0xYzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0tmQyufjSA5VktdhzkdM8hZmYeu5pkLN-xdgFuqcnQ0=)
---
| Peter, As a former social studies teacher, a parent, and a Black Marylander, Black History Month has a special significance in my life. Black History Month reminds us to celebrate all year long our community’s past and the strength and beauty that Black Americans have exhibited. It also presents the opportunity to reflect on the truth of our nation’s history: both the injustices when our country has fallen short of the promise of equality and democracy and the significant progress we’ve made toward building a “more perfect union.” But, there’s still a lot of work left to do to continue that progress – and it’s going to take a shared commitment to building a more just and inclusive future to get us there. **I am confident that together, we can and we will achieve a more prosperous and more equitable Maryland.** I am proud of our shared history, and I look forward to sharing more of my own family’s story in the coming weeks — including the journey from being enslaved to becoming the U.S. Secretary of Education under the first Black president in just 3 generations. For now, I will leave you with my favorite poem by Langston Hughes: _**“I, too, am America.”**_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41394495/328613916/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220203-b1_fr_actives-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220203-b1_fr_actives-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=b1_fr_actives&&&&utm_content=JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_term=&&&&amount=25&refcode2=b875e9ec-1c85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODc1ZTllYy0xYzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0tmQyufjSA5VktdhzkdM8hZmYeu5pkLN-xdgFuqcnQ0=) Despite those who seek to erase the truth of our history, we are still here. **We, too, are America.** Thank you for your commitment to a more equitable future, John King
---

name: Gary Black
subject: Do you care about election integrity?

# **Friend — Do you care about protecting voter ID and keeping our elections secure? I know I do, but I’m not sure Herschel Walker does.**

---
Last week in Atlanta, Herschel said **_“QUIT COMPLAINING ABOUT VOTER INTEGRITY.”_** See for yourself. **Watch below.[And if you agree with me that voter ID and election integrity are issues worth caring about, donate now to help us win.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/7f40cc337a4408c7/d31003db5c1a0741c3d6b838967d376c/37793)**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/7f40cc337a4408c7/c51697cf63ec650fc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Raphael Warnock, Joe Biden, and the rest of the Democrats have already shown they’ll stop at nothing to cripple voter integrity... because it would mean total power for themselves. If we’re**** going to stop them, we _must_ elect a Senator who is a champion of voter ID and election integrity. **Clearly, that’s not Herschel Walker. **
I will ALWAYS stand in the gap for secure elections. [**I hope you’ll stand in that gap with me.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/7f40cc337a4408c7/985b09a050cde911c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/7f40cc337a4408c7/c4da9397cda0838dc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**DEFEND ELECTION INTEGRITY »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/7f40cc337a4408c7/101f2612421f3bb1c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/7f40cc337a4408c7/f165690e135aac34c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
_**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $23 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/7f40cc337a4408c7/0f3eafc45dc9f869c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=7f40cc337a4408c7&d=eabea5d13203cfb9c3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=7f40cc337a4408c7).
---

Athens, GA 30604

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z88io6c7nnp8sagtpq53m2f60r4o61vt640g9rco_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cji6co34cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq7d1heirr7d1hm9qj0tbi66qbcd1jm1rr3cdkmerj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onmccr34ohl6hi3cohi6momddlkc4qr9o9l6drj7dpie5j71cbhmhir8p3kcpob1puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4cr66aqb6phnmpgmccbgm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up—that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zqfd94som1e01h7b8pv3jsuim7p17ii25u770roo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cji6co34cth2bs) [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zs3cdjq0pud14782gvdc58nrnhncn2ql9sa15vm0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cji6co34cth2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z9ejbb7qtt9a5gp8f174htnothjed06s3jbf9ed8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cji6co34cth2bs) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zp5ampu5vjtn5j1jcc2efm4k7k77c9q5bjmagqu8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cji6co34cth2bs) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2021 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

For the last **2 years** , you have consistently stood by House Republicans’ side. You’ve supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we’ve seen, **but we have bad news for you.**

**It pains me to have to tell you that for the first time ever, you’ve failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There’s good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f8qb-1wera-4qqlpo5/ "11:59 PM TONIGHT")**.

**[Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustain Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f8qb-1werb-4qqlpo6/ "Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustain Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away?")**

We’re approaching the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections will be the toughest election we’ve seen yet, and we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

**The Democrats raised over $130 MILLION last year alone.** We’re already behind, but with your help, we can close the gap, and take back the Conservative Majority in Congress.

You only have until **[11:59 PM](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f8qb-1were-4qqlpo9/ "11:59 PM")** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **[Renew before it’s too late>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f8qb-1werf-4qqlpo0/ "Renew before it’s too late >>>")**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don’t let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**X** Defended Jan. 6 Insurrectionists [Scott Franklin's extreme MAGA positions DO NOT represent Florida's 15th district. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41395462/328618287/-451217501?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220203_FR_WORSTMAGA_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzkzMzljZi0yMTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AxuhSO3SyJuwzXDo-ga2JuX_pjyCUuCy5iE_6Hclmk0=)

That's why this race to flip FL-15 is so important. We have an incredible opportunity to defeat one of the most conservative MAGA politicians and elect a people's champion like Eddie Geller.

[Because unlike Rep. body:
I know I’ve emailed you a lot, but this is urgent. Let me explain why we can’t wait to fix our nations’ crumbling infrastructure. | | |

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41395488/328618369/-2096412469?refcode=xxxxxxxx_em_fr_x_template_x&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmU1OTQwOS0yMjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q8u2NhlzYcT2-viXL8zeYt_46dlWgS-PqhkNVUKfVWc=)

| Listen – I know I’ve emailed you a lot, but this is urgent. Let me explain why we can’t wait to fix our nations’ crumbling infrastructure. [**You probably see it everyday in Cresco: from potholes on your drive to work, to damaged sidewalks on a walk around your neighborhood.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41395489/328618370/-2096412469?refcode=20220203_em_fr_b1_infrastructure_30op&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmU1OTQwOS0yMjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q8u2NhlzYcT2-viXL8zeYt_46dlWgS-PqhkNVUKfVWc=) These issues may seem mundane, and the level of urgency may ring hollow, but this is just the tip of the iceberg. __The longer we wait to fix our infrastructure, the more dangerous it becomes.__ [**The potential for devastating consequences hit close to home for me last week in Pittsburgh, when the bridge that my family and I use everyday collapsed into a ravine 450 feet below.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41395490/328618371/-2096412469?refcode=20220203_em_fr_b1_infrastructure_30op&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmU1OTQwOS0yMjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q8u2NhlzYcT2-viXL8zeYt_46dlWgS-PqhkNVUKfVWc=) Although there was no loss of life, _ten people were injured,_ showing us the life-threatening toll our crumbling infrastructure could potentially have. And in a city with over 400 bridges, our community shouldn’t live in fear of another collapse. Without urgent action, we’re risking total catastrophe. [**I’m running for Congress in PA-18 because we need leaders who won’t wait to fix our crumbling infrastructure. I can’t afford to miss a single fundraising goal, but I’m still $1,923 short of today’s goal._So I’m asking: can I count on you to chip in $27 and help me win this race?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41395491/328618372/-2096412469?refcode=20220203_em_fr_b1_infrastructure_30op&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmU1OTQwOS0yMjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q8u2NhlzYcT2-viXL8zeYt_46dlWgS-PqhkNVUKfVWc=) | | | [Donate $15 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41395492/328618373/-2096412469?refcode=20220203_em_fr_b1_infrastructure_30op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmU1OTQwOS0yMjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q8u2NhlzYcT2-viXL8zeYt_46dlWgS-PqhkNVUKfVWc=)

name: Trish Gunby
subject: I'm already doing Rep. Wagner's job...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trish Gunby for Congress [unsubscribe](https://email

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41395586/328619048/368400405?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzBlZWQxMi0yMzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YXWa3blc6_9VQ8TH_Qiz4Kwi7c3fMrZPw5QwkMlOd-s=&emci=ab436567-1f85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=fc0eed12-2385-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=14943357) Peter, For the past two years, I've answered countless calls from residents who can't reach Ann Wagner's office, or leave messages and never hear back. **During a global pandemic, thousands of constituents of Ann Wagner cannot even reach her to voice a concern, ask for help, or let her know where they stand on urgent issues that she will vote on in Congress. ** I'd say we're going to flip this seat, but it appears I'm already doing the Congresswoman's job. name: Derek Marshall
subject: It’s time for racial justice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
**Black History Month is important for so many reasons, but recently I’ve been reflecting on how timely it is this year. **
After a 2020 filled with worldwide protests against police brutality that started right here in America, and a 2021 where we saw major voting rights legislation stalled, our work for racial justice feels more urgent than ever.
**It is our duty to look out for one another, to practice true solidarity and build a better world together. **
That means considering the systemic toll of racism that Black Americans face. **It also means following the advice of many Black leaders, activists, and thinkers with the policies we promote.**
Most progressive policies that are popular today can be traced back to Black organizers. The Black Panthers supported free K-12 education and laid the groundwork for our present-day movement for free college. The Civil Rights Movement created equal voting rights as we know them today. And Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. regularly championed a living wage for all.
**[Every policy that’s part of my platform contributes to racial justice, because we must build a future that is more equitable. You can read about them here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41395720/328620409/-324758284?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTgzMzQ3ZS0yMzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WWrqGMtwclePf4cYVXft_IF0siVzAoKa4Ix_eVe-Wbw=&emci=29929ca6-1e85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=b983347e-2385-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=21617867) **
Housing justice, environmental and climate justice, gender equality, LGBTQ+ rights, healthcare, canceling student debt, infrastructure, public transit, COVID relief: every single one addresses the impacts of racism across society.
**I’m committed to a better version of this country, one where we experience true equality and support each other across our differences.**
That future can only be achieved when we center and uplift Black voices. **This month and every month, we honor Black history, but also listen to Black Americans who are speaking and organizing and leading now. **
Together, I believe we will win that better future.

In solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23
* * *

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41395721/328620410/-370388119?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTgzMzQ3ZS0yMzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WWrqGMtwclePf4cYVXft_IF0siVzAoKa4Ix_eVe-Wbw=&emci=29929ca6-1e85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=b983347e-2385-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=21617867) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41395722/328620411/1746218842?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTgzMzQ3ZS0yMzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WWrqGMtwclePf4cYVXft_IF0siVzAoKa4Ix_eVe-Wbw=&emci=29929ca6-1e85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=b983347e-2385-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=21617867) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41395724/328620412/1746222677?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTgzMzQ3ZS0yMzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WWrqGMtwclePf4cYVXft_IF0siVzAoKa4Ix_eVe-Wbw=&emci=29929ca6-1e85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=b983347e-2385-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=21617867)

name: Donna Imam
subject: Last weekend I was shocked to hear
body:
While I was canvassing over the weekend, I was shocked. Here’s what happened. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41395778/328620499/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTgzMzQ3ZS0yMzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uH83q_YD3Ofmz1w0GUXM36Bb2ec6MNl4mTY3oBjJsrY=)
Friend — Our campaign knows that winning Texas will be hard, but we also know it can be absolutely done! It will take work on the ground, but we will prevail. That’s why I spend time knocking doors, talking to voters alongside campaign volunteers. I believe it’s important for leaders to listen to their community and to connect with individual voters. It’s something I have been doing for years as a volunteer in Austin, Texas. **[We need your help Friend. We are less than 2 weeks from the start of early voting and we need to reach more people. Can you donate your first $5 or $10 to help us hire more organizers and print more fliers for canvassing? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41395780/328620500/-780221392?amount=10&refcode=pl_20200203_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTgzMzQ3ZS0yMzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uH83q_YD3Ofmz1w0GUXM36Bb2ec6MNl4mTY3oBjJsrY=)** Even though I expected voters to be less aware of midterm elections, this past weekend, I was shocked to discover that _most people were unaware_ that a primary election was coming up in days. **For decades, Austin has been represented by 5 extreme GOP members in Congress in severely gerrymandered red districts. In many midterms, we never had a Democratic primary to even vote in. It will take work on the ground, but we will prevail. That’s why I spend time knocking doors, talking to voters alongside campaign volunteers. I believe it’s important for leaders to listen to their community and to connect with individual voters. It’s something I have been doing for years as a volunteer in Austin, Texas. = Even though I expected voters to be less aware of midterm elections, this past weekend, I was shocked to discover that most people were unaware that a primary election was coming up in days. For decades, Austin has been represented by 5 extreme GOP members in Congress in severely gerrymandered red districts. In many midterms, we never had a Democratic primary to even vote in. This is exactly why talking to voters is so important in these final weeks. name: Kat Cammack
subject: I will always back the Blue. Do you?
body:
Violent crime is gripping our cities and communities with skyrocketing homicides and attacks on our nation’s officers.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oewb2_sKIVsiOWi62N1iRULkRKaDprT3CrzQaJ4xA_VAFoAzY2Q-Z9ntWNQGFPjN1AAvLOC77KTtSTfDx_reo93QtmA3A4j4Es-X4X-DAcXjsejzUAtXO-OAJ7gaNIsUzXmZFJEGZfK1XnBw1CRAoUEQFbJSRtG1KQ7sx_k1uZPofBx1bH-8VivUdS94r967&c=GHj9q6bvHj-imQ1kxeAmDsEBtOtI3N-iCOQwaTW56csO0ZWsWrOrLQ==&ch=DXRF6nDMJlYieEX4x_o5Fl06dcfEWPL8C4nj3nvouI5ggMk8aN5txg==)
---
| Friend,
Violent crime is gripping our cities and communities with skyrocketing homicides and attacks on our nation's officers. However, the Left doesn't seem to notice or care.
It's easy for liberal elites to talk about community safety when chauffeured around in an armored Cadillac Escalade, but the reality isn't pretty for everyday Americans. Crime is out of control, law enforcement is retiring at record rates, and the Radical Left is wearing blinders.
I'm not blind to the reality of the state of safety in America and I know you aren't either. Which is why I'm here to ask: [will you sign my petition showing that you back the Blue?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oewb2_sKIVsiOWi62N1iRULkRKaDprT3CrzQaJ4xA_VAFoAzY2Q-Z9ntWNQGFPjN1AAvLOC77KTtSTfDx_reo93QtmA3A4j4Es-X4X-DAcXjsejzUAtXO-OAJ7gaNIsUzXmZFJEGZfK1XnBw1CRAoUEQFbJSRtG1KQ7sx_k1uZPofBx1bH-8VivUdS94r967&c=GHj9q6bvHj-imQ1kxeAmDsEBtOtI3N-iCOQwaTW56csO0ZWsWrOrLQ==&ch=DXRF6nDMJlYieEX4x_o5Fl06dcfEWPL8C4nj3nvouI5ggMk8aN5txg==)
---
| | | [SIGN THE PETITION HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oewb2_sKIVsiOWi62N1iRULkRKaDprT3CrzQaJ4xA_VAFoAzY2Q-Z9ntWNQGFPjN1AAvLOC77KTtSTfDx_reo93QtmA3A4j4Es-X4X-DAcXjsejzUAtXO-OAJ7gaNIsUzXmZFJEGZfK1XnBw1CRAoUEQFbJSRtG1KQ7sx_k1uZPofBx1bH-8VivUdS94r967&c=GHj9q6bvHj-imQ1kxeAmDsEBtOtI3N-iCOQwaTW56csO0ZWsWrOrLQ==&ch=DXRF6nDMJlYieEX4x_o5Fl06dcfEWPL8C4nj3nvouI5ggMk8aN5txg==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oewb2_sKIVsiOWi62N1iRULkRKaDprT3CrzQaJ4xA_VAFoAzY2Q-Z9ntWNQGFPjN1AAvLOC77KTtSTfDx_reo93QtmA3A4j4Es-X4X-DAcXjsejzUAtXO-OAJ7gaNIsUzXmZFJEGZfK1XnBw1CRAoUEQFbJSRtG1KQ7sx_k1uZPofBx1bH-8VivUdS94r967&c=GHj9q6bvHj-imQ1kxeAmDsEBtOtI3N-iCOQwaTW56csO0ZWsWrOrLQ==&ch=DXRF6nDMJlYieEX4x_o5Fl06dcfEWPL8C4nj3nvouI5ggMk8aN5txg==)
---
| The safety of our nation has been compromised thanks to the Left's obnoxious, nonsense push for slashing police budgets.
America's rising crime rates to chaos, crime, and corruption is Socialism. I don't care what Biden or his party says, our officers are the Thin Blue Line that protects America. Here in Florida, we will always value and promote the well-being of the men and women who selflessly protect us every day.
We can't let Biden and the Left continue America down the path of lawless crime. We must stand up and show them that we have had enough of their pro-crime agenda. [Will you take a stand with me and sign the petition showing that you Back the Blue?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oewb2_sKIVsiOWi62N1iRULkRKaDprT3CrzQaJ4xA_VAFoAzY2Q-Z9ntWNQGFPjN1AAvLOC77KTtSTfDx_reo93QtmA3A4j4Es-X4X-DAcXjsejzUAtXO-OAJ7gaNIsUzXmZFJEGZfK1XnBw1CRAoUEQFbJSRtG1KQ7sx_k1uZPofBx1bH-8VivUdS94r967&c=GHj9q6bvHj-imQ1kxeAmDsEBtOtI3N-iCOQwaTW56csO0ZWsWrOrLQ==&ch=DXRF6nDMJlYieEX4x_o5Fl06dcfEWPL8C4nj3nvouI5ggMk8aN5txg==)
---
| | | [BACK THE BLUE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oewb2_sKIVsiOWi62N1iRULkRKaDprT3CrzQaJ4xA_VAFoAzY2Q-Z9ntWNQGFPjN1AAvLOC77KTtSTfDx_reo93QtmA3A4j4Es-X4X-DAcXjsejzUAtXO-OAJ7gaNIsUzXmZFJEGZfK1XnBw1CRAoUEQFbJSRtG1KQ7sx_k1uZPofBx1bH-8VivUdS94r967&c=GHj9q6bvHj-imQ1kxeAmDsEBtOtI3N-iCOQwaTW56csO0ZWsWrOrLQ==&ch=DXRF6nDMJlYieEX4x_o5Fl06dcfEWPL8C4nj3nvouI5ggMk8aN5txg==)

clean_body: Violent crime is gripping our cities and communities with skyrocketing homicides and attacks on our nation’s officers. | | | | | | == | Friend, Violent crime is gripping our cities and communities with skyrocketing homicides and attacks on our nation's officers. However, the Left doesn't seem to notice or care. It's easy for liberal elites to talk about community safety when chauffeured around in an armored Cadillac Escalade, but the reality isn't pretty for everyday Americans. Crime is out of control, law enforcement is retiring at record rates, and the Radical Left is wearing blinders. I'm not blind to the reality of the state of safety in America and I know you aren't either. Which is why I'm here to ask: == | | | == | == | The safety of our nation has been compromised thanks to the Left's obnoxious, nonsense push for slashing police budgets. America's rising crime rates to chaos, crime, and corruption is Socialism. I don't care what Biden or his party says, our officers are the Thin Blue Line that protects America. Here in Florida, we will always value and promote the well-being of the men and women who selflessly protect us every day. We can't let Biden and the Left continue America down the path of lawless crime. We must stand up and show them that we have had enough of their pro-crime agenda. == | | | == | Thanks for joining the fight, | == | Kat Cammack | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

name: Wes Moore
subject: Help celebrate my mom’s birthday
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41396234/328621922/-1531988014?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220203mom_wm_60da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjViYWJlNC0yMzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jwi-cSRtDZSdtSzlU87XZW3e-7l2JbJ4DzpTRkXt4wM=)

Friends, Anyone who knows me knows how much I love and cherish my mom. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41396236/328621924/1224563550?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220203mom_wm_60da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjViYWJlNC0yMzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jwi-cSRtDZSdtSzlU87XZW3e-7l2JbJ4DzpTRkXt4wM=&emci=0bfe24c6-2185-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=5b5babe4-2385-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=24635485)
---
Despite the shocking and heartbreaking tragedy of losing my dad so early on, my mom raised my sisters and I, doing everything in her power to give us the opportunity to achieve our dreams.
She believed in me before I believed in me, and I wouldn’t be where I am today — a Rhodes Scholar, combat veteran, former CEO of a national nonprofit, and candidate for governor — if it wasn’t for her love and support along the way.
Everything I am, I am because of her. She embodies strength, selflessness, and love, and I’m forever blessed by all she has given me, and the lessons she has taught me.
**We’re celebrating my mom’s birthday this week, and I want to surprise her with a card with as many signatures as possible to show how much she’s loved and appreciated.**
**[Will you add your name to my mom’s birthday card today? I know she’ll be thrilled when I show it to her this weekend.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41396242/328621926/1224563550?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220203mom_wm_60da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjViYWJlNC0yMzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jwi-cSRtDZSdtSzlU87XZW3e-7l2JbJ4DzpTRkXt4wM=&emci=0bfe24c6-2185-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=5b5babe4-2385-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=24635485)**

Thanks for helping me show my mom some much-deserved love during her special week!
Elevate,
Wes

name: Team Nan
subject: It’s official
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
Nan’s ready to fight for us

With yesterday’s filing behind us it’s official, team: **Nan is running for governor of Ohio.**
From the beginning, Nan’s made her commitment to Ohio her top priority. She’s never been afraid of tough problems, and she’s not about to start now.
And the truth is, we’re facing a lot of them — a child care crisis that has forced too many parents out of the workforce, an economy that isn't working for everyone, ongoing corruption in Columbus — and an ongoing pandemic.
**Nan is running because she knows Ohio can do better.** By tackling our problems head on, we can create a better future for all – and that starts _right now._
But Republicans aren’t going to make this race easy. Mike DeWine and his special-interest backers are already gearing up for a fight, and we have to be ready.
**[There’s never been a better time to pitch in, so please: If you can, donate $5 to become an Official Filing Donor>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41396154/328621396/407763255?refcode=nw_em_220203_1_t2_a&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjlmYTJiYi0yMzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NFgNE4cBPOqsW8rJh9XUnZeI6o8tJ6xa2kGZkQkVNtw=)**
Thank you,
Team Nan

name: Delina DiSanto
subject: MAJOR Breaking News: It's a** kicking time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Delina DiSanto for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41396465/328623163/-1092009436?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzc4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjdhZWYzMC0yNDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZgDAL95Ee5yifkyhIl083Tyso5ni73iUWXUm5RUsq4Q=&emci=4e531168-f682-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=5f7aef30-2485-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=29183203) Hi Friend, **Today, I'm officially announcing that I'll be running for the Democratic nomination in Arizona's 1st Congressional district against Republican David Schweikert.** When I first decided to run for Congress, I was ready to unseat Paul Gosar, who is – _in no uncertain terms_ – an election-denying, insurrection-embracing, Proud-Boy-coddling extremist. _However_ , under Arizona's new Congressional map, my home is now firmly in AZ-01... which means I'll be running against David Schweikert. While Schweikert gets less media attention for his extremism, his voting record is __nearly identical__ to Gosar's. That's a BIG problem for me and the community that I've proudly called home for the last 18 years. [**Will you help me take on Schweikert and stand up to the far-right extremism that's plaguing our country? Even a $5 donation helps me out!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41396466/328623170/188571406?refcode=X_020322_AZ-01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzc4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjdhZWYzMC0yNDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZgDAL95Ee5yifkyhIl083Tyso5ni73iUWXUm5RUsq4Q=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41396467/328623177/188571406?refcode=X_020322_AZ-01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzc4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjdhZWYzMC0yNDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZgDAL95Ee5yifkyhIl083Tyso5ni73iUWXUm5RUsq4Q=) As a registered nurse, I understand the struggle that many Americans face on a daily basis. That's why, as AZ-01's next Representative, I will focus on key issues like fighting for healthcare everyone can afford, tackling climate change, and protecting women's reproductive rights. Now, to keep advocating for working families in Arizona, I need your help. [**Can I count on you to chip in whatever you can today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41396468/328623182/188571406?refcode=X_020322_AZ-01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzc4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjdhZWYzMC0yNDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZgDAL95Ee5yifkyhIl083Tyso5ni73iUWXUm5RUsq4Q=) clean_body: Hi Friend, Today, I'm officially announcing that I'll be running for the Democratic nomination in Arizona's 1st Congressional district against Republican David Schweikert. When I first decided to run for Congress, I was ready to unseat Paul Gosar, who is – in no uncertain terms – an election-denying, insurrection-embracing, Proud-Boy-coddling extremist. However , under Arizona's new Congressional map, my home is now firmly in AZ-01... which means I'll be running against David Schweikert. While Schweikert gets less media attention for his extremism, his voting record is nearly identical to Gosar's. That's a BIG problem for me and the community that I've proudly called home for the last 18 years. = = As a registered nurse, I understand the struggle that many Americans face on a daily basis. That's why, as AZ-01's next Representative, I will focus on key issues like fighting for healthcare everyone can afford, tackling climate change, and protecting women's reproductive rights. Now, to keep advocating for working families in Arizona, I need your help. = = = = = = = = Thank you, – Delina | | Paid for by Delina DiSanto for Congress Delina DiSanto for Congress PO Box 4809 Cave Creek, AZ 85327 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Peter,

Imagine the progressive Democrats’ worst nightmare:

A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022.

[**SUPPORT APRIL TODAY -> **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=5560dd7fbeef47b7bfce7bb13f59c738&_e=oriyzIVEaiR4AObi1XSTCW9kO111uEt-Ztk-Yspivdh60olvER6uSc9HXNXzy2HDj2C-cGaL6jVEXzRkJ9QBIy92rt3Q8nurJf6Fz_iux7Rmnt1Lb0-k63f0BqKf1hQVPpHkVh6ljYFPvkV17sweCzm18TYV0_8pVOvTPvkyu78AatpAJ_n6DvB5YkHfxfVT7vaMZgEAaCAmiltB4ur3NiGUlYjPFqBJYqrXsju9Gz7ALoq1MCUwZSOCSOS4mrE6HfVJIzu_aluxgAoIf509SM2gZlMmf_rsNtRipbs_EFaaYHFPMNg1IETv5iRW_9dNlu9dw6DbKGn39oX3vYMjzGgh1Xqp9CgKANElwPV6SLWuwm-w7kgM1xDezkWz3VLY050jelKoESH8IilZcPtGrUDbr8pZaAsWcT7X3LMoqyoxFOk0-jl_7XIouZfj8jDpSyWjT5uChYIVYd8R4UYdUQ%3D%3D)
I am running for Congress in one of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s target districts, Nevada-03, where I am taking on a little-known Democrat with no accomplishments to speak of -- other than voting with Pelosi 99% of the time. Honestly, this could be the sleeper race that finally forces Nancy Pelosi to put her Washington D.C. penthouse on the market, having lost the House majority for the last time in her career.

**[Peter, I am under no illusions that you’re going to back my campaign the first time you hear from me, so I’m willing to work for your support. Today I’d like to explain to you why I’m emailing and why my campaign for Congress is worth investing in.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=5560dd7fbeef47b7bfce7bb13f59c738&_e=oriyzIVEaiR4AObi1XSTCW9kO111uEt-Ztk-Yspivdh60olvER6uSc9HXNXzy2HDj2C-cGaL6jVEXzRkJ9QBIy92rt3Q8nurJf6Fz_iux7Rmnt1Lb0-k63f0BqKf1hQVPpHkVh6ljYFPvkV17sweCzm18TYV0_8pVOvTPvkyu78AatpAJ_n6DvB5YkHfxfVT7vaMZgEAaCAmiltB4ur3NiGUlYjPFqBJYqrXsju9Gz7ALoq1MCUwZSOCSOS4mrE6oQnEr0e6Rh2aJVmUS6Dg0s7wlwzXjDz_SYIyWaBbAHJ7zqyPNdVYWYDY5OCtavn2P3Nk-ZZD2xcGAP7lgXyZlDG9YNl53f3cILRjhF8j9EbNBJgB36F5LzGizl9LNz0-y9N7X1PJ0eyJ4TBpJUdUqaU_6dhTV0QySewVahMr4ZuRI9k_NOArT3jYVYFawNeU69VHl1ZCCuZ8mbmUmq7oxA%3D%3D)**

With three children, I worked to pay my own way through college, and then law school.**When I wasn’t packing lunches and sitting in school pick-up lines, I was a practicing attorney, building a business, fighting for the underdog, and taking on tough cases.** I am proud to be a working mom. Now I want to take that same drive and attitude to Congress.

I’m the type of person who outworks everyone in the room and exceeds expectations. My plan is to take down one of Pelosi’s most trusted partners before she even knows she’s in trouble. My hope is that by the time she finds out, I’ll have such a groundswell of grassroots support that it will simply be too late.

**[Peter, I have taken on tougher battles than this in the courtroom and that’s how I know I am going to need every grassroots conservative across the nation with me to flip this critical House seat.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=5560dd7fbeef47b7bfce7bb13f59c738&_e=oriyzIVEaiR4AObi1XSTCW9kO111uEt-Ztk-Yspivdh60olvER6uSc9HXNXzy2HDj2C-cGaL6jVEXzRkJ9QBIy92rt3Q8nurJf6Fz_iux7Rmnt1Lb0-k63f0BqKf1hQVPpHkVh6ljYFPvkV17sweCzm18TYV0_8pVOvTPvkyu78AatpAJ_n6DvB5YkHfxfVT7vaMZgEAaCAmiltB4ur3NiGUlYjPFqBJYqrXsju9Gz7ALoq1MCUwZSOCSOS4mrE6tdIJIMRAJ3xKPKTA0rl4mKFslFFmNp8QfwyMQwoeD7UzGif8SqypcA8urnV2pn_8vrbrPQas8H8HTVOys8X3tPLO_nV9bQ3qklnwIpZBETaPPKDQ_do8PuACPq0WU78g15z-_Xg0iH4LhMAribBiAd0l8HEG5gHhxrQ2vLy-0uSNCx05D3KWDAa1H4VN495X5c9pb5-3a940slwv5C9y0Q%3D%3D)**

**[I know you don’t know me but take a moment to look up my district. Do some research, and if you’re inclined afterward, please consider a donation of $10 to help me flip this seat RED.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=5560dd7fbeef47b7bfce7bb13f59c738&_e=oriyzIVEaiR4AObi1XSTCW9kO111uEt-Ztk-Yspivdh60olvER6uSc9HXNXzy2HDj2C-cGaL6jVEXzRkJ9QBIy92rt3Q8nurJf6Fz_iux7Rmnt1Lb0-k63f0BqKf1hQVPpHkVh6ljYFPvkV17sweCzm18TYV0_8pVOvTPvkyu78AatpAJ_n6DvB5YkHfxfVT7vaMZgEAaCAmiltB4ur3NiGUlYjPFqBJYqrXsju9Gz7ALoq1MCUwZSOCSOS4mrE6ayzNeNiuspCwpitOCkfRzb97wItQ-xkGD_nfDCBSYx0sTwmajCDrrnuqhGuUm2uuCI4iyZiBs1Rk5-9MVRyA9hGSLJ07Gwksw4kkQRHWSlREC2TJCwI2xQBxGByAV0idiY7UpgroRkMRhTp-TwVobbkYnqZR5fr1EjZw83iqNGsrDoQ1hE1wMWyASapMmXRo8fgC-lOdmi27nyvv8S0j8w%3D%3D)**

Last election, we saw more women elected to Congress than we ever have before -- and 31 of them were Conservative Republicans! We are the antithesis of what progressive Democrats want women to be, and we hold the power to take back the House in the Midterm Election.

Thank you,
