clean_body: Nancy Pelosi's worst nightmare A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022. | Peter, Imagine the progressive Democrats’ worst nightmare: A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022. I am running for Congress in one of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s target districts, Nevada-03, where I am taking on a little-known Democrat with no accomplishments to speak of -- other than voting with Pelosi 99% of the time. Honestly, this could be the sleeper race that finally forces Nancy Pelosi to put her Washington D.C. penthouse on the market, having lost the House majority for the last time in her career. With three children, I worked to pay my own way through college, and then law school.When I wasn’t packing lunches and sitting in school pick-up lines, I was a practicing attorney, building a business, fighting for the underdog, and taking on tough cases. I am proud to be a working mom. Now I want to take that same drive and attitude to Congress. I’m the type of person who outworks everyone in the room and exceeds expectations. My plan is to take down one of Pelosi’s most trusted partners before she even knows she’s in trouble. My hope is that by the time she finds out, I’ll have such a groundswell of grassroots support that it will simply be too late. Last election, we saw more women elected to Congress than we ever have before -- and 31 of them were Conservative Republicans! We are the antithesis of what progressive Democrats want women to be, and we hold the power to take back the House in the Midterm Election. Thank you, April Becker Republican for Congress (NV-03) P.S. If you’re a proud Republican woman, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. And if you’re a proud Republican man, | April Becker is a true Nevada success story. As a working mom with young children, April put herself through college and law school at UNLV. name: James Carville Alert
subject: I'm counting on you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Val Demings can't cede any ground
| | |
---
**Listen up, friend!**
Congresswoman Val Demings is down 2 points in her race to defeat Marco Rubio. It's one of the hottest Senate races in the country – and I have zero doubt in my mind that Val Demings can win this. But Val Demings can ONLY win if activists like YOU dig deep and support her every step of the way.
So here's what I'm dropping in to tell you: Flipping Florida blue can decide our Democratic Senate majority. And CNN is calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip in November – but Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 percent (that's only 10,033 votes).
That's why moments like this can make or break a campaign. That's especially true when she's up against a right-wing incumbent like Marco Rubio, who is already sitting on a multimillion-dollar war chest and has the full GOP establishment behind him. **So I committed to helping Val Demings raise $10,000 before her upcoming midnight deadline, and I'm counting on your contribution to get us there, friend: **
**[Will you rush $5 or more now to help Val Demings defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41396647/328623868/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2342-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzdhZWYzMC0yNDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GFwYJcaDb0l9rsLRfIv5pXmxeEFAv8C8o4rD3Ub4DZs=)**
From the White House to the campaign trail, I've seen it all. More than most. I've seen what it takes to win, and I've seen what happens when campaigns fail to muster enough grassroots momentum. I'm told Val Demings has one of the strongest grassroots teams in Democratic politics – and trust me, I was relieved to hear it.
Because you know what we're up against, friend? Marco Rubio's campaign war chest. Mitch McConnell's super PAC that can spend near limitless sums of money. And you'd better believe Donald Trump – who has made Florida the de facto HQ for the GOP – will rally his base and spend millions to protect his crony, Rubio.
That's why we need Val Demings. She's gone toe-to-toe with some of the most extreme Republicans. She impeached Donald Trump and prosecuted him in the Senate. She's a fighter for Floridians, and she has everything it takes to win. Best of all, there's momentum behind her in this race. **But a fundraising shortfall will put her dangerously behind where she needs to be.**
**So if you truly want Val Demings in the Senate, if you truly want to flip Florida blue and oust Marco Rubio, then I need you to give, because she can't cede any ground:[Make a contribution of $5 or more now – every dollar you can spare before tonight's deadline – to elect Val Demings and expand Democrats' Senate Majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41396648/328623869/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2342-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzdhZWYzMC0yNDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GFwYJcaDb0l9rsLRfIv5pXmxeEFAv8C8o4rD3Ub4DZs=)**

clean_body: Val Demings can't cede any ground | | | Listen up, friend! Congresswoman Val Demings is down 2 points in her race to defeat Marco Rubio. It's one of the hottest Senate races in the country – and I have zero doubt in my mind that Val Demings can win this. But Val Demings can ONLY win if activists like YOU dig deep and support her every step of the way. So here's what I'm dropping in to tell you: Flipping Florida blue can decide our Democratic Senate majority. And CNN is calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip in November – but Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 percent (that's only 10,033 votes). That's why moments like this can make or break a campaign. That's especially true when she's up against a right-wing incumbent like Marco Rubio, who is already sitting on a multimillion-dollar war chest and has the full GOP establishment behind him. So I committed to helping Val Demings raise $10,000 before her upcoming midnight deadline, and I'm counting on your contribution to get us there, friend: = From the White House to the campaign trail, I've seen it all. More than most. I've seen what it takes to win, and I've seen what happens when campaigns fail to muster enough grassroots momentum. I'm told Val Demings has one of the strongest grassroots teams in Democratic politics – and trust me, I was relieved to hear it. Because you know what we're up against, friend? Marco Rubio's campaign war chest. Mitch McConnell's super PAC that can spend near limitless sums of money. And you'd better believe Donald Trump – who has made Florida the de facto HQ for the GOP – will rally his base and spend millions to protect his crony, Rubio. That's why we need Val Demings. She's gone toe-to-toe with some of the most extreme Republicans. She impeached Donald Trump and prosecuted him in the Senate. She's a fighter for Floridians, and she has everything it takes to win. Best of all, there's momentum behind her in this race. But a fundraising shortfall will put her dangerously behind where she needs to be. So if you truly want Val Demings in the Senate, if you truly want to flip Florida blue and oust Marco Rubio, then I need you to give, because she can't cede any ground:= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for stepping up. James Carville | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic. = If you’re reading from your phone, to automatically sign up for my SMS team._ By providing your mobile phone number you consent to receive recurring updates from Val Demings for U.S. Senate, including by automated text message. body:
Devin Nunes just announced: &n; bsp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3f9a9--fgxr-4qqlpo3&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

In his first, exclusive interview since leaving Congress and joining President Trump’s new company, Devin Nunes just shared a MAJOR update about his new project with Trump. Every Conservative needs to hear this:
_“It is going to be a company open to all Americans... It is going to be the freest platform,” Devin Nunes said. _
Devin Nunes was one of the FIRST to be shadow-banned from Twitter. President Trump was banned from Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, AND Snapchat. Now, they teamed up to make sure it doesn’t happen to YOU.
**They're taking on Big Tech by launching their official app in just a few weeks from right now.**
They promised:
\-- No woke algorithms
\-- No shadow bans
\-- No Conservative censorship
Before the app officially launches, we need your response to one critical question:
[**President Trump and Devin Nunes are taking on the fight against Big Tech. Will you join them?**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f9a9-1wfm3-4qqlpo9/)
******[YES: I STAND WITH TRUMP](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f9a9-1wfm4-4qqlpo0/)**
******[NO: I DON'T STAND WITH TRUMP](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f9a9-1wfm5-4qqlpo1/)**

Thank you,

name: Paxton's Patriots
subject: Biden's Border Failures Pile Up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ken Paxton Campaign
body:
Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 3, 2022

|
---
**Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 3, 2022**

**Paxton's Patriots Suggested Social Media Post With Clip to Share: **

**Post:** What Joe Biden needs to do to fix his border crisis is simple – follow federal law. Texas needs more resources to do the job of securing our border. It's time for the federal government to step up and do its job. Ken Paxton will fight to secure our border.

**Link: **[https://video.foxnews.com/v/6294718914001#sp=show-clips](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=6e634abc7c174384badaee16a1b53806&_e=7R5uVSBbjD675UK0gNxSD891H0nYGMe7-82_IwhKGoHs5YagvtN8auprKlNeGaSyuyputJbkufKml6-qlrsnb8_Wdg9Nvd80elSGs6tMuYWAirWEtvPv5brKSdPKVJPhdrgz52NldWfMSc87euoG7bEIf4JXkaHnZDfYqj3PM2-T-neVkYzapgwkgdc0siwW3kIUiTO-sa_-qtvz4Jf_ETGcMqxxTxw0fsIVpEyqx5uQ3xgJ9EypMSY8KWNjdSWm5-rd9OHTecTK6k8NX3XraYSHU8PGesxjF8FNUs3fmveQjr5t50VSK6aB2uf-Kt28)

**Theme of the Day: Biden's Border Failures Pile Up**

As the Biden administration pushes their lawless agenda that has resulted in dire consequences for Texas, Ken Paxton is committed to holding the admin accountable, defending the Lone Star State from burdensome mandates, and championing the conservative values Texans hold dear. Here’s a recap of Ken Paxton’s efforts to defend Texas values and what’s driving the news you need to know: ~ Joe Biden is lighting taxpayer money on fire by flying unvetted illegal immigrants all over our country spending $340 million on charter flights – money that sure would go a long way to ensuring our law enforcement has the tools they need to combat the flood of illegals surging at our border. Ken Paxton is working to hold Biden's feet to the fire and ensure Texas can do its job of securing the border when the federal government refuses.

~ Inspired by protests in Canada, truckers in the U.S. created their own convoy to protest Joe Biden's un-American vaccine mandates, but Facebook has removed their page in an effort to censor and silence them. Big Tech has conspired with the left to silence anyone who supports personal freedom to make their own healthcare decisions. Ken Paxton will always hold Big Tech accountable for its repeated abuses.

~ The U.S. Military has begun dismissing those who choose not to receive the COVID-19 vaccine. Ken Paxton has filed suit against Biden on behalf of the Texas National Guard because no Texan should have to choose between their job and their personal health.

We encourage you to [share these messages](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=6e634abc7c174384badaee16a1b53806&_e=7R5uVSBbjD675UK0gNxSD7e9eO_wlOAPxeM-SjNkEIuSixY0S0KjXOa-xW6yWWD3xYTywO-6TNgG4PEeMEpLUVHEgdC2YZfIH3rMjhKdBoEwoEzKCN3_NPKXViX3z3InErAqFXs7TzxmYI6KB1RsAndLSLhykn0YQcEVZIRfilUwE7yBJ9t-lVbWpozYBZC2K_yOQ8ZjIPto7i-ju73sEYOAviUKhIwB2A0nP9ibyjIDrtkbVo8UcZVhAiDd3DTAyyGcUBZqanhDruMHfP-1WA%3D%3D) with your friends and followers on social media. Attorney General Paxton wakes up every day to fight for Texas and our core values, and sharing his efforts with your network will help ensure he can continue his fight on your behalf. Please encourage your friends and fellow patriots to [join our efforts](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=6e634abc7c174384badaee16a1b53806&_e=7R5uVSBbjD675UK0gNxSD7e9eO_wlOAPxeM-SjNkEIuSixY0S0KjXOa-xW6yWWD3QoKvTyZ4SNc1XEik4F0UR39UXYejPN6VBJisStCn5Aw9KTErK9FUAMtR10FAq0YIE9szWgTv_yu-zicTAP_p9UtDEwf9oqRd92NBDNWlVNovP9zm9DgJXjVtO-K_R1jZQGLZJwxJ4jVNJj-Psw6wtoO1fJHZeoG_-ulUyW1-wE4LtJ-IUNWnlWBs5Jw_2gT_K7np4do6MjHXjDthqoBdLA%3D%3D) and Paxton’s Patriots to receive these daily updates [by clicking here.](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=6e634abc7c174384badaee16a1b53806&_e=7R5uVSBbjD675UK0gNxSD7e9eO_wlOAPxeM-SjNkEIuSixY0S0KjXOa-xW6yWWD3A7t_wjMjGBzqUnUKE9DoGuDP9VStoFbLWZvsNJLjdrUQhapD_Ygf5YYa6YvWiUs70EHYbWGREp7rhYyjrOtZd0r_BmtrKyjkP6Y02mGWeDPrQTbSbfooPFq8AxjoC0n2JtLBcHJcU1hxHLBJXZgNPEsLTTJKhOpwYXv4nc28zlJaFj_MoMR4kt5u9E3lQSYMqGbb9Se4ZlgG6EINtkLkuA%3D%3D)

**[Paxton's Patriots](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=6e634abc7c174384badaee16a1b53806&_e=7R5uVSBbjD675UK0gNxSD7e9eO_wlOAPxeM-SjNkEIuSixY0S0KjXOa-xW6yWWD3rI0Du3gnyZ9Ww0acZfRiBioVT5xTEbFS3JS1YZgy48CDM3APdnWFlPurBHoJZJtSc3NqXTeGp0GD3H1gChrmF_DcWTeMQ54KeqlArDFy8gSgBBKk2zGK7BkZEDCYXxkvUqcTSEb79eIztq3AoNdgUKHX1pxK6_2VjLWLeNTI0EK-PjpAHOxtXHQyFCL_wzvzWyY5b91bConmxbxhwo7ZJw%3D%3D)** | [**DONATE** ](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=6e634abc7c174384badaee16a1b53806&_e=7R5uVSBbjD675UK0gNxSDz6198Uyemk2GKphCZHJ25KH4rP-YvZjsAkr35TX-AYSNvT7I6w8rKbye7B2cGfEUFQ5BKg6kboOc4-3xuOBKgw0cuHs2lcQNmNLbowoaUc0pR1ywvMhOOp360of8osWdz1-5YRYUDJ0wQvJmWku5tRNXo_crtk_tl-6W6AhZHwka-7CDqlLWx_rrMWQNBQU4o7KJMNZng9z6e8wTmi1n_3_vZKSUwu7Uso5I5fa1swE3gCN0BlEk-hZS7iTfa-fUNg6kJHcrYTu60-IQhsrGYjF04AJEL-lpvoWnCg2N7xt2ni6B8IfJ3u-mYQXjQLvcPLsNnuUKG8sCvRHztN3jsQYE__5XvOe58QFPbWsDjPDeXOeztE_QqDgnBlhChpjnk7r-rCEr8xKsOe_5XkI6tBFmIc_UHqVVQtGlAkyjXraJMq85oKiZxgVQ3VwpucGHxiC2gJWdjqLUhMAkh4l0OsHstWeM4CE_ILZvGunQOY1O-JsnMyh1bNqIqHWaCjsPFSCkXtOiF_nGbFdvKBHGwo%3D)

Ken Paxton will always hold Big Tech accountable for its repeated abuses. ~ The U.S. Military has begun dismissing those who choose not to receive the COVID-19 vaccine. Ken Paxton has filed suit against Biden on behalf of the Texas National Guard because no Texan should have to choose between their job and their personal health. We encourage you to with your friends and followers on social media. Attorney General Paxton wakes up every day to fight for Texas and our core values, and sharing his efforts with your network will help ensure he can continue his fight on your behalf. Please encourage your friends and fellow patriots to and Paxton’s Patriots to receive these daily updates | | Pol. Adv. Paid for by the Ken Paxton Campaign Copyright © 2021 Ken Paxton Campaign.

name: Kelly Hall, Executive Director
subject: Celebrating Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
This month and always, we honor the Black Americans that came before us. We celebrate and stand with them in the fight for racial justice. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41397592/328629462/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGQ0ZDI0MC0yYjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EAYZQ4S6Rh2sD6hS_Ij_MWUAfmwdtX0B0K2lU3j9uZE=&emci=78261244-1885-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=f8d4d240-2b85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=561582) | Friend, First and foremost, I wanted to say thank you so much to each and every one of you who renewed your 2022 support for the Fairness Project over the past month. We’re grateful for your generosity and dedication to protecting direct democracy. Your support does so much to help us prepare a full slate of powerful ballot measure campaigns in the lead-up to this November’s midterms. As we continue our fight for social, racial, and economic justice into 2022 and beyond, today, we wanted to take some time to recognize and celebrate Black History Month — a time to celebrate and uplift the vital contributions of Black Americans to our country. This month and always, we honor the Black Americans that came before us. Those that dedicated their lives to progressive movements of the past, present, and future. We celebrate and stand with them in the fight for racial justice. From bringing workers livable wages to expanding health care access, guaranteeing paid family and medical leave policies, bringing accountability to policing through civilian oversight, and our continued fight to defend direct democracy and access to the ballot box, we’re working to make the United States a more equitable place for all — _one ballot measure at a time. _ There’s so much work that still must be done, but we believe that together, we can fuel the fight against racial injustice in our country. Thanks for fighting alongside us, Kelly Hall
_Executive Director
Fairness Project_
---

---
|
# STATEMENT FROM SENATE REPUBLICAN LEADER ROB ORTT
---
| The question of who represents New Yorkers in Albany and Washington is a matter that greatly affects our day-to-day lives. In 2014, and again last November, New Yorkers overwhelmingly voiced their support for an independent redistricting process to create fair, nonpartisan lines and ensure equal representation for all. This week, Legislative Democrats shamelessly turned their backs on the will of New Yorkers by adopting legislation to create their own gerrymandered partisan districts after rejecting maps created by the Independent Redistricting Commission. They did so behind closed doors, without considering input from thousands of communities of interest or holding a single public hearing. Democrats' hypocritical actions are blatant attacks on our democratic process. It is clear they are only concerned with holding onto their political power and cementing the disastrous One-Party Rule that has made New York less safe, less affordable, and less populated. ###
---
| |

body:
Across the country, rural communities are written off as heavily Republican areas, but Tom proves that generalization is wrong. Remember, Tom has won in a red county six times.

---
| | U.S. Senate candidate Tom Nelson could win statewide
– WisPolitics.com
This article from respected journalist Bill Kaplan tells it like it is: “[Tom] could win statewide, bridging the rural-suburban-urban divide.” Across the country, rural communities are written off as heavily Republican areas, but Tom proves that generalization is _wrong_. Remember, Tom has won in a red county _six times_.

Here’s how: **his people-focused, progressive agenda has earned him strong rural support,_even in districts won by Trump_.**

This campaign is capable of unifying the rural-suburban-urban divide and winning statewide, but we can’t amplify our message without grassroots support.

name: Team Seth
subject: Our voting rights are under attack
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAGAZINER FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41397837/328631599/-1862136002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWYwNjVkZC0yYjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wd1BT_9KrUYONMC5JEkoKtamC0u5Z7E-qRTbcoyJXaY=&emci=15e35fd1-8384-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=def065dd-2b85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=15384964)
Peter,

The right to vote is one of our most sacred rights as Americans, but ever since the Supreme Court gutted the Voting Rights Act of 1965, our voting rights have been under attack.

After record-level voter turnout in 2020, Republican state legislatures responded by passing voter suppression bills across the country -- disproportionately targeting people of color -- to make it harder to vote. In 2021, more than 440 voter restriction bills were introduced in 49 states, and at least 34 voter suppression laws were passed.

**National Republicans are still fanning the flames of Trump's "Big Lie" about voter fraud to pass more and more voting restrictions.**

Last month, the House passed the Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act to safeguard voting rights by restoring the protections of the Voting Rights Act of 1964. But the bill died on the Senate floor, and we're running out of time to protect our voting rights

[**We have to defend voting rights to preserve the future of our democracy. clean_body: Peter, The right to vote is one of our most sacred rights as Americans, but ever since the Supreme Court gutted the Voting Rights Act of 1965, our voting rights have been under attack. After record-level voter turnout in 2020, Republican state legislatures responded by passing voter suppression bills across the country -- disproportionately targeting people of color -- to make it harder to vote. In 2021, more than 440 voter restriction bills were introduced in 49 states, and at least 34 voter suppression laws were passed. National Republicans are still fanning the flames of Trump's "Big Lie" about voter fraud to pass more and more voting restrictions. Last month, the House passed the Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act to safeguard voting rights by restoring the protections of the Voting Rights Act of 1964. But the bill died on the Senate floor, and we're running out of time to protect our voting rights Voting rights are foundational to our democracy, and national Republicans have made it clear they're willing to sacrifice our rights if it helps them win. If people can't exercise their right to vote, our democracy is broken. Our democracy only works when people can make their voices heard and elect leaders who will fight for them. Seth is ready to fight for voting rights in Congress, but he needs you by his side, Peter. Thank you, Team Seth = | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MAGAZINER FOR CONGRESS VICTORIA ALMEIDA, TREASURER Magaziner for Congress Victoria Almeida, Treasurer PO Box 303 Providence, RI 02901 United States

body:
Dear Friend,

Thanks for supporting our America First Candidate, A.D. Atholi for Congress. -- A.D. was just with President Trump this week at an Event at Mar-A-Lago!

We are racing towards our March 1st Primary Election Day -- We are the only Oil & Gas, or Military, or America First P.A.C.T. endorsed candidate in this 4-way race for Louie Gohmert's old seat!

We need your help! Email me how you can help! We have FIELD SIGNS and YARD SIGNS going out now.

Let's win this race for our real grassroot candidate and elect A.D. to US Congress in TX-01!

Tim

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfrlchgqg6dvqsqtomn0n6ugd7a8mht7av6horg8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u8qm2opgsuq7cp1ge8o61d73eeq3ac5k6urbctthepgj5db16moned31mdqbas77q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlcapm9o3mc1j7applmorr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1cpie8o71c5j649fg)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up—that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5jnmj6sqgoq9l6g4hu683mrqvsga83fhjv3b4m8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cji61ob1cph2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbc09ckgjhu3kmkjbrj0b20ae12o8vg5vv42lpo0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cji61ob1cph2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z81tljhvoml2tnfv364c87g39erig7e11s12dam8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cji61ob1cph2bs) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbcsgkf236jvtdhk1lh4kcfpbjnndal7mdj0g84g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cji61ob1cph2bs) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2021 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

Dear Peter,

With the first month of 2022 on the books, I'd like to let you know how truly impressed I am by how much you all stepped up to defeat Mike Garcia.

The energy and momentum you delivered this month is a clear indication that we have what it takes to win big and finally flip CA-27 from _red_ to _blue._ The path to holding our majority in Congress runs right through this district, and **I cannot stress enough the power of your support.**

Not only did we exceed our end-of-month fundraising goal, we saw hundreds of new donors support this campaign. Because of you, I'm as confident as ever that not only are we going to flip this district, we're going to deliver another Blue Wave this November, keep our Democratic majority, and finally deliver for the working people of this district.

**There's still a lot of work to do but, Peter, but if this month was any indication, I know we will cross the finish line together.**

Thank you, again, for stepping up.

clean_body: | Dear Peter, With the first month of 2022 on the books, I'd like to let you know how truly impressed I am by how much you all stepped up to defeat Mike Garcia. The energy and momentum you delivered this month is a clear indication that we have what it takes to win big and finally flip CA-27 from red to blue. The path to holding our majority in Congress runs right through this district, and I cannot stress enough the power of your support. Not only did we exceed our end-of-month fundraising goal, we saw hundreds of new donors support this campaign. Because of you, I'm as confident as ever that not only are we going to flip this district, we're going to deliver another Blue Wave this November, keep our Democratic majority, and finally deliver for the working people of this district. There's still a lot of work to do but, Peter, but if this month was any indication, I know we will cross the finish line together. Thank you, again, for stepping up. – Christy = = *

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume t
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoqplp2i3cp40atfh81brsecplui1g6ici2maano_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqj6tpmcjge6t5impi7bdbmc4p66t5he1r32d32c5h7as3lmmqn3cjlm2rj9ob0sv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lhb6p70epg6ctb76mo6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5j69p30s5gm0oh5u)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up—that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjacqckbk0rrb8gsi6cqtu5ptd8usrd5f7j9aol8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cji61ob1c1h2bs) [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgfsvssm566so338e3q5a307bfrm07gfdja7pj6g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cji61ob1c1h2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpj6fv6ia1a8c8gdovc4a2h46a8u791bae1e11i0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cji61ob1c1h2bs) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zioueiov9lkiur3vm28gmjc78vafcikmi0drmhko_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cji61ob1c1h2bs) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

The results of this race could come down to just a handful of votes and every single dollar we raise helps us reach more voters in Texas’ 28th district. We don’t want to wake up the day after the primary and wonder if there’s more we could have done to help Jessica win. Henry Cuellar might have more money in the bank but he will not out-work or out-organize us. With just 11 days until early voting, we need all hands on deck to get out the vote for Jessica. Thank you so much for your support, – Team Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

From: Dr. Jason Martin
Date: February 1, 2022
Subject: Gov. Lee’s disturbing State of the State address
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41387055/328576551/1963061330?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220203SotS2_M4TNweb_op_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjMxOTEyNS0wNTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C1n7Sv2TlwLPs6SCHk62HDvBKVgGXLFMEwRkusKV2f8=)
---
Peter,
Last night, I attended Governor Bill Lee’s annual “State of the State” address. What I heard was disturbing and deeply disappointing.
Let me start by saying that I was heartbroken, and frankly astonished, that the Governor spoke for an hour and _never even mentioned the 22,000 Tennesseans who have died in the COVID-19 pandemic_. We all want to get life back to normal, but you don't get back to normal by ignoring the problem. Thousands of Tennesseans are grieving the loss of loved ones, and Lee’s lack of acknowledgement is breathtaking in its callousness.
Every year, this address is an opportunity to speak directly to the people of Tennessee and show what, exactly, you are doing for them. Instead, Lee spent his hour-long address pandering to the dark money interest groups that fund his candidacy.
Tennessee deserves a governor who will prioritize the needs of its people instead of the expansion of his friends’ bank accounts. Our state is #1 in rural hospital closures, #1 in COVID death rate, we have five of the 65 deadliest cities in America, and we’re 45th in the country when it comes to funding schools. Even the increase in education funding Gov. Lee announced is a slap in the face to communities and educators who have been pleading with him to provide students and teachers with the resources they desperately need — a bipartisan group said it would take at _minimum_ an additional $2 billion to fully fund our education system.
Let’s talk about freedom, too, since that’s apparently a word Lee loves to use without actually understanding what it means: Freedom means being able to go visit a doctor without going bankrupt. Freedom means being able to access the ballot box. Freedom means children are able to visit their libraries and read what they want without the state censoring books. Freedom means being able to go to work without fear you’ll contract a deadly virus.
I’ve spent the last three months traveling to all 95 counties in Tennessee. **What I heard from Tennesseans was not reflected, at all, in Gov. Lee’s address.**
No matter your zip code, the color of your skin, or how much money you have in the bank, Tennessee should be a home of opportunity — a home with safe communities, where students advance in modern and fully-funded schools, where commerce thrives on advanced infrastructure, with a healthy and well-trained workforce, where a nimble, lean, and efficient government helps its people solve big problems together.
**Governor Bill Lee has failed on all counts in his three years in office**. And last night, he confirmed that he does not plan to change. It’s time to put people over politics, and restore honest leadership to Tennessee.
[_**We’re building a movement by Tennesseans, for Tennesseans — not corporations, special interests, or rich donors. If you can, make a donation today to fuel the next phase of our campaign for the governorship.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41387056/328576552/1963061330?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220203SotS2_M4TNweb_op_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjMxOTEyNS0wNTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C1n7Sv2TlwLPs6SCHk62HDvBKVgGXLFMEwRkusKV2f8=)

Together, we will build a Tennessee that works for ALL of us. My resolve has never been firmer, and I’m so grateful to have your support.
Thank you for reading.
Dr. Jason Martin

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Please don’t let your membership expire!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Here’s why this is SO important:
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3f9u3--fgxr-4qqlpo7&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | Want to FIRE Pelosi? **Text FIRE to 21818** to help House Republicans take back the House for the American People.
---
| | |
It’s Dan Crenshaw. I’m reaching out to let you know that your current 2022 Membership status is listed as _EXPIRED_.

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f9u3-1wgfe-4qqlpo7/ "RENEW NOW")
---

Let me tell you why renewing your 2022 Membership is so important:
1. Beating Nancy Pelosi’s House Democrats is going to be impossible without YOU on our side.
2. This is the most important election of our lifetimes – it will truly decide whether or not America chooses the failed socialism of the Left or the freedom and prosperity of conservatism.
3. Your 2022 Membership is _essential_ to showing Pelosi that our grassroots donors are more powerful than her evil dark money cronies.

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f9u3-1wgff-4qqlpo8/)
---

Because we have yet to hear from you, your membership lapsed.**But I have good news: we have extended our deadline until midnight on February 7th.**

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f9u3-1wgfg-4qqlpo9/ "RENEW NOW")
---

I can only extend this offer to you for a limited time – but it’s critical you renew your 2022 Membership before the deadline. If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it’s indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball.

**[Please, I’m humbly asking: renew today>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f9u3-1wgfh-4qqlpo0/ "Please, %%=v\(@sFirstName\)=%%. I’m humbly asking: renew today >>>")**

Sincerely,

Dan Crenshaw

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f9u3-1wgfi-4qqlpo1/ "RENEW NOW")
---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f9u3-1wgfj-4qqlpo2/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f9u3-1wgfk-4qqlpo3/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3f9u3-1wgfl-4qqlpo4/ "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

name: Giffords
subject: Would you contribute $3 if you knew it’d save someone’s life from gun violence?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Sometimes it will be because we helped pass a law prohibiting domestic abusers from getting their hands on guns in some faraway state.
#

$3.
If you knew that $3 could save a life from gun violence wouldn’t it be the easiest decision you ever made to contribute that $3?
Because at its simplest, that is what this work is about:
Saving lives.
Sometimes it will be because we helped pass a law prohibiting domestic abusers from getting their hands on guns in some faraway state.
Maybe it will be because of a federal law we’ve worked to pass that makes criminal background checks process more efficiently.
You will never know the life you saved. You will never know the family spared from a lifetime of pain. You may never meet the person who won’t be scarred for life because of a crime committed on them using a gun.
But when you give $3, that is what your donation goes to.
So please:
[**Can you make today the day you give your first $3 to help Giffords lead the fight to change our gun laws? Your donation may just be the one that helps save a life.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-feb22?refcode=em220203-1-30&t=1&refcode2=1524_3935704_75c4HG&akid=1524%2E3935704%2E75c4HG)

| Team, did you see this _Washington Post_ opinion piece? it makes a crucial argument: that D.C. Statehood isn’t just a D.C. issue. It’s a voting rights issue.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41399419/328639430/1238814011?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGM5ZjE4OS0zMzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-BRm92OwI7_ISj1--gua-Bm283c9-6zBuInufXrgt-Q=&emci=be5ba497-7184-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=98c9f189-3385-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=26828920)
**The nation’s 51st state would come with two new Senators, who could turn the tide of vital legislation in Congress and help us end the filibuster.**

Right now, close to 700,000 tax-paying residents are being denied full representation, just so Republicans can maintain power.

**We need to keep the pressure on, team!**

subject: Election Integrity Going Mainstream
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Getting some help! |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a38c808491&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
[Our efforts are working](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=cdf8e2c5d0&e=44b8c466b0), they are being noticed, and we are getting nationwide attention.

**After leading efforts on Election Integrity in Arizona, we have discovered that in key precincts and counties the election in 2020 was irredeemably compromised – and this means we must recall electors and the election was invalid.**

And now, film maker Dinesh D’Souza is releasing a documentary on this very subject:
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d62c59721f&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **In this documentary, D’Souza tracks 2000 mules going to countless drop boxes. With tracking and never before seen security footage, this will bring huge momentum to the Election Integrity Movement.**

Importantly, it will silence everyone who thought that 2020 was “the most secure election in history.”
---
|
---
| This is huge for the movement and will launch next steps in our campaign.

**Right now, I am in the process of drafting legislation to recall electors from Arizona based off of irredeemably compromised elections in key precincts and counties.**

I have worked with trusted third parties to develop currency grade watermarking to protect our ballots and make sure that they are adopted nation wide.

_I am fighting to win Secretary of State in Arizona to make sure that Arizona becomes the GOLD STANDARD for election integrity._

**And D’souza’s documentary is helping this movement tremendously and will help catapult us to victory in 2022.**

**A narration from the trailer for the documentary reads:**

**“This one “mule” made 53 trips to 20 drop boxes.**

**He’s not alone.**

**We tracked 2,000 mules making multiple ballot drops.**

**Leaving no fingerprints.**

**Snapping photos to get paid.**

**A coordinated ring of illegal vote harvesting in all the key states where the election was decided.**

**Game over.”**

This is the anatomy of an election steal. This is ballot stuffing. This is how we got Joe Biden – the worst president in American history – by overriding and dismissing the will of the people.

_This is how far the Democrats will go, and we must not stand idle. [We must push forward at all costs](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=83326e60d1&e=44b8c466b0) to make sure that we have a pro-America Secretary of State in Arizona._

**And now that we are in 2022, there is no time left. We are all engines go. [I need your help to push for election integrity across the nation and to win the Secretary of State.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8581b0e9dd&e=44b8c466b0)**

[_Can you help me with a generous donation today? Any donation will help!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=69453fa271&e=44b8c466b0)

_[Please donate $25, $50, $100, $250 or more today!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=bb336ab4a8&e=44b8c466b0)_
---
| [Thank you and God bless you!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f78d6d7c52&e=44b8c466b0)

clean_body: Getting some help! | | | | | Dear , , they are being noticed, and we are getting nationwide attention. After leading efforts on Election Integrity in Arizona, we have discovered that in key precincts and counties the election in 2020 was irredeemably compromised – and this means we must recall electors and the election was invalid. And now, film maker Dinesh D’Souza is releasing a documentary on this very subject: | | In this documentary, D’Souza tracks 2000 mules going to countless drop boxes. With tracking and never before seen security footage, this will bring huge momentum to the Election Integrity Movement. Importantly, it will silence everyone who thought that 2020 was “the most secure election in history.” | | This is huge for the movement and will launch next steps in our campaign. Right now, I am in the process of drafting legislation to recall electors from Arizona based off of irredeemably compromised elections in key precincts and counties. I have worked with trusted third parties to develop currency grade watermarking to protect our ballots and make sure that they are adopted nation wide. I am fighting to win Secretary of State in Arizona to make sure that Arizona becomes the GOLD STANDARD for election integrity. And D’souza’s documentary is helping this movement tremendously and will help catapult us to victory in 2022. A narration from the trailer for the documentary reads: “This one “mule” made 53 trips to 20 drop boxes. He’s not alone. We tracked 2,000 mules making multiple ballot drops. Leaving no fingerprints. Snapping photos to get paid. A coordinated ring of illegal vote harvesting in all the key states where the election was decided. Game over.” This is the anatomy of an election steal. This is ballot stuffing. This is how we got Joe Biden – the worst president in American history – by overriding and dismissing the will of the people. This is how far the Democrats will go, and we must not stand idle. to make sure that we have a pro-America Secretary of State in Arizona. And now that we are in 2022, there is no time left. We are all engines go. | | | Mark Finchem Arizona House of Representatives – District 11 Republican for Arizona Secretary of State Conservative Election Integrity Patriot P.S. . name: Team Schrier
subject: We need to act now on climate change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Across the country, communities are experiencing the devastating effects of the climate crisis firsthand. In Washington State, we've seen heatwaves, wildfires, and droughts – and it will only get worse if we don't take immediate action to address climate change. | **_The Hill_ : 23 House Democrats call for Biden to keep full climate funds in Build Back Better**
---

Peter,

Across the country, communities are experiencing the devastating effects of the climate crisis firsthand. In Washington State, we've seen heatwaves, wildfires, and droughts – and it will only get worse if we don't take immediate action to address climate change.

As a doctor, scientist, and former EPA employee, Kim knows that climate change is the moral issue of our time. That's why she's working in Congress to protect our planet for generations to come.

Last year, Kim was proud to help pass an infrastructure bill which includes provisions championed by Kim to make our forests more resilient to wildfires, protect our rivers and streams, and more. **And she just joined 22 other House Democrats in calling on President Biden to ensure that any amended version of the Build Back Better Act keeps the full funding to address the climate crisis.**

If the Build Back Better Act is passed with full climate funds, it would represent the largest-ever single investment in our clean energy economy and set us on course for a 50% reduction in greenhouse gas emissions by 2030.

**[If you agree the time for transformational climate action is now, join Kim in calling for the passage of the Build Back Better Act's climate funding>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41399753/328640938/-1425276262?ms=em22_220203_bbb_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em22_220203_bbb_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em22_220203_bbb_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220203_bbb_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=BBxxGUgZlBhenBGOT6kbFMxmPocndSbxyj6huEr6BCp8akcEpm8XzCA%2BwcPg4nJhXpokWH4qkz1XX5R3reKHvPugJsWej9lu6MIFAwwhFWB6by1XBFiJAu4vpI%2FKgW3g001GEFnlsyWtFTeIl4DD1r7Lj%2F0QGb521J2I4Pr15pk%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDMyYjQ0MS0zNDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tTxPen8BKNTX2qITtOdR8i1Fru50TTqrAzXHKK2gtAM=&emci=e9d21b76-5284-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=f432b441-3485-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=15820338)**

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: We’re starting February strong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#
Friend, my team recently informed me that our campaign hit our January fundraising goal, and I want to thank you for your support.
This year, reaching our fundraising goals will be critical if we want to defend my seat and hold on to our razor-thin Democratic majority in Congress, so I’m incredibly grateful to you and every supporter in our grassroots movement for stepping up.
We recently learned that our district has expanded to include areas where Trump won big in 2020, so we’re now anticipating our race will become more competitive as the midterm elections draw closer and more opponents enter the race.
Friend, we’ve overcome the odds before, and I know we have what it takes to succeed again.
I’m honored this grassroots movement is fighting with me every step of the way as I build upon my work last year of passing once-in-a-generation legislation that will repair our roads and bridges while creating millions of good-paying jobs. I’m still fighting to protect the right to vote, pass Build Back Better in the Senate, and expand the Supreme Court to ensure reproductive freedom.
My work in Congress is just getting started, so I look forward to coming together to defend my seat in November.
Thank you again for helping our team start February strong.
Onward,
Mondaire

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdp5kragukjrvqui9gt6sc22i0m3mpubhh503ue0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjh64o32c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf9d31mgoe8d5lc4qncdtk6ap61p70scoe6pbjcsrj4thhedrjdcljc1pneoblm1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8pmcclgmdgmfdj2coq61cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up—that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zuveka0b341c5ufpm6pgk67jsd2cm7dosp1b0so8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjh64o32c1h2bs) [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7v8r6irdn97o3ks65mbqfhhf7h17bmo2mj5tao8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjh64o32c1h2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztb8rtg6baseb2abk12v1qsu1g1tkqv7ti19tfoo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjh64o32c1h2bs) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrkn9lhnbuh768f8qf8ohsfmuia1t8mgcjdpjjuo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjh64o32c1h2bs) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

clean_body: I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. | | | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up—that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute I believe that children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values. They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools. I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here... Thank you for your consideration. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens. | | Copyright © 2021 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. Hello,
Growing up in rural Iowa, I thought we were well-to-do because we had a piano, a well-used sewing machine, a big garden, and a flag pole. Our house was small, one bathroom, for a family of ten. I was surprised to know that not every family struggled with affording the $7 meal ticket each kid needed for school.
Lebanon, Iowa, had eight houses, a church, and a small feed store. My life centered on helping my dad, school, and exploring Dry Creek, a wonderland of aquatic life down the hill. The nearest town was Hudson, SD, nine miles west down a gravel road.
We were the prototypical rural Iowa family. Breakfast, lunch, dinner, lunch, then supper kept the house full of aromas. “Read a book,” would be mom’s terse direction if you showed any idleness. It is from this humble beginning, work as a welder, farmhand, then in a slaughterhouse, that brought me into the U.S. Navy.
America must present an opportunity for its citizens to achieve great things. From homemade clothes (I’m the littlest one) to a three-star Admiral is just one such journey. The next step is to use life’s experiences to continue a lifetime of service to this nation and my state of Iowa.
**I’m running for U.S. Senate against Chuck Grassley here in Iowa because I can represent people from all walks of life. My life’s experiences provided an innate understanding for what it means to be a Democrat:_to care as much for those I’ve never met as I do for those I know_. Obviously, Chuck Grassley is not a Democrat; he seems to only care about what Trump and his corporate PAC donors want.**
People like me aren’t supposed to be able to run and win. Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are already raising millions from corporate special interests to try to make sure I don’t.
If there’s one thing I’ve learned in life, though, it’s that anything is possible when a group of people work together to make it happen. I’m not taking one dime from corporate PACs; instead, I’m running my campaign entirely with support from over 14,500 grassroots donors like you.
[**So please, if you’re able to, will you consider making a donation to my campaign today to help me defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue? Senate control is on the line in my race, and whatever amount you can spare today would go a long way in protecting our Democratic majority in the Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41399861/328641292/-42398318?refcode=em20220203pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjg4NDNjMi0zNDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NaqtLCb3I4gBa2Jm358bfppI4or5H2BD7s7itKPgBdY=)

name: April Becker
subject: Pelosi’s worst nightmare
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Becker for Congress
body:
The nickname Democrats gave me. I am a lawyer, mother, wife, unapologetic conservative, and currently, the Democrats’ worst nightmare. A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022. | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=db37badc1bc74bd38941241a1d01e371&_e=7QGtLuu5c-Vj7Zbn7IBoCzqEGgcu_KD4n1HUbUGLYvNiJeoIAuzjGg30GkLp8PazbH2OOhLTc97phtAtKgs9xDouSumEHu2I11gW2eC1PRa359jm4GciXKggymImUgIjoKTfe8r6wRwEwdXCk3L4UxdybrOUoFY5j-UhsTy0lO80LA9uvzVGTHwiJzNsfAPR8ApQmz6J9C_a6LYb1C8ODjq1CYuZOArMsfVtczR2L7ROdYSU3scLKg73eULTU1L8bwSMZl01dvWe-BtCQn47a76VzKkqOEHqV5wZCEH4yz762uKy4XsIAvId9ajH5ZNnsG0WC0yJYnzJXKySabWtV1SRwKtahb5wjUvypwcm70Op_ePo5olExsIOaW9vtd9AlRFhsufMQWtbPK8wOmaZONwlonh_Ze2fJxHfz4T3Mz8X4qaeodzZpZk069sR7NC2RuhwQ4N9NmFPYUlj1q9FQ--EiKhN-ewU3TvApp3kcHA%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

Imagine the progressive Democrats’ worst nightmare:

A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022.

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/10b3e3bc7b26/join-me-saturday-in-provo-6750541?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=514b84ce1f&e=10c1db3257)
---
| Friends, One of the best ways to support our campaign and elect Becky to the U.S. Senate is to become a state delegate.

A delegate is a person elected or appointed to represent others in their party from a specific precinct or neighborhood. County delegates select nominees for local office while state delegates select nominees for statewide offices, such as the U.S. Senate seat. Delegates select these party nominees at county and state conventions, which are typically held in late April or May.

Any registered Republican can become a delegate. Delegates selected during the**March 8** neighborhood meetings will meet at the **April 23** convention to select the Republican nominees for a number of general election races.

By becoming a delegate, you can have a strong voice in the selection of the Republican nominee for the U.S. Senate.

If you’ve never been a delegate, the process may at first seem a little confusing and very complicated. But in reality, you do not need any special training or qualifications to become a delegate. You must simply be a registered Utah voter, affiliated as a Republican, and able to complete a few steps leading up to your precinct caucus meeting.

Once you[ volunteer to become a delegate](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=7aeaa91988&e=10c1db3257), we will send you all the information you will need to navigate the delegate system.
---
| [Become a delegate](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=1dea828fc6&e=10c1db3257 "Become a delegate")
---
| Thank you as always for your support!

-Team Becky

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: The Democratic Party’s problem
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Democrats have a real problem,
Peter.

A razor-thin majority in the Senate has given corporate Democrats Joe
Manchin and Krysten Sinema an outsized role in blocking progress. But it
didn’t have to be like this.

During the 2020 elections, the Democratic party didn’t capitalize on the
people’s demand for economic, social, racial, and environmental justice.
Instead, the Democratic establishment-backed milquetoast, centrist
candidates who were able to fund their campaigns with big checks from
corporations and the ultra-wealthy.

The Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee endorsed recent Republicans
and corporate candidates over working-class progressives. And despite
raising unprecedented amounts of money (hundreds of millions of dollars),
these establishment Senate candidates lost in several key Senate races.
The Democratic Party backed bad candidates, and now — with Joe Manchin and
Kyrsten Sinema hellbent on obstructing progress — we are suffering the
consequences.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/92461?refcode=em20220203-21804&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=21804%2E1203867%2EC4fOO7 ]We are working every day to fundamentally transform the Democratic
Party — by electing progressive fighters to Congress and calling out the
Democratic establishment for its failures. Can you support our work with a
$3 contribution?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/92461?refcode=em20220203-21804&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=21804%2E1203867%2EC4fOO7 ]Contribute $3

We don’t endorse candidates who can fund campaigns with big checks from
their friends, family, or corporate connections. We believe that in order
to make transformational change, we need to put working-class progressives
in power.

That’s why Justice Democrats are working hand in hand with six diverse,
working-class candidates who center social, racial, economic, and
environmental justice in their campaigns. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/92461?refcode=em20220203-21804&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=21804%2E1203867%2EC4fOO7 ]Will you chip in
$3 to help us support these campaigns and upend the
corporate-backed Democratic establishment?

Thank you for your support,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=21804%2E1203867%2EC4fOO7 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=21804%2E1203867%2EC4fOO7 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220203-21804-footer&t=1025&refcode2=21804_1203867_C4fOO7&akid=21804%2E1203867%2EC4fOO7

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=21804%2E1203867%2EC4fOO7

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

The clock is ticking, and we are on the verge of reaching our goal and keeping this campaign on track to defeat Ann Wagner in the fall. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41399939/328641920/-633014677?refcode=220203-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzNlMzEzNS0zNjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wockwrJor-foy9Tr7cPwyjlr1LLxa4bMABH5jbnpMr4=) Folks, My family has lived in Missouri for six generations, and I am proud to say that coming from a long line of entrepreneurs, civic leaders, and active community members has made me the person I am today. **[Before I get into it, rush in $15 to make sure we defeat Ann Wagner in November!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41399940/328641921/-176915805?refcode=220203-email&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzNlMzEzNS0zNjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wockwrJor-foy9Tr7cPwyjlr1LLxa4bMABH5jbnpMr4=)** My great-great-grandfather Edward started a small shoe business in 1913 and turned Samuels Shoe Company into a successful manufacturing business that was family-run right here in St. Louis for three generations. clean_body: The clock is ticking, and we are on the verge of reaching our goal and keeping this campaign on track to defeat Ann Wagner in the fall. | | | = Folks, My family has lived in Missouri for six generations, and I am proud to say that coming from a long line of entrepreneurs, civic leaders, and active community members has made me the person I am today. = My great-great-grandfather Edward started a small shoe business in 1913 and turned Samuels Shoe Company into a successful manufacturing business that was family-run right here in St. Louis for three generations. My grandmother started a travel agency in an era when women had few opportunities, again right here in St. Louis. Small business is in my bones, and I know that the key to revitalizing St. Louis is supporting and encouraging local entrepreneurs. I will bring this uniquely American spirit with me when I get to Congress! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = I believe in hard work, community health, and local economies. I love St. Louis, and I know that with the right leadership we can make this city the best city for small businesses in America! All the best, Ben Samuels Ben Samuels is a businessperson, an economic policy expert, and a bipartisan problem-solver running for Congress in Missouri’s 2nd Congressional District to bring jobs and opportunities back to the St. Louis area. ---

_**2022 is our chance to reclaim the Senate and ensure that when President Trump takes back the White House in 2024, he has an America First majority waiting for him.** _
---
But first, I need to know if conservatives across the country have confidence that we can get the job done this election year.

My Democrat opponent has brought in more than $53.5 MILLION. | Fellow American, I have been blessed with many amazing opportunities, but I can say without a doubt that running for the Senate in Georgia is one of the greatest honors of my life. That's why we're giving this race 110% Every. Single. Day. Having said that, we're running against the top Senate fundraiser in the country. In the last three months, he raised more than $9.8 million! Since he began raising money for his re-election campaign last winter, he's brought in more than $53.5 MILLION. While this is a tremendous amount of money, we've never been known to back down from a good challenge. While our opponent may have a fundraising lead - for now, we've got the support of the voters. But we need to narrow the fundraising gap. Would you please help us knock this out one donation at a time? Starting with your contribution of $3 before midnight? Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

2️⃣ **She’s a mom**. As a working mother of three, Deb knows what parents across western Wisconsin face. She is ready to work on challenges like affordable and accessible child care, and quality education for our families and the next generation of leaders.

3️⃣ **The health care fight is personal to her**. When Deb was just 12 years old, she lost her six year old brother to a rare cancer called Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Her father and brother had to travel hours away to Madison for treatment. Deb understands just how precious health care is, especially for those who struggle with accessibility and cost.

4️⃣ **She’s a lifelong Wisconsinite**. Born and raised in Menomonie, Deb learned the values of faith, family, and community that are core to western Wisconsin.

5️⃣ **She never gives up**. Deb is no stranger to a tough assignment. Both here and abroad, Deb has faced some incredible challenges. Now, she’s ready to tackle the challenges our communities face.

Western Wisconsin families deserve an advocate who understands what we are grappling with every day. And Deb is ready to stand up and make a difference. name: Kina Collins
subject: Thinking of Laquan McDonald Today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KINA COLLINS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542
body:
Today is a sad day for Chicago, for Black lives, for our justice system. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0bPZYqqRmKw-ebpnqlyWdsbb4WUxyyDpjjPMxiSxHH8s6b4HmumE-edtp0gW8hDXGd5iRiulXTX2EqeTgp1YpWc21XJHyxPV4RXU1qBZr9SvvaNM1wEJeZb1aTvkA6Jp4AT-Rya2JvHuQblxKdHzw3fItlfLG8nA_zS7f_wDDpr0NCQZMPYoaI1ftYuDsMWAroytDwsTSVEucNi8Sj26i8NlT351vm3dS2Ed6NkBt7M-kHhlJT7V9vu4GVzPTk13y4SPaYUWGhzdVRQKAtTlX5h7IA8S0u1JF4lBDOMYXL05g/3j9/fKB_ag38TmSgfoSSQ9E72w/h0/hBoDQuCk6P3rZwHgNjtPFNbxnhlhc-uuHlMUib7DTnk) Team, Today is a sad day for Chicago, for Black lives, for our justice system. Today, the officer that murdered Laquan McDonald, a 17-year-old Black child, is walking free after just three years behind bars. Laquan was a child that was left to die on the ground after having 16 bullets pumped into his body. That is not just excessive use of policing. That is not just a murder. **That is a modern day lynching.** An 81-month sentence for the gruesome murder of a child was inadequate in the first place. For Jason Van Dyke to walk free in less than half that time is senselessly unjust. **It shouldn't require a viral consumption of Black suffering and outrage in order to shame and embarrass this criminal justice system into accountability because justice is impossible at this point.** The only just thing would be if Laquan McDonald was still alive today. But this is not accountability. This is our criminal justice system once again proving to be more criminal than just. Even when our leaders refuse to step up for our community, our community refuses to be silent in the face of injustice. Today, we protest in a Day of Outrage and Direct Action for Laquan McDonald. I’m calling on U.S. Attorney John Lausch to intervene and bring federal charges against Jason Van Dyke to ensure that he is held accountable. As our leaders in Chicago continue to fail Black communities, this is a moment for our leaders on the federal level to step up. It’s time for Congress to address police brutality and ensure we have systems of accountability to prevent this from ever happening again. It’s time to end qualified immunity and stop investing federal funds in discriminatory police departments. It’s time to pass the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act, the Breathe Act, the Ending Qualified Immunity Act, and the Mental Health Justice Act. It’s long past time for real leadership and real federal action. To everyone in this city—and this country—with a platform, this is the moment to use it. To every member of the Illinois Congressional delegation, the Governor, the Mayor, the corporate executives who tweet #BlackLivesMatter.... Now is the time to stand up, speak out, and show us those are more than just empty words. In Solidarity, Kina Collins

name: Team AOC
subject: Ban stock trading in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Members of Congress are able to use sensitive information to make huge profits from buying and trading individual stocks that they know will perform well.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220203-2765-header&t=1&akid=2765%2E2526796%2E_C9vUR)
Here’s the situation:
Members of Congress have access to sensitive and privileged information as part of their jobs to be able to anticipate and legislate for what’s to come.
**But right now, Members of Congress are able to use this sensitive information to make huge profits from buying and trading individual stocks that they know will perform well.**
It’s how we end up with situations like this:
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/sign/ban-stock-trading/?source=em20220203-2765-P_ENG_ANO_LEG&t=2&akid=2765%2E2526796%2E_C9vUR)
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/sign/ban-stock-trading/?source=em20220203-2765-P_ENG_ANO_LEG&t=3&akid=2765%2E2526796%2E_C9vUR)
Alexandria has repeatedly said that Congress members should not have the ability to access privileged information and be able to hold and trade individual stock. It's why she’s worked with her colleagues to ban members of Congress from trading individual stock for YEARS.
**There have been lots of stories and scandals about stock trading, but now – thanks to increased public pressure and attention – we may have a shot to pass this ban once and for all.**
[But we need to keep the pressure up. Please add your name here if you agree with Alexandria and support a ban on members of Congress trading individual stocks. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/sign/ban-stock-trading/?source=em20220203-2765-P_ENG_ANO_LEG&t=4&akid=2765%2E2526796%2E_C9vUR)
**[Add your name →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/sign/ban-stock-trading/?source=em20220203-2765-P_ENG_ANO_LEG&t=5&akid=2765%2E2526796%2E_C9vUR)**
To be clear, it’s one thing to have a blind trust or invest in a mutual fund or index fund. These are vehicles of investment that are broad and that individuals in Congress don’t have control over.
But the fact is that a majority of Congress members hold and trade individual stocks. Last year, there were at least 75 members of Congress who held _individual_ stock in Johnson & Johnson, Moderna, and Pfizer.1 **That’s where we should be drawing the line.**
[If you agree that we should ban stock trading for ALL members of Congress, please add your name next to Alexandria’s and help grow our movement to make sure this becomes law. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/sign/ban-stock-trading/?source=em20220203-2765-P_ENG_ANO_LEG&t=6&akid=2765%2E2526796%2E_C9vUR)
In solidarity,
Team AOC
1 - [Business Insider](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10376?t=7&akid=2765%2E2526796%2E_C9vUR)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20220203-2765-P_ENG_ANO_LEG&t=8&refcode2=2765_2526796__C9vUR&akid=2765%2E2526796%2E_C9vUR)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220203-2765-P_ENG_ANO_LEG&t=9&akid=2765%2E2526796%2E_C9vUR)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=10&akid=2765%2E2526796%2E_C9vUR) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=11&akid=2765%2E2526796%2E_C9vUR) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=12&akid=2765%2E2526796%2E_C9vUR)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=13&akid=2765%2E2526796%2E_C9vUR)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=2765%2E2526796%2E_C9vUR)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
