name: Greg Lopez for Governor
subject: ALERT: help get Greg Lopez get on the ballot! This Monday!
body:
Help Greg get on the primary ballot. Together we can flip Colorado back to the people!
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017nS4WFyfgNgh_U-xblHPzMDssnKbHPYOfevejXRiVNNuKPFLa-PasP1xPlV_GghG1mDWGUaXp3x39NlaULcFhTGa8yxHjzF9lIT5i4edUCWl8jPkHK__ErMdlk3YFf6chimXerKsh_BXPnQoew6jJw==&c=dGcMrfbtqKB1yKFwmxbazYIuEahbtu7SOfoMnbZOYmZOUko3VMObdQ==&ch=PKfctW98yMzX5ponXv7bkpXP44fxHvzlsF0F1iDlWPXG5QeMHM1HkA==)
---
| |
---
| Help Greg Lopez on the Primary Ballot
---
Greg has to win the vote of 30% of the state delegates at the State Assembly on April 6th.
Yes, you can be an official elected delegate that will determine who will be on the Primary ballot! Your voice and vote as a delegate represent hundreds of your neighbors and is hundreds of times more influential now than when you vote in the primary and general elections as an individual citizen!
---
|
---
| | |
---
Save these action dates:
1\. Monday February 7th [Register as Republican ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017nS4WFyfgNgh_U-xblHPzMDssnKbHPYOfevejXRiVNNuKPFLa-PasMYAPGdSQomjGo7U4n7hgZ7T27L9qhT00yV7qdmENrZJzgYOp4-6FNG-Ji6lLLTaLV_GOmfD6O2lpSbUKIrcYL4LkqyI_o6wP1sNWY7eDfhA4uIRoCbZJHMMoPSeOOuMz8nbZyaZFCEpc1FdsbXATN8MYYamrs0D9Q==&c=dGcMrfbtqKB1yKFwmxbazYIuEahbtu7SOfoMnbZOYmZOUko3VMObdQ==&ch=PKfctW98yMzX5ponXv7bkpXP44fxHvzlsF0F1iDlWPXG5QeMHM1HkA==)by this Monday to be eligible to participate in local Caucus
2\. Tuesday March 1st Attend and run for delegate at local precinct caucus meeting
3\. Saturday March 19th Attend and vote for like-minded candidates at County Assembly 4\. Saturday April 16th Attend and vote for Greg Lopez for Governor at the State Assembly
---
| |
---
| To be eligible to vote and run for delegate to represent your neighborhood precinct for your county and state ballot, you must be a registered republican by Monday February 7th.
To become a delegate, you must attend your neighborhood precinct caucus on Tuesday night 7pm March 1st, submit your name to be a delegate and be elected by your other precinct attendees. ONLY registered Republicans can participate in GOP precinct caucus to run and/vote to become a delegate.
[The Colorado Secretary of State's page is where you can check your registration status, verify that you are registered as a Republican and if your registration is active.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017nS4WFyfgNgh_U-xblHPzMDssnKbHPYOfevejXRiVNNuKPFLa-PasMYAPGdSQomj3u28JbbZKQ7aVGO0U_LcTC9l74FMICR5nW8hq5Zr9hJ3MuWiuuQ_F_m3iE6IyAVwghw-8Hxr2IDI6EOoDKr0pX9A_3_nPe_vEDLbKTEzG24mHnDYKTKjxg-5YYTKhbwmgZyjioZ1LWs=&c=dGcMrfbtqKB1yKFwmxbazYIuEahbtu7SOfoMnbZOYmZOUko3VMObdQ==&ch=PKfctW98yMzX5ponXv7bkpXP44fxHvzlsF0F1iDlWPXG5QeMHM1HkA==) If you are NOT registered as a Republican, you must change your party affiliation to R and you can do that under the Change Party Affiliation tab. If NOT registered at all, you can register there too.
At SoS site you will find out which precinct you are in (last 3 numbers of your registration ID). Then at your county GOP website you will be able to find where your precinct caucus will be meeting on Tuesday March 1st at 7p. Come early at 6:30 and bring your family and friends of registered republicans (18 and over) nominate and vote for each other to become delegates and alternates for your precinct and change your county and state!
Tell all your like-minded friends and neighbors to come to their neighborhood caucus meeting in March 1st, ask them to run for delegate and vote for each other. Run for state delegate and alternate and attend state assembly on Saturday April 16th to vote for Greg Lopez for Governor.
Just three meetings, caucus night on March 1st, county assembly on Saturday March 19th and State assembly on Saturday April 16th.
Three of the most impactful votes of the election year to determine who will be the people's candidates on the June Primary ballot.
Be the change we have been waiting for. Become a delegate and vote for the best conservative candidates at all office levels and Greg Lopez for Governor!
---
| |
---
| | | [Verify Your Voter Information](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017nS4WFyfgNgh_U-xblHPzMDssnKbHPYOfevejXRiVNNuKPFLa-PasMYAPGdSQomj3u28JbbZKQ7aVGO0U_LcTC9l74FMICR5nW8hq5Zr9hJ3MuWiuuQ_F_m3iE6IyAVwghw-8Hxr2IDI6EOoDKr0pX9A_3_nPe_vEDLbKTEzG24mHnDYKTKjxg-5YYTKhbwmgZyjioZ1LWs=&c=dGcMrfbtqKB1yKFwmxbazYIuEahbtu7SOfoMnbZOYmZOUko3VMObdQ==&ch=PKfctW98yMzX5ponXv7bkpXP44fxHvzlsF0F1iDlWPXG5QeMHM1HkA==)

body:
If you think saving our Senate majority is worth a modest donation, please take a moment to donate.
#
Derek,
Just like John, we’ll keep this email short(s).
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42864?refcode=ema20220203-4444&t=1&akid=4444%2E434096%2EtAeuhE)
**[Will you make your first donation before midnight? Every single penny will go towards electing John to guarantee a Democratic majority in the Senate.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42864?refcode=ema20220203-4444&t=2&akid=4444%2E434096%2EtAeuhE)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42864?refcode=em20220203-4444&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4444%2E434096%2EtAeuhE)**
Look, chipping in $5 or $25 to our campaign might not always *feel* like much.
**But the grassroots contributions our campaign receives from folks like you are *literally* powering everything we do to elect John Fetterman and guarantee a Democratic Senate majority in 2022.**
We still have a lot more work to do + money to raise in order to organize in all 67 counties across Pennsylvania. But if enough folks chip in, we'll stay on track to keep building the strong, honest, and inclusive campaign that will flip Pennsylvania blue.
**[Derek, this race could decide control of Congress in 2022, so if you think saving our Democratic Senate majority is worth a modest donation to our campaign, please take a moment to donate today.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42864?refcode=ema20220203-4444&t=22&akid=4444%2E434096%2EtAeuhE)**
What we’re building together is so incredibly special. Please be a part of it and throw in a few bucks, if you can. 🙏
Thank you for everything,
Team Fetterman
P.S. Told you we’d keep it short(s) 😂

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220203-4444-footer&t=23&refcode2=4444_434096_tAeuhE&akid=4444%2E434096%2EtAeuhE)**

name: Sheriff Joe Lombardo
subject: 2022 = A New Nevada
body:
For too long in the Silver State, we’ve been stuck dealing with dangerous Democrat single-party rule.
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JAUGhaFKHr64Y826451D5Yi9KxuOjM0oZCc4iVL6UbSA73FDgZX_I---cEt3Wkakq9qfIqoZ5aQx9ebSH_Ux_Ulb4Wcp0yxj9vy8ihQP_-mDfzRfsEafCSDlRrj8XJKNh_e7kQRzTY2AvdRXcYto1FbKCE2xl2O-xSv9eK0HWIv3rH6XvUaxUp7UO9wvmRfamlBWhQiA9Xs=&c=T50QvuRe-heOzTD3iwrgi6d55WlrkBWayc6hfu1U-ffy558GntpK7Q==&ch=sI5mz4b-RFHnPpKpW67pBygibvluKD8YBkZ67kxG-oT9vLl59xdIDA==)

---
| Peter,
For too long in the Silver State, we've been stuck dealing with dangerous Democrat single-party rule.
Our state government has shifted to the radical Left, and we've been feeling the effects in our economy, in our communities, in our children's education, and in our daily lives.
---
| | | [HELP STOP THIS IN 2022 - CLICK HERE TO LEARN MORE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JAUGhaFKHr64Y826451D5Yi9KxuOjM0oZCc4iVL6UbSA73FDgZX_I---cEt3Wkakq9qfIqoZ5aQx9ebSH_Ux_Ulb4Wcp0yxj9vy8ihQP_-mDfzRfsEafCSDlRrj8XJKNh_e7kQRzTY2AvdRXcYto1FbKCE2xl2O-xSv9eK0HWIv3rH6XvUaxUp7UO9wvmRfamlBWhQiA9Xs=&c=T50QvuRe-heOzTD3iwrgi6d55WlrkBWayc6hfu1U-ffy558GntpK7Q==&ch=sI5mz4b-RFHnPpKpW67pBygibvluKD8YBkZ67kxG-oT9vLl59xdIDA==)
---
| We've been suffering the consequences of these upside-down, liberal policies for quite some time - but it doesn't have to be the new normal.
2022 can be the year we stop this trend before it becomes permanent, and make sure our rights, our communities, our elections, our children, and our Nevada Way of Life is protected.
The Nevada that Steve Sisolak and the Democrats in Carson City want to bring about is one that handicaps law enforcement and burdens everyday folks with policies that suit their liberal priorities - NOT our interests.
But together, we can bring back a Nevada that's free, safe, and prosperous for all. Thanks in advance for helping make this vision a reality with your contribution.
[>>SUPPORT THE MISSION<<](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JAUGhaFKHr64Y826451D5Yi9KxuOjM0oZCc4iVL6UbSA73FDgZX_I---cEt3Wkakq9qfIqoZ5aQx9ebSH_Ux_Ulb4Wcp0yxj9vy8ihQP_-mDfzRfsEafCSDlRrj8XJKNh_e7kQRzTY2AvdRXcYto1FbKCE2xl2O-xSv9eK0HWIv3rH6XvUaxUp7UO9wvmRfamlBWhQiA9Xs=&c=T50QvuRe-heOzTD3iwrgi6d55WlrkBWayc6hfu1U-ffy558GntpK7Q==&ch=sI5mz4b-RFHnPpKpW67pBygibvluKD8YBkZ67kxG-oT9vLl59xdIDA==)
For our state, Sheriff Joe Lombardo

|

body:

| [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe89b1318ebf4a15871cae40d01a29a1&_m=15f5d3fd1fdd4b798e53f44080049e32&_e=Pf9t_oiyPFmonItY5P_-qbFkyPqUO53DBRaiFi4Cp8RtRb7ZpiM12pxZFKc0IoCi240ARTR8UsRKR2ByAVUBoiocTyVTwHD2R9h4Fo2JowehjCVFpAXXxw7cuAYqPCBkfZ-YQidWulOUr-rZC04XAqzkzA9XSNR94j24XXASfZTNx-SYXMi8N4ibPerWiqhfFFDOJd_2_Zf67xzEFH2kkuUWFwAxdCJOGT-oz90uxeYR8OtLNW0YLgHhWtVecW2qWe0ZYpt0HB9SDjFtIv0UhrcNnGN3ZmHfYWmX6skCQ1KeLzx9eUdqQHLLF5ajaGDphguRt_3QWkMEj-IOYz3y5PZL_xANY4Mh_t-qzrzFJDShgRT2msdQ93IFdWGurMJFERWp03jzS0RgdNpKVAqztknd_eUPatU3JS1K0a2y857nVkyBGuKvMCgK5pwPeYZznkK0hnwpawxbl8FnMzEho5KbTUtvg4rxj494JzA-XL9G4bcxl4yZi-mrG59LhgWeVVgubJ28weCT8grKn4Uzkg%3D%3D)

Friend,
---
With the first month of the 2022 election year now officially in the books, I’ve instructed my team to focus our attention on verifying our position in this must-win governor’s race.
---
_The most recent polls show that**53%** of Wisconsin voters would **NOT** re-elect Tony Evers. _
---

| | _Folks, I can’t thank you enough._ I just got off of a call with my team, and I’m told we knocked our January fundraising goal out of the park! I wanted to reach out to you after hearing the news to personally thank you for stepping up and chipping in last month. Every contribution is an investment in this campaign and makes a difference in the fight to keep Nevada blue. I’m grateful that we were able to end January on a high note, but our work is far from over. As much as I want to take time to celebrate, I know that my 9 GOP opponents are stockpiling their war chests to try and stop our momentum. That’s why we can’t lose sight of our end goal: **holding on to our progress and keeping Nevada blue in 2022 and beyond.** Election Day will be here before we know it and everything we’re able to do now will set us up for success. clean_body: | | | | | Folks, I can’t thank you enough. I just got off of a call with my team, and I’m told we knocked our January fundraising goal out of the park! I wanted to reach out to you after hearing the news to personally thank you for stepping up and chipping in last month. Every contribution is an investment in this campaign and makes a difference in the fight to keep Nevada blue. I’m grateful that we were able to end January on a high note, but our work is far from over. As much as I want to take time to celebrate, I know that my 9 GOP opponents are stockpiling their war chests to try and stop our momentum. That’s why we can’t lose sight of our end goal: holding on to our progress and keeping Nevada blue in 2022 and beyond. Election Day will be here before we know it and everything we’re able to do now will set us up for success. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you, Steve Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. My heart is racing. I can't believe this news.

Kevin McCarthy just held a MAJOR fundraiser at Trump's DC hotel...

_... Where he raked in $9.5 MILLION to take the House from us._

McCarthy knows this kind of cash could CRUSH our Democrats' chances of holding the Majority.

**But I simply won 't allow our Democrats to be outraised -- _not while the latest polls show us TIED with the Republicans._**

**[That's why I'm personally asking 5,000 Democrats to step up before my End of Week Deadline in 48 hours, help me OUTRAISE McCarthy, and make his fundraiser completely BACKFIRE. Will you help me keep the Majority firmly in Democrats' hands? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**
| [MAJORITY DEFENDER CONTRIBUTION: **PENDING**
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.)

---

Let me be clear:

Protecting the House and Senate is CRITICAL to stopping Republicans from forcing their anti-democracy agenda on the American people.

**And if we lose because we didn 't meet our budget goals, I know we will regret it for the rest of our lives.**

I'm calling on 5,000 strong Democrats to step up before my End of Week Deadline. Can I count on your $3 in this incredibly dire moment?

Nancy

| | Dear Fellow American, American civics education, and specifically the teaching of American history, is at a crisis point. In K-12 schools nationwide, false narratives are being constructed, and content is being cherry-picked to fit an ideological (and frankly anti-American) agenda. Maybe you’ve even seen this happening in your local schools. As a result, we are faced with a choice: will we allow our children to be indoctrinated using curricula developed by anti-American ideologues and promoted by Left-wing education bureaucrats? Or will we insist that our children are taught honestly, using a curriculum that presents a fair, unbiased, and comprehensive view of our nation’s history? We must insist on the **latter** , both for the sake of truth and for the sake of our children and America’s future. For this reason, we have produced the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** —and I’m writing to ask your help in promoting this curriculum to educators, homeschool families, and concerned citizens nationwide. **What is the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum? ** The**Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** is a K-12 history and civics curriculum that covers the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively. This curriculum has been designed not by activists or ideologues but by teachers and professors at Hillsdale College—and we are making it available **free of charge**. To be clear, the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** is not a _slap-dash_ response to the efforts of anti-American ideologues to indoctrinate our children. It is a 2,000-page, 85-lesson curriculum based on decades of studying American history. Developed over 18 months of intense and focused effort, its roots extend as far back as the beginning of Hillsdale College in 1844. And we need your help to make the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** available to educators, homeschool families, and concerned citizens nationwide...and to make it available **free of charge** so that it will have the greatest impact. _We have set a budget goal of $400,000 to promote the**Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** and our other outreach efforts—including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and our classical K-12 charter school initiative. _ That’s an ambitious budget, and we need to get started as soon as possible. One reason why your support really matters: **Hillsdale College refuses to accept one penny in taxpayer support—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans**. This makes our work uniquely dependent on the support of citizens like you—citizens who agree with Hillsdale’s mission on behalf of liberty. We remind ourselves daily of Hillsdale’s 177-year-old mission—to provide “sound learning” of the kind needed to preserve “the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty.” With that mission in mind, we produced the **Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** —and now we need your help to promote it nationwide. Will you take this opportunity to _**support the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum and our other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty?**_ Understanding that a proper education is vital to the preservation of liberty—and that the anti-American indoctrination now being forced on too many American children poses an existential threat to liberty—I hope you will make your most generous tax-deductible gift today. **I’ve included a secure link for your convenience here: ** _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-hillsdale-1776-curriculum](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=146431&L=79012&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3N1cHBvcnQtaGlsbHNkYWxlLTE3NzYtY3VycmljdWx1bT91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTE3NzZfY3VycmljdWx1bSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9LZWxsaVdhcmQwMjIwMjIxNzc2JnNjPU1LMTAyMUVNMg==)**_ Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to hearing from you. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
|
---
|
---
Dr. Kelli Ward

1990 McCulloch Blvd
D-228
Lake Havasu City, AZ 86403

PAID FOR BY KELLI WARD

name: Marco Rubio
subject: hey.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I know I've reached out a lot lately, but this is important. & nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3fawb--fgxr-4qqlpo6&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)
|

---
| | | Fellow Conservative,

I know I've reached out a lot lately, but this is important.

It’s Marco, I missed my FIRST goal of the year–this could set me back months. We can’t afford this in an election year.

I want to say that I hate begging you for help, but this is so important. The Senate majority is on the line, the fate of America hangs in the balance, **and my opponent just reported she raised over $7 million last quarter.** I’ll do whatever necessary to make sure that Conservatives take back the Senate this election.

**[FACT: My race will determine control of the Senate, and the fate of Trump’s legacy. I’m humbly and earnestly asking, will you give $18 to retake the Senate?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fawb-1whpd-4qqlpo6/ "FACT: My race will determine control of the Senate, and the fate of Trump’s legacy. I’m humbly and earnestly asking, will you give $18 to retake the Senate?")**

| | | [HELP TAKE BACK THE SENATE >>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fawb-1whpe-4qqlpo7/ "HELP TAKE BACK THE SENATE >>")
---
My opponent outraised me ALL OF 2021. If we don’t do something and start this year off strong, Conservatives are going to be in grave danger to start off the new year.

**[I’m pleading for your help! I need 24 more Patriots to take a stand. Please, don’t let me down:](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fawb-1whpf-4qqlpo8/ "I’m pleading for your help! I need 24 more Patriots to take a stand. Please, don’t let me down:")**

Marco Rubio

| _A personal note from Marco Rubio_ :

Fellow Conservative, did you see what my former Trump Impeachment Manager opponent said about our race?

Demings is a do-nothing Democrat with a laughable record. Schumer and his cronies are propping her up with their multi-million dollar warchests all because they know she'll be a RUBBER STAMP for their radical agenda. If we let up and the Democrats win in Florida, they will KEEP control of the Senate and continue to force their dangerous agenda through Congress. So here's the deal:

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fawb-1whpn-4qqlpo6/ "Footer Gif")

I really do need your help, Fellow Conservative. People think they need to write huge checks in order to make a difference but that's just not true. I need folks who can give $8, $10, $12.55 or even $17 today.

You know I've reached out a lot, so don't complain if we lose. I'm committed to winning. Are you?

name: Team Holly
subject: MTG doesn't represent us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter – despite Marjorie Taylor Greene facing disciplinary action on all fronts, she continues to spew her hateful and treasonous rhetoric. I don’t know about you, but we’re sick and tired of it.
In another push to tear our country apart, Marjorie Taylor Greene periodically suggests national divorce while also stating that “Americans who move to conservative states from California and New York should have a ‘cooling off’ period before being allowed to vote.”
This treasonous and anti-democratic rhetoric poisons our national discourse and damages our longstanding democracy.
Marjorie Taylor Greene’s actions prove time and again that she is more interested in her ultra-conservative donors than her own constituents. Unlike Marge, Team Holly is in the community everyday trying to unite us on the issues that matter, rather than the issues that tear us apart.
We don't need a national divorce, we just need a divorce from Marjorie Taylor Greene . We deserve a representative who supports our democratic values and supports their constituents. Chip in $12 to put an end to her treasonous rhetoric. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em0119]
We are in this together,
Team Holly.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em0119] Join the #MackPack [https://www.holly4congress.com/]

name: Michelle Lujan Grisham
subject: What are your priorities?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
Need your input
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41401898/328650994/-2081290588?code=jtk1157-su-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzdhMmQ4Ny00MTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OxA55CgPWCTp3E3AWEW9IiMwZwEu_0lnLriO7aCTd-U=&emci=a6063fe1-0f85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=f77a2d87-4185-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=24265352)
---
Peter,

I'm so proud of what we've accomplished in the last three years. From legalizing cannabis to slashing taxes, I know that my policies have left New Mexicans better off today than they were when I first took office.
While we've already delivered so much for the people of New Mexico, there is still work to be done. I'm presiding over a legislative session right now, where I'm working to build an even brighter future for the Land of Enchantment.
**That's why I want to check in with top supporters like you. As I embark on my fourth year in office and continue to fight for New Mexico, I want to hear about which issues matter most to you personally.**
**[Please, if you have just a few minutes, will you take this priorities survey right now? My team and I are meeting tomorrow to discuss survey results, so I'll need your responses by midnight tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41401899/328650995/-1316343455?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1157-su-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzdhMmQ4Ny00MTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OxA55CgPWCTp3E3AWEW9IiMwZwEu_0lnLriO7aCTd-U=&emci=a6063fe1-0f85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=f77a2d87-4185-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=24265352)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41401900/328650996/-1316343455?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1157-su-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzdhMmQ4Ny00MTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OxA55CgPWCTp3E3AWEW9IiMwZwEu_0lnLriO7aCTd-U=&emci=a6063fe1-0f85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=f77a2d87-4185-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=24265352)

Michelle Lujan Grisham

subject: Marine Colonel Tom Duhs endorses Erik Aadland for Congress
body:
"...he has my highest endorsement for this office."
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DF1pmgeWoCt07xMZpcM51vCMj5iIpGMkeO1pOLXZTbIRI_zTyYjZXwrj0Y5GDAEXbWwo7QiVySTdeIKjG_s9_f5hkRPdspGH_hsZM6vbBrnZyF03O_0Yr2szmvXSrDY-kLxzp72Hdn5oeJDBdnHVZfcnV8NMIJbE&c=-HRI4pO7kBPAumK6bpKO6_zKMCz0_KYn-smd3FmElPnPj8FSzUVxtg==&ch=rPIPDays5WC7vLUEL7IRR5yr_jRoKpuVTs__oyg8GLNc1tFM4CRPqw==)
---
|
---
| Marine Colonel Tom Duhs endorses Erik for Congress
---
| |
---|---
|
U.S. Marine Colonel Tom Duhs has a long history in training our nations warriors in specialized warfare. He served at the Mountain Warfare Training Center in California--the Marine Corps version of Camp Hale, in Colorado. He also trained Marines in cold weather operations in Alaska. During his 30 year career he participated in five winter deployments to Norway on NATO exercises.

Duhs is the co-author of two books, "Sempre Avanti--Always forward," and "Ice and Granite--Snow Soldiers of Riva Ridge".

He regularly makes presentations on the 10th Mountain Division, a specially trained light infantry unit of the U.S. Army that has recently served in Iraq and Syria.
| |
---
| Col. Duhs offers his endorsement of U.S. Congressional candidate Erik Aadland:
---
"As a Marine Corps Colonel with thirty years' experience, I have had the opportunity to evaluate, assess and write efficiency reports on hundreds of Marines from the rank of Sergeant to Lieutenant Colonel. This experience assures me that I am capable and skilled at discerning the qualities of men and women.
After meeting and listening to Erik Aadland, I was able to appraise his character, demeanor, and deportment as a man, and possible Congressman to the US House of Representatives. What I can attest to is that Erik Aadland has consistent, reliable, balanced, integrity and is a man of honor. This assessment is based on my observations of him in the public forum and listening to him on radio talk show broadcasts. My personal relationship with him is warm, friendly and professional. I think of him as a protege who has the courage to embark on a path of continued service to our country in politics.
As a graduate of West Point, it is obvious that he has the mental capacity, the endurance, and stamina to take on the job of a congressman. As a combat commander in Iraq and Afghanistan his proven record as a junior officer leading soldiers under the extremely difficult and dangerous conditions of war provides more than enough reason to put our trust in him as the congressman to represent the people of Colorado District 7.
The soldiers under his command trusted Erik with their lives, and he brought them home in one piece. Erik listened to the concerns of his soldiers while still executing the assigned tasks of those commanders under whom he served and always accomplished the mission. Listening is an important trait for an officer to possess. My experience with Erik is that he does listen to those subordinate to him as well as to those senior to him. This trait convinces me that he will listen and pay heed to the desires and concerns of the constituents of District 7.
Additionally, I should say that loyalty is a two-way street, and the troops can immediately discern all the significant attributes of an officer. The troops don't care about how much you know, but they know how much you care. Loyalty is one of the most important traits an officer must possess, not only to his command but also to his soldiers. The citizens of District 7 can rest assured that Erik Aadland will be a loyal, competent, trustworthy, stalwart representative of the people. He exemplifies all the highest virtues expected of a military officer, and a congressman in the US House of Representatives.
As a son of an Army General Officer, a husband and father, and as a friend, Erik Aadland espouses and demonstrates all the qualities of a person we all hope to associate with. Therefore, I highly recommend Erik be elected to serve District 7 as its representative to Congress as he has my highest endorsement for this office."
-Colonel Tom Duhs

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zagcq6ff6tgpaj6lt5insn539fnv9jgpmu3dirl8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjh6eob4cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqct9hmcp7acdkmgprcd9m6kpr2sjk66pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65spkeeob1olhe1i38plmc1h70tr1eeqr1cj2mlqr2d72m6r33db1c1r72thm6uo6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup36phim2pmadti65j35c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up—that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zqki6hfof848a6ep4tfp31adfagj5f6mecg7qebo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjh6eob4cjh2bs) [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zri9v89e873b05vl29rm8mkrdde64upn9tjli108_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjh6eob4cjh2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zhh24qil1poar0pdo02f58nkgmss8pqlqp6ddo48_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjh6eob4cjh2bs) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zqbji337f4fantvkh00i48p4g4a3fpkiodpsbb2o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjh6eob4cjh2bs) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

name: John James
subject: Only in America…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Congress, Inc
body:
Before you think this is a run-of-the-mill political email, it’s notーbecause I’m not a career politician, and I have zero
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7utta4bqagbhpfkcgu983q1bhkt5nkm0eq4msso_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uhie4sr7mdhbdddncsqnatbjcqr68d5gmhq64c34e6on9d9mm8rb4cb1e5ob4dtnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchjcopb1cr56up32phge2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1cpie4pr1chj649fg)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5jernmjd60u3jcno6nb75sosrt9befsbd93mcko_) | |
---
Hi Co-Pilot,

Before you think this is a run-of-the-mill political email, it’s notー _because I’m not a career politician, and I have zero intention of spending the rest of my life in Washington._
I'm John James, and long before I decided to run as a conservative for Congress in Michigan, I served our country honorably as an Apache Pilot and U.S. Army Ranger.

At age 17, I signed up, determined to serve my country, graduated from West Point, served as a pilot in _Operation Iraqi Freedom_ , leading two Apache platoons.

After 8 years of service, I returned home, but that passion for serving my country and community never left me.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpof83gv5hckg63s8gekhknels0ro8hpjdoamjdg_)

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3g1f2amt43lvakfe1cqfppn82nif6v8euj0eg1o_)
I went to work in our family's automotive supply chain business, eventually working my way up to running the company, _where I’m proud to have created over 100 jobs in Michigan and across the country._

You see, my family’s story is living proof that the American way of life works. In 4 generations, we went from _slave to sharecropper, sharecropper to mason, mason to truck driver, and poverty to prosperity in 1 generation._
**Only in the United States of America is that possible! **

These days, my wife, Elizabeth, and I are busy raising our three sons, active members in our local church, and enjoying the great Michigan outdoors.

Co-Pilot, I often think about how far my family has come through sheer will, hard work, and determination, and **I worry about the America that my sons and the next generation will grow up in.**

We’re rapidly approaching an America where this won’t be true anymore, where the American Dream will be nothing more than a myth, and _where the only people who can prosper are a little wealthy elite in Washington._
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zugo6ref45pk5inv1qlr948i89u8tb0n29dd2s80_)
We are at what President Reagan referred to as _‘A Time for Choosing,’_ and we as a nation must choose which path we wish to follow.
**_I choose exceptionalism over entitlement... _**

**_I choose achievement over apathy..._**

**_I choose freedom over socialism..._**
**I refuse to let the American Dream die with our generationーI know the stakes are high, but I put my oath to protect our Republic above all else.**

**Now, I’m asking YOU to choose to preserve the American Dream and pass it onto the next generation or watch it disappear and fade with ours**.

**[Co-Pilot, send this Combat Veteran to Congress, and I’ll fight with everything I possess to preserve the American Dream >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6ef7rae4h836sugt2ttli4jdv26q0qf7cn543v0_)**
[**LET’S FLY: INVEST $10**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8c3d0l72vibnoo0c9b9i82e3ifs4tbm3ke6qdto_)
[**LET’S FLY: INVEST $25**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z72jkke9va5oh1i6p6df93o9428hjj4ourima8v0_)
[**LET’S FLY: INVEST $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zehafhnjlbcmqj8re4l0mjkmqf625q2uso9f81d0_)
[**LET’S FLY: INVEST $75**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkhvtaokpolnguq79tepa7fvjcgc4viu956rlrcg_)
[**LET’S FLY: INVEST $100**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvclg9q5s2i41v2khmvtg1cobkglcc4oh20r95to_)
Thank you,
John James
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfeghnunad4s988bdh06akuqbjf2bthpmr3fe4pg_)

Peter — two nights ago, Senator Kyrsten Sinema confronted Majority Leader Chuck Schumer on the Senate floor about the chamber's slow voting process: **"Could we have some discipline in the votes, ever? You're in charge!"** We're not sure why she was in such a hurry — especially during a Senate vote — but we do have a few guesses. In fact, we're guessing that it probably looks a little something like this... [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSyTBiUFfLqwto0rcblRlcT7l_YSFdUFavcG3Ee-_kDj0bl-dgaXvLiKAjeXxT7Si8AOljph3ukF_ESC3EYF-BPUrQkeLAiGm3g43GHndf3SRXHwRoIo2LfI9xXEuLV9Oev3LbYs8vp8X1JgNLYIoJbDEWJppY6k4O92s4s7hgocc3_30gAhjyBsPKYpjDhLXva21F1vgIxy2SmZIYdMAb6JWdvj0yaH2ebmpAscuaFMYsMgqg59d6NJ4lTdu08dW7bQN2WFoivRd2FMF18K0gMpv10-XxXxb3LrfKAcRqhnHU8shZ52zZXFXy2NZtQpDyMvWpT3U5ewC3X2O3u3W6lg/3j9/zeIMNQTiRj6YDegmPR005g/h1/0OZLwmKstMi9KsojTNqwROPD67uGWQmaJdQ_CBpvJfw) We've seen it time and again since she took office: Kyrsten Sinema _does_ have time for things. name: Nicolaus Sleister
subject: #BeTheChange
body:
It's time to Be The Change

| [ ](http://www.nick4wa.com/?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nicolaus_fundraiser_feb03&n=1)
---
Hi Peter, When I wake up, I look in the mirror and recite my values. I start each day with who I am and why I'm running so it is at the top of my mind. I have four central values: Trust, Transparency, Integrity, and Equality. Each of my values builds upon one another to create a solid foundation to start each day, conversation, and interaction. [Before I go further, I need to say I can't run this campaign without supporters like you. We need to reach $10,000 this month. Our campaign is grassroots funded, and unlike the incumbent, we **don't** accept corporate or PAC donations. With that said, can you help us by donating **$30** right now?](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzvHRvRqQN3ThG0TfMk5NKrh4pltQRAiCDF_PSwJw1Rkd9uKXyXCVLW_QmpyU0V1CIc&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nicolaus_fundraiser_feb03&n=2) Okay, let me break down how each of these works together and why I believe so much in living each day by my values. I start the morning with trust; if we don't have trust, we have nothing. There is no trust without transparency. I cannot build trust or transparency without being honest, and I cannot have integrity, transparency, or trust without treating everyone equally. I live by these values every day which is why I believe it is time for the people to have a voice once again. [We have such a long way to go but we need your help do make it. This is why I am asking for a donation of **$30** right now to help us reach our goal of $10,000 this month. A small amount compared to the millions the incumbent and Republican are raking in.](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzvHRvRqQN3ThG0TfMk5NKrh7vTMiaIqC7gXZ2KFZwVr21U5N4lKspVRkN2a4jA6Abw&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nicolaus_fundraiser_feb03&n=3) clean_body: It's time to Be The Change | Hi Peter, When I wake up, I look in the mirror and recite my values. I start each day with who I am and why I'm running so it is at the top of my mind. I have four central values: Trust, Transparency, Integrity, and Equality. Each of my values builds upon one another to create a solid foundation to start each day, conversation, and interaction. Okay, let me break down how each of these works together and why I believe so much in living each day by my values. I start the morning with trust; if we don't have trust, we have nothing. There is no trust without transparency. I cannot build trust or transparency without being honest, and I cannot have integrity, transparency, or trust without treating everyone equally. I live by these values every day which is why I believe it is time for the people to have a voice once again. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Your Friend, Nicolaus Sleister Candidate for the U.S. Senate Washington Join us on Social Media! Tag us with #Nick4WA Our mailing address is: CITIZENS FOR NICOLAUS SLEISTER 17404 Meridian East, Suite F #256 Puyallup, Washington 98375 Copyright © 2022 CITIZENS FOR NICOLAUS SLEISTER, All rights reserved. name: Healey Digital Team
subject: FWD: Biden approval poll for friend?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Healey for Congress |
body:
If we don’t get a response, we’ll have to assume you support Joe Biden Friend, Bob asked us to reach out yesterday to get your thoughts on Joe Biden’s job performance, but we never heard back. **Let us know where you stand on this:** [](http://links.donatetohealey.com/u/click?_t=b85a497f2e8f41748b694630e904c604&_m=69dd6099d54b4d04a8248706bea55181&_e=kVSvZ_vNzf6nhOg13dDhrnnSj_8ryn1-htH_dZJzQq8rYbXToDanjBuYZeRpGjWgxSpfipfWWPkgoVAPfWWXWlsx24OtBzxKj-jjGIO4tuBc--tNxCL4P-d__gEpz61IDOP77FurMdP2_UGNjjJqP9cOk1yRwbLdxyxgr3T7ZoQmLlkz0x8L-Tdp1hNbIlM2wjhNgIrMc2mbLFmjb0SiCbJDB8O5a1bT1OwSsVyryT3uUps1C2kQzd0ONhzrjmV2GT-38T2B3TyHJCPC8kt0cDYjcFik3mEg5F65RR79XaQn_Kj9Y3ZDt7wgnAw7hclFDwOQydoJC5kLtBpl9v860eiBIFUp481aeaWPIu8iViBa9rLL4gX-Jwi83enB5AYSi-UmoPCxg13CCVSYqKVb682rtZuoYEKVdVBHei4Od_VkMb8gEE6EJZpVk1E4b9xp8YshmwS9oyMFhRu5b9Uk1f-iGkaPttc4emgRfD1xghPPTiMUhTBTC1U2B-gnvrW2) Thank you, Digital Team Bob Healey Jr.

\------------Forwarded Email Below------------

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: I promise, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
I'm writing to you from my home in Cedar Rapids ...
| | |
---
Hi Peter,

I'm writing to you from my home in Cedar Rapids. I hope this new year has been off to a great start for you. I'm reaching out to you personally today to ask that you make your very first contribution by donating $5. I promise it will make a meaningful impact in our race to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA). I hope you'll allow me a moment to explain.
Right now, polling from the Des Moines Register shows Sen. Grassley has a record-low approval rating with Iowa voters. He's vulnerable, and Republicans know that he's on thin ice. It's probably why the Senate Republican campaign arm has been actively attacking me, and they have more than $32 million in the bank to go on attacking me and protecting their Trump-endorsed incumbent. I want you to hear this from me: I have every intention of winning this race, but I cannot do it without an unprecedented movement made up of people like you donating $5, $10 or $20 at a time. Your hard-earned dollars build up this movement.
More than $32 million in Republican money is a lot to compete with. The full backing of Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump is a lot to compete with. But we _can_ compete and win if we build up the strongest grassroots movement possible! That's why it's so important that you make your first contribution of $5 or whatever you can spare to defeat Sen. Grassley. The best link to donate is right here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abby-finkenauer-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41402799/328655047/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk677-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWVlMWFiNC00NTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mTsdu0EOC6rXG-3Nfw_Om5e9IwHpa0s874LeJqeOVro=)**
I am not someone who backs down from a challenge, and I've gone up against people like Sen. Grassley before: I won an election against a man double my age, flipped a House seat blue and became the youngest woman to pass legislation through the House. Still, as a young woman in public service, I can't count the number of times I've been underestimated or counted out.
The pundits and so-called experts will say what they want to say, but at the end of the day, I know that with lots of hard work and unwavering grassroots support, we will flip this Senate seat blue.
This is personal. Right now, working families in communities across Iowa are being failed by a senator who has left them behind. Those families are _my_ family. Dad was a union pipefitter-welder, and Mom worked for the Dubuque public school system. They inspired me to show up for my community, which is exactly why I'm running to defeat Sen. Grassley. It's time to lift up the voices of Iowa's working families in the Senate.
Peter, I appreciate you sticking with me as I write about what this race means to me. I'm going to bring this email to a close. But before I do, I've got to press the importance of building up a grassroots movement again. When you chip in $5, along with hundreds of other people, it adds up to something powerful. It adds up to a campaign that can compete and win. So please, will you make your first donation to help me win in Iowa and defeat Sen. Grassley? Here's that link again: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abby-finkenauer-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41402800/328655048/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk677-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWVlMWFiNC00NTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mTsdu0EOC6rXG-3Nfw_Om5e9IwHpa0s874LeJqeOVro=)**
With so much gratitude,

Abby
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41402801/328655049/496662621?refcode=jtk677-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWVlMWFiNC00NTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mTsdu0EOC6rXG-3Nfw_Om5e9IwHpa0s874LeJqeOVro=&emci=7abea63c-1985-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=81ee1ab4-4585-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=13784334#!).
To unsubscribe from this email list, please click [here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/7abea63c-1985-ec11-94f6-281878b85110/81ee1ab4-4585-ec11-94f6-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWVlMWFiNC00NTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mTsdu0EOC6rXG-3Nfw_Om5e9IwHpa0s874LeJqeOVro=&id=117985518). name: maggiehassan.com
subject: There's too much at stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41402863/328655224/-1829049351?refcode=jtk623-fr-donors&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGVlMWFiNC00NTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KPYKX5Bu5ooyTGoeO2BDusW6EpuF6Lo-mJTBBRdwi3g=)
---
**Friend: Here are three things you urgently need to know to help protect our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority:**
1\. Political experts are calling Sen. Maggie Hassan's seat in New Hampshire one of the most vulnerable in the country.

2\. Senator Hassan doesn’t have as many resources as other top Democrats, BUT the GOP is spending more against her than any other Senate Democrat in the country - more than $7 million and counting.

3\. If we lose here in New Hampshire, we have no chance of holding our Democratic majority in the Senate.
**There is simply too much on the line, and securing Sen. Hassan's vulnerable seat is critical to maintaining our razor-thin Senate majority. **
That’s why we’ve set a goal to raise another $15,000 by midnight, but right now, we’re not on track. We cannot afford to fall behind now:

name: Chris Wilson
subject: Mandel maintains double-digit lead in U.S. Senate race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Josh
body:
To: Interested Parties
From: Chris Wilson, President of WPA Intelligence
Date: February 2, 2022
Subj: Mandel maintains double-digit lead in U.S. Senate race

A new poll released today by WPA Intelligence and conducted on behalf of Josh
Mandel’s campaign for U.S. Senate shows Mandel continuing his commanding
double-digit lead in the U.S. Senate race in Ohio. The poll was conducted via
live callers January 30 - February 1, 2022.

Mandel continues his commanding double-digit lead in the polls despite other
campaigns spending millions on TV, Radio, Digital and Mandel not yet spending
money on advertising

* Mandel continues to lead by double digits, despite opponents and opposing
super PACs spending millions on TV, Radio and Digital advertising. The Mandel
campaign has yet to begin advertising.
* While other campaigns continue to spend millions on advertising, they are
achieving only soft and temporary support in the single digits and low teens.
* Mandel has a strong and unwavering voter base that has kept him in the lead
since the onset of the campaign.
* Mandel’s name identification and favorability remain strong with all
segments of Republican Primary voters and in all parts of Ohio, while others in
the race continue to see their unfavorable ratings rise over time.
* With strong positive name identification, a continued overwhelming lead on
the ballot, and a strong war chest that has not yet been tapped for
advertising, Josh Mandel is well positioned to maintain his status as the heavy
Republican frontrunner and likely Republican nominee for U.S. Senate in Ohio.
Methodology

WPAi conducted a poll of n = 514 Republican primary voters in Ohio. Data was
collected by a combination of live telephone interviews to landlines and to
cell phones between January 30th – February 1st, 2022. Forty seven percent
(47%) of interviews were conducted to cell phones and 53% to landline phones.
The sample was selected from the Ohio voter file using Probability Proportional
to Size (PPS) sampling and was stratified by geography, age, gender, and vote
history to ensure a representative sample. The survey has a margin of error
of +4.4% at the 95% confidence level.

About WPA Intelligence

WPAi has been the data team behind the 2016 Cruz for President effort, the
providers of data strategy for the Las Vegas Raiders relocation, an integral
part of the RNC Voter Scores program, and, most recently, the team behind the
analytics and polling for Glenn Youngkin’s 2021 Virginia Gubernatorial campaign.

WPAi has been nationally recognized for providing cutting-edge intelligence to
help our clients win. The American Association of Political Consultants (AAPC)
has awarded WPAi with six Pollies, and we have been recognized by Campaigns &
Elections’ Reed Awards for the Best Use of Data Analytics/Machine Learning,
Best New Research Technique, and Best Application of AI Technology to Optimize
Targeting.

Paid for by Team Josh

A joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Citizens for Josh
Mandel, Inc., Justice Opportunity Strength Honor PAC, and Shelby County
Republican Party Federal Account.

PO Box 24875, Mayfield Heights, OH 44124

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com <mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com>.
Don't want to receive these emails anymore?Unsubscribe
<http://links.joshmandel2022.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=128ebb110d2d4fa293c540634a1733e0&_s=f9608c2e90754f41ab71550c31dca5cf&_t=nwoG6PTbaEUeuRgwCfqXJGLmRLIKq6h-w6sOQgCF8bTod70QJLuooElA94QoKkw7Ntf7pvKQ5ze3JzpaDdB3j-jOkcLaqT0a4cGv18QPSrAM6MF7WzWyLuDEx8Tn7cjpE7WhU3CMusasxLGopAC15fDhkOY8u2LgsnhgtFivUqM%3D>
Mandel for Senate, P. O. BOX 24875, MAYFIELD HEIGHTS, OH 44124

Friend,

Over the past months, we've built a historic movement from the ground up to flip Florida blue and expand our Senate majority. That's why I'm so proud to announce that our campaign just reached an incredible new milestone:
**300,000 individual grassroots donors are on Team Demings and committed to electing a leader Floridians deserve.**

Val Demings

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41403261/328657128/2058529741?refcode=AU_DVA_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220203_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzEyMTIzNi00OTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FGljIGAygLMk98FjSmpzspWfQKusaxBLaphNCNWO3C0=&emci=f2ca6f18-3b85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=dc121236-4985-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=5086640)
---
Peter — we’ve warned that with the Supreme Court on the verge of overturning _Roe_ , states could start passing legislation that restricts the right to safe, legal abortion. It’s beginning: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41403262/328657129/-737680728?refcode=AU_DVA_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220203_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzEyMTIzNi00OTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FGljIGAygLMk98FjSmpzspWfQKusaxBLaphNCNWO3C0=&emci=f2ca6f18-3b85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=dc121236-4985-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=5086640) Pennsylvania Republicans have tried to ram multiple anti-abortion bills through the state legislature, including a six-week abortion ban — before many people know they’re pregnant. Now, with _Roe_ more in danger than ever before, extremist legislators feel even more emboldened to strip away an individual’s right to choose. Let’s make one thing clear: the GOP’s attacks on reproductive freedoms are not rooted in medicine or science. They’re rooted in the desire to control women’s bodies. **It is why passing the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ is more important than ever.** The House of Representatives passed the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ last summer, marking the first time in history that the House has passed legislation designed specifically to protect the right to abortion access nationwide. Now, it’s waiting for a vote in the U.S. Senate — and we must move to get it signed into law immediately. [**With abortion rights on the line, we can’t waste another day without federal protections. Will you sign on to our petition now to demand the Senate pass the _Women’s Health Protection Act_?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41403263/328657130/-737680728?refcode=AU_DVA_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220203_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzEyMTIzNi00OTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FGljIGAygLMk98FjSmpzspWfQKusaxBLaphNCNWO3C0=&emci=f2ca6f18-3b85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=dc121236-4985-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=5086640) | [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41403264/328657131/-737680728?refcode=AU_DVA_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220203_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzEyMTIzNi00OTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FGljIGAygLMk98FjSmpzspWfQKusaxBLaphNCNWO3C0=&emci=f2ca6f18-3b85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=dc121236-4985-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=5086640)

As a physician who specialized in women’s health, Val has sat down with patients facing really difficult decisions. Those decisions must stay between a patient and their doctor. Full stop.
Thanks,
Team Val

clean_body: | Peter — we’ve warned that with the Supreme Court on the verge of overturning Roe , states could start passing legislation that restricts the right to safe, legal abortion. It’s beginning: Pennsylvania Republicans have tried to ram multiple anti-abortion bills through the state legislature, including a six-week abortion ban — before many people know they’re pregnant. Now, with Roe more in danger than ever before, extremist legislators feel even more emboldened to strip away an individual’s right to choose. Let’s make one thing clear: the GOP’s attacks on reproductive freedoms are not rooted in medicine or science. They’re rooted in the desire to control women’s bodies. It is why passing the Women’s Health Protection Act is more important than ever. The House of Representatives passed the Women’s Health Protection Act last summer, marking the first time in history that the House has passed legislation designed specifically to protect the right to abortion access nationwide. Now, it’s waiting for a vote in the U.S. Senate — and we must move to get it signed into law immediately. | As a physician who specialized in women’s health, Val has sat down with patients facing really difficult decisions. Those decisions must stay between a patient and their doctor. Full stop. Thanks, Team Val = Val Arkoosh for U.S. Senate P.O. Fellow American,

Did you know:

* The number of people waiting for immigration court decisions is greater than the population of Philadelphia.

* 1.9 million illegal immigrants were apprehended at the southern border in 2021. **That’s larger than the population of San Antonio**.

* Intentional killings of police officers reached a 20-year high in 2021.

My name is Monica De La Cruz and I’m a Republican candidate for Congress in Texas 15th Congressional District - **the ONLY COMPETITIVE SEAT in Texas as of 2022.**

**Keep scrolling to watch my TV AD.**

In case you haven’t heard from me before, **[please accept this email as an invitation to join my campaign to help stop the Democrat socialists in their tracks](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=221e5e0249824ba1adc4a7ebb12656c0&_e=JEk-pRyTt1-MWRN1e0UE2rc1mg2k25nCAK-bkZ87rfJe5ZJjy9QMzxXqiQIpjzjF0EUO1QB3CwFtUa9xRkJwDDytmHUDPnydgTHTarM-tG7Vn5euS8RBJ1qmuWbGx_412NkgJqc_0IvQLDgmA2PeDBRgb8vjfgtCTPB1M6jviHWafPYInXQ6A0wPfXFOVx509Jm2yLQxGwrU-3aR3AYhJOaF05B6T1iEmwI0Vo4iyF0XbxQLIfofwYmE0wU332ek5kGv0GebFNO7hRIr-LxKuO2SxUTB6-L-OYrycmu8fboHtT3_8_PvIkSgeOYHnpFXzhtRpMFmTA18j1StkkfNdxngew0QDuRH_YQ8kxOqz41Gjqh28mjzwOPvtnGEIrJVUKjuY4yrYE8yVINj8TRGP4nu2WB7feGVS2Y2ma9loRtxlmjGJSqnKzeLxqtH0CqSuWmpi_tiB1iGBPkIXUG4DGdqHMndqIiNjUQdci9OPpw%3D)**.

I’m a single mother raising two children on the Texas-Mexico border and to be frank,**I’ve had enough of the BS that hard-working Americans like me living in South Texas experience due to Democrat antipathy toward solving the border crisis**.

For generations, Democrats have dominated elections here in South Texas, but in 2020, I came within 6,588 votes of toppling the leftist congressman in his bid for reelection. I’m running once again because we’re on the verge of collapse if we don’t course correct immediately.

**[I just released my second campaign ad which we’re calling “unsecure.” We’re hoping that the message resonates with voters I need to turn out to win the election. Right now, I’m asking you to take 30 seconds out of your day to review the footage for me](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=221e5e0249824ba1adc4a7ebb12656c0&_e=JEk-pRyTt1-MWRN1e0UE2rc1mg2k25nCAK-bkZ87rfJe5ZJjy9QMzxXqiQIpjzjF0EUO1QB3CwFtUa9xRkJwDDytmHUDPnydgTHTarM-tG7Vn5euS8RBJ1qmuWbGx_412NkgJqc_0IvQLDgmA2PeDBRgb8vjfgtCTPB1M6jviHWafPYInXQ6A0wPfXFOVx509Jm2yLQxGwrU-3aR3AYhJOaF05B6T1iEmwI0Vo4iyF0XbxQLIfofwYmE0wU332ek5kGv0GebFNO7hRIr-LxKuGyBtS8AcWObHazhnxjsA2IINnPXpB4Q6Tl-wtdM1odcY8vOIcrWlwGMx-8kGzKzbwHZYi37dO_46Copr3NZssvKIQ8ROpks9ypvVQziaHRkA1sjihO9E8uHEOASdxVQrYeB2A7iJZUQbPxU4FE5boeq3B25z74dLUw2u4HxYcYMxbw2RL77zlHPg-TGdaNKLXzeZ4akHFYOQailUmKMjKw%3D)**.

body:
I honor those who have come before me and continue to lift up the next generation of Black leaders.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41403438/328657614/-1590707639?refcode=BLU-ASC-20220203-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWFhNzQzMC00YTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mCq9w1PaKz_vzP9n7FzYj5ve8-Lis1-ykljYhl-YCHw=)

| Peter,

This month is Black History Month, an opportunity to honor the achievements of Black Americans.

Being Black is a core element of my identity. I am a proud graduate of an HBCU. My sorority, Delta Sigma Theta, is a historically Black, service-focused sorority through which I have learned so much and gained so many opportunities to help folks in my community.

As a Black woman running for Congress and a leader in my community, I honor those who have come before me and continue to lift up the next generation of Black leaders.

As we celebrate Black History Month and uplift the Black community, may we all recommit to our fight for justice and equity for all people.

With gratitude, [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41403439/328657615/-1590707639?refcode=BLU-ASC-20220203-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWFhNzQzMC00YTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mCq9w1PaKz_vzP9n7FzYj5ve8-Lis1-ykljYhl-YCHw=)

body:

|

| Patriots,

Sheriff Glen Hill, from my home county, has endorsed my campaign for Congress. I am proud to have his support in this fight to bring common sense leadership back to Virginia’s 10th Congressional District.

While Nancy Pelosi and Jennifer Wexton are soft on crime, I am the opposite. I support our law enforcement officers and ensure they have the proper funding and support to do their jobs. That’s why Sheriff Hill has chosen to support me in this race.

He has seen the work I’ve done in Prince William County, and knows I’ll bring that same fight & tireless drive to the United States Congress. But I cannot do this without your support. Please consider supporting me TODAY in this fight to #TakeBackVA10!

name: Dean Heller
subject: We caught CNN lying red handed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dean Heller for Nevada Governor |
body:
CNN’s Chris Cillizza asked my campaign if I had any evidence for my belief that the 2020 election was a disaster. We BURIED him in facts, as you can s **I’M IN THE CROSSHAIRS OF CNN** _CNN is calling me a conspiracy theorist for questioning _ _the integrity of the 2020 election results._ [**FIGHT BACK AGAINST FAKE NEWS**](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=db1b7f43e930489c97d60520750c6570&_e=EckE9KBWjx7GnRGeZau95jtLgWeZAeIoajwQwA6ND_21AgNf8RaCQ_amHgkR-QTKh0FYGg1awJSRF3VMVpJcNJ7d-jRkGwW0cVmudL_7Hq4AWHQ2iHuYRp_fAfBxmsvL3hegNZ4KJOiliN52Lyu8qbnQ6gGWXTYV8-AAnb7gZVRqsoIjACQfx2goOTHP54QP3fD9-JN6luYgKYwARFf7gayljcJrfe9MGVx1VAN8KLEaNPYxUTb30-87cG-XTXs4RnnWLwU_hUvwIl0JX21-eo4wFokUCSJ_8YY0lrX9IjA-NsVDAZ7qFcGHQjibZ_KETFTT4oq4ieOsxKPIESMu2CwqwYc7wJZW_7yRbYx1nu6-o3qB9MiE3Q8B9PlmIC9hWrCNP4fvxMVv7pTLgIqJTOjdQEYtIzK7r0WH9Nho3BiT3L26ZvUYh9ILSeeY1jUacB4eWudZ4y5QILdXPbsZJbRQPES7ucoytOEbnHCWHGOh0T-RZZ6Ng6cycSW4jLj3) | |
---
[](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=db1b7f43e930489c97d60520750c6570&_e=EckE9KBWjx7GnRGeZau95jtLgWeZAeIoajwQwA6ND_21AgNf8RaCQ_amHgkR-QTKh0FYGg1awJSRF3VMVpJcNJ7d-jRkGwW0cVmudL_7Hq4AWHQ2iHuYRp_fAfBxmsvL3hegNZ4KJOiliN52Lyu8qbnQ6gGWXTYV8-AAnb7gZVRqsoIjACQfx2goOTHP54QP3fD9-JN6luYgKYwARFf7gayljcJrfe9MGVx1VAN8KLEaNPYxUTb30-87cG-XTXs4RnnWLwU_hUvwIl0JX21-eo4wFokUCSJ_8YY0lrX9IjBxztn6WxFJRFf9WhOA4o2y6KJk2Wk0R2Yw5ws2FHy0gud6pxlTFlGIB5j-AwWugL3HhIPRIXuXwOhB_sVQbaE6R2bjVCzp4Y7FwfGbImVLOuQmrCMMSDlmvyZogj12roB0bp-okMpf6c97e9xPCt2wCVydEYZCVlIv0cR0maK0EfAQanRPI6JtamMyj2Q2BcVhIAJM_azMxxga8suSX3ss)
|
---
Peter,

Two days ago I called Joe Biden an illegitimate President. Because that’s what he is.

The liberal media predictably flipped out.

[](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=db1b7f43e930489c97d60520750c6570&_e=EckE9KBWjx7GnRGeZau95jtLgWeZAeIoajwQwA6ND_21AgNf8RaCQ_amHgkR-QTKh0FYGg1awJSRF3VMVpJcNJ7d-jRkGwW0cVmudL_7Hq4AWHQ2iHuYRp_fAfBxmsvL3hegNZ4KJOiliN52Lyu8qbnQ6gGWXTYV8-AAnb7gZVRqsoIjACQfx2goOTHP54QP3fD9-JN6luYgKYwARFf7gayljcJrfe9MGVx1VAN8KLEaNPYxUTb30-87cG-XTXs4RnnWLwU_hUvwIl0JX21-eo4wFokUCSJ_8YY0lrX9IjDj3XM4i1nqCnEOn0kx_WSpjOSZbFssDstvTDunuVqbEG6RNNZ-x6kfpWr2rGwZrBoGsP8XzPuSpdiRVA7FgtFoLV3LgBigdzk_8CDq8v2m8p2vh682Hu4LF0M30EpkjUIfFvnV92ZmD0vSRzvSC17oEyw-Ym7xUyZK63wqWhAn22lMoeFKiF6TZobpIi0upDCdHNj_NxUsK891g24iSD7d)

**_THEN –_** _CNN’s Chris Cillizza asked my campaign if I had any evidence for my belief that the 2020 election was a disaster. We BURIED him in facts, as you can see below:_

[](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=db1b7f43e930489c97d60520750c6570&_e=EckE9KBWjx7GnRGeZau95jtLgWeZAeIoajwQwA6ND_21AgNf8RaCQ_amHgkR-QTKh0FYGg1awJSRF3VMVpJcNJ7d-jRkGwW0cVmudL_7Hq4AWHQ2iHuYRp_fAfBxmsvL3hegNZ4KJOiliN52Lyu8qbnQ6gGWXTYV8-AAnb7gZVRqsoIjACQfx2goOTHP54QP3fD9-JN6luYgKYwARFf7gayljcJrfe9MGVx1VAN8KLEaNPYxUTb30-87cG-XTXs4RnnWLwU_hUvwIl0JX21-eo4wFokUCSJ_8YY0lrX9IjBqBEctAQt8hMRW1rjX81id0ujdwIIMiSIzZjtyDhIH8_eZZb7G6LCEElScKO6xWLvqo_edzeDqRE4X6NkXuV7C0MftdYwL1OXkL2_OHGy90dAhc5EpJAcTl8ORTRzyTu8t4KQ5zgt2TbM7hJV4Cqr_ZyKvBeST7fpBGCO23sA7fam3Gb2Nrf1HDWoso6NiPOrcq2X1e-XT1hGmNS7D-Di4)

**_NOW –_** __ Guess what? Cilizza refused to even so much PRINT the quote, or to even show our examples: examples like CNN censoring the Hunter Biden story the weekend before the election, or Mark Zuckerberg pouring hundreds of millions into Democrat counties to pay Democrat operatives to run local elections, or courts illegally rewriting state election laws,

He ignored all this, then called me a conspiracy theorist and pretended that we had not given him any examples at all.

_“When I asked the campaign, they offered some conspiracy theories about the 2020 election...”_

We didn’t give him a single conspiracy theory. We cited FACTS that made CNN look bad, and they buried them.

**Peter, this is EXACTLY why Americans don’t trust the mainstream media.**

Instead of finding facts and reporting the truth, outlets like CNN suppress facts to serve their biased agenda.
[**TURN NEVADA RED: SECURE OUR ELECTIONS**](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=db1b7f43e930489c97d60520750c6570&_e=EckE9KBWjx7GnRGeZau95jtLgWeZAeIoajwQwA6ND_21AgNf8RaCQ_amHgkR-QTKh0FYGg1awJSRF3VMVpJcNJ7d-jRkGwW0cVmudL_7Hq4AWHQ2iHuYRp_fAfBxmsvL3hegNZ4KJOiliN52Lyu8qbnQ6gGWXTYV8-AAnb7gZVRqsoIjACQfx2goOTHP54QP3fD9-JN6luYgKYwARFf7gayljcJrfe9MGVx1VAN8KLEaNPYxUTb30-87cG-XTXs4RnnWLwU_hUvwIl0JX21-eo4wFokUCSJ_8YY0lrX9IjCBoANtQ5l5nKRlKZW7FCu4g2WDVkQwmGBaN3O-X6JogK_9ERCE6zXb_qzPKBVWpeoWzxe6txnlhsUfGFRplIexZsPG8_W7dDY-NvI-G8w5KRxqWJ0tQimjkvt4tkMzFl0DM1l9IQCNBvKiCV-3zpsbxuHvaPYuqniHycQjLNmW10OWb9lZxI5XWgrB1ThJ-GvOdycTJyvZPM3ej1vJkNOU)
We all know there were problems with the 2020 election –– especially with universal mail-in voting and illegal ballot harvesting here in Nevada.

_Now, Democrats want to federalize our elections and make universal mail-in voting PERMANENT._

**I’m running for governor because we need to secure our elections with voter ID and other common-sense reforms. I’m taking on the dishonest media and saying things that other Republicans don’t have the guts to say.**

[**Can I count on you to fight back against CNN and turn Nevada RED so we can secure our elections?**](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=db1b7f43e930489c97d60520750c6570&_e=EckE9KBWjx7GnRGeZau95jtLgWeZAeIoajwQwA6ND_21AgNf8RaCQ_amHgkR-QTKh0FYGg1awJSRF3VMVpJcNJ7d-jRkGwW0cVmudL_7Hq4AWHQ2iHuYRp_fAfBxmsvL3hegNZ4KJOiliN52Lyu8qbnQ6gGWXTYV8-AAnb7gZVRqsoIjACQfx2goOTHP54QP3fD9-JN6luYgKYwARFf7gayljcJrfe9MGVx1VAN8KLEaNPYxUTb30-87cG-XTXs4RnnWLwU_hUvwIl0JX21-eo4wFokUCSJ_8YY0lrX9IjDAiDJjr03R-TyV-dycqxcADBkc_HEpy1PEhBKo7dQOG7cJAyBHJ2Gy-XB5oNFB6q8sli6TdYE7X_gwfXW4eF0nyBxZl5oeatdUOY5_ceqobyLRvVuhsQroN7Psyn07sik08wkgfhlyIu_eRl2GcQuiBgObJOYi54QUQ1xdOjUcFrkLwL9p0cC4L4hcLOFzI5lyQokLoOpxBzzg11VNMxzX)

Thanks,

Dean Heller

Cilizza refused to even so much PRINT the quote, or to even show our examples: examples like CNN censoring the Hunter Biden story the weekend before the election, or Mark Zuckerberg pouring hundreds of millions into Democrat counties to pay Democrat operatives to run local elections, or courts illegally rewriting state election laws, He ignored all this, then called me a conspiracy theorist and pretended that we had not given him any examples at all. “When I asked the campaign, they offered some conspiracy theories about the 2020 election...” We didn’t give him a single conspiracy theory. We cited FACTS that made CNN look bad, and they buried them. Peter, this is EXACTLY why Americans don’t trust the mainstream media. Instead of finding facts and reporting the truth, outlets like CNN suppress facts to serve their biased agenda. We all know there were problems with the 2020 election –– especially with universal mail-in voting and illegal ballot harvesting here in Nevada. Now, Democrats want to federalize our elections and make universal mail-in voting PERMANENT. I’m running for governor because we need to secure our elections with voter ID and other common-sense reforms. I’m taking on the dishonest media and saying things that other Republicans don’t have the guts to say. Thanks, Dean Heller | | | Paid for by Dean Heller for Nevada Governor | | 18124 Wedge Pkwy #1044, Reno, NV 89511 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

body:
DeSantis attacks our freedoms again

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41403565/328658328/-1468176026?refcode=hb5_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWYyZmNmYy00Yjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cc0sM_wcSVTgI6CGUj9y3I9H2gM4lBvoOZftxCDi894=) Peter, Yesterday, a Florida Senate committee voted to advance the GOP’s 15-week abortion ban. But that’s not all they did. **In a last-ditch bid for some level of humanity in the bill, Democrats introduced an exception for rape, incest, and human trafficking.****_But Republicans voted it down._**** ** Before they did, I went in front of the committee to stand with Florida women and fight this ban. Here’s what I told them: **** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41403566/328658329/-1468176026?refcode=hb5_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWYyZmNmYy00Yjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cc0sM_wcSVTgI6CGUj9y3I9H2gM4lBvoOZftxCDi894=) This vote is a clear sign that the Florida GOP isn’t working for their constituents. They aren’t working for us. Women were _begging_ them not to do this — not to inflict this trauma on thousands of women in the worst possible circumstances. We know exactly who’s pulling the strings. We know who’s ordering his lackeys to pass this bill and vote against these exceptions. **_It all comes back to Governor DeSantis. _** **This won’t end until we defeat DeSantis, Peter. When I win this race, I’ll block every single bill like HB 5 that comes across my desk — any bill that limits the rights of women, controls women’s bodies, or forces women to give birth even in the most traumatic circumstances.** [**But until then, we need to stand together and rally behind leaders who are fighting back. So I’m asking you to chip in $10 to help us defeat DeSantis and support my work fighting for Florida women. Click here to make a contribution today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41403567/328658330/-1468176026?refcode=hb5_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWYyZmNmYy00Yjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cc0sM_wcSVTgI6CGUj9y3I9H2gM4lBvoOZftxCDi894=) **** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately._ | [$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41403568/328658331/-1468176026?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=hb5_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWYyZmNmYy00Yjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cc0sM_wcSVTgI6CGUj9y3I9H2gM4lBvoOZftxCDi894=) | [$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41403569/328658332/-1468176026?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=hb5_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWYyZmNmYy00Yjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cc0sM_wcSVTgI6CGUj9y3I9H2gM4lBvoOZftxCDi894=) | [$20](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41403570/328658333/-1468176026?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=hb5_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWYyZmNmYy00Yjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cc0sM_wcSVTgI6CGUj9y3I9H2gM4lBvoOZftxCDi894=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michelle=20Benson?=
subject: Holding the MN Dept of Education Accountable
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR MINNESOTA COMMITTEE
body:
Benson joins Colleagues to Call for Audit to Get to Bottom of Nearly $200 Million Fraud Scheme | | | | [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=5d083158d0&e=9d6926af69)
---
| | | Dear Fellow Republicans,

You may have seen the news on the latest government fraud scheme: Walz’s Education Department has been providing funding to organizations that have major alleged fraud allegations.

So this week I took action against wasteful and fraudulent government spending. Along with other Senate leaders, we are demanding audits of the Feeding Our Future grants that have since[ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=125990438d&e=9d6926af69)[led to criminal charges](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=5afe98babe&e=9d6926af69) against the charity’s leaders.

[](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=4b79660c7a&e=9d6926af69)**Several news outlets have now reported on the fraud scheme:**

· ** **** [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=5febd4a38e&e=9d6926af69)[Senators want audit of Department of Education following fraud allegations](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=e1c4474b06&e=9d6926af69)

· [Amid FBI investigation, lawmakers want audit of Dept. of Education oversight](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=0fd33849fc&e=9d6926af69)

· [Feds investigate nonprofit Feeding Our Future for alleged fraud](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=dfdb78836e&e=9d6926af69)**

I am **determined to see justice for those who have been wronged and demand accountability for taxpayers whose money was stolen and abused.**

[Join with me and Minnesotans across the state demanding that Tim Walz and his administration are held accountable.](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=19b759831b&e=9d6926af69)

Sincerely,
[](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=53f995869e&e=9d6926af69)
Michelle Benson

name: Emily @ Team Benson
subject: The number that matters to us most
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
I want to share with you a statistic from the reporting cycle that just ended because it means a lot to us at Team Benson: 91 percent of our contributions were $100 or less.

This shows us that our campaign is not funded by large donor interests, and it certainly isn’t supported by anyone with DeVos in their name. It's funded by supporters like you, friend . People who are concerned about the future of democracy and who know that Secretary Benson’s leadership will protect Michigan’s elections for years to come.

It’s great to know that so many people are excited about Jocelyn’s re-election and willing to make a financial contribution to the campaign. But it also means that we’re going to have to sustain this grassroots effort until election day.

Now you know me, friend, I’m not one for bogus deadlines, I just want to give you the truth. Will you join our donor network today, and give your first contribution to this campaign?

Donate monthly>> [secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=020322ND]
When we’re celebrating Jocelyn’s re-election 10 months from now, it’ll be because of supporters like you. Thanks for your support, friend.

Emily

body:

| | Dear Patriot:

Here in Arkansas, we support our Second Amendment.

The Regime doesn't give us our freedoms.

_God does._

But our God-given right to Self-Defense is under attack like never before from the Left.

**They want to take our guns. They say it every day.

_RINOs like my opponent, Deep State Steve Womack, are helping them do it by supporting Red Flag gun confiscation._**

They're defunding the police.

They're letting drug dealers, rapists, and murderers go free. George Soros-funded District Attorneys across our country are refusing to enforce the law.

Crime is out of control, and murders are skyrocketing.

**Meanwhile, they want to make sure that normal, decent, patriotic citizens like you and I can't defend ourselves.**

They want to make sure that all we have is a criminal underclass and a totalitarian overclass.

_There has never been more reason to own a gun. You owe it to yourself and, more importantly, to your family._

Be ready to defend them against the predators that the Left is unleashing against all of us.

**I'm giving away a Radical Firearms 16" SOCOM 5.56 AR-15 Rifle.**

[](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=ab46dc7d2b&e=eda539b26b)

Initially, this was a Christmas giveaway. But, after the Republican National Committee banned me from WinRed, I decided to extend it for Valentine's Day--_because there is no better expression of love than to be ready to defend your loved ones._

[_**Enter today for your chance to win!**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=feeee0b86f&e=eda539b26b)
