name: Trump News HQ
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
You love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says and what it means, and you aren’t afra
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt5o8karlmju19t0viognfhm6n0iupdbkhdubgf8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbomcclj6mrm5cdjclgj0p1im1j7eptmmhqectb4mcr3corj69on2db3csr36cdnmv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6dj35cljc5jreob664ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5j69pj2c3i66oh5u)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfp5cfm1lapk5jvqhaj11om08jp7dts4030fok6g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjj64o74cdh2bs)
---
| | Good day, fellow American.
You are an informed citizen—I believe that wholeheartedly.
You love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says and what it means, and you aren’t afraid to stand up for America’s founding and the principles of liberty that define our nation.
_**[Your leadership and knowledge are needed today...](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq3jsdqmkk1vqn9tli22dqapfmip8uo4jli3sni8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjj64o74cdh2bs)_**

## Do you believe the American education system is failing millions of young Americans?
[YES](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2vfamnj9r6pu8tlnj8n04ua7t6cqlfsse7mt3jo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjj64o74cdh2bs) [NO](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0eqh1p35ltlpe0i90guhbjh3bo3tp8h9fddofro_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjj64o74cdh2bs) We need more citizens like you— _informed citizens_ —because America is at a turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism.
The country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We can’t let that happen!
That’s why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of Hillsdale College and our new, nationwide initiative—the **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS**.
We are the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal of this new campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand:

* WHAT the Constitution says
* HOW it relates to current issues and events
* WHY the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to liberty

If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people, that our education system failed.
These are young people that “educators” deliberately deceived or who just haven’t learned about a proper understanding of American history in school.
**You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable.**
That’s because we’re seeking _1,000 people_ in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to _10,000,000 Americans_ in the coming year, and this initiative starts with you—YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights.
And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what’s best for the country.
So please, share your opinions by completing the **National Survey on the State of American Education** today at the link below. Thank you for reading my email!
[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/survey-informed-citizen/**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdirj3qgo39n2b1s5ue9tnvg7aj6cuvagciogve0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjj64o74cdh2bs)

For our children,
Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Team Warner
subject: Sign our petition: Level the tech playing field
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
If signed into law, the American Innovation and Choice Online Act will begin to address the undue power of big tech companies, and give consumers and smaller tech startups a fighting chance.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41404189/328662517/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGM4NzhmNC00ZDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FD_O-6vB4CUwOqvnJNX2FgqLV6-77l3bWHvBw71aQUk=&emci=f5117d85-7b84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=84c878f4-4d85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Mark has some exciting news he wanted us to share about a bill he is cosponsoring to rein in deceptive and unfair practices by America’s biggest tech companies. It’s called The American Innovation and Choice Online Act. If signed into law, it will begin to address the undue power of big tech companies, and give consumers and smaller tech startups a fighting chance. The good news is that it just passed out of committee with bipartisan support. But the fact is, passing any sort of tech regulation legislation will take a team effort, and that’s why Mark needs your help today. **_[Sign our petition now if you support making the internet a safer and fairer place by passing the American Innovation and Choice Online Act.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41404190/328662518/-2102685019?ms=mw_em_220203_1&refcode=mw_em_220203_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGM4NzhmNC00ZDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FD_O-6vB4CUwOqvnJNX2FgqLV6-77l3bWHvBw71aQUk=&emci=f5117d85-7b84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=84c878f4-4d85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=4568237)_** Mark could talk your ear off about this bill for hours, but we’ll try to put it in simple terms. Big technology companies have a massive influence over the technology landscape today. And they use that influence to prevent companies with competitive products or offerings from gaining a foothold in the market. That makes it so much harder for smaller tech companies and tech startups to succeed. Their most likely outcome is to be sold to and taken over by one of these big technology companies. And that’s just wrong. Mark is a former businessman in technology himself. He knows that innovation thrives through healthy competition on a level playing field. The American Innovation and Choice Online Act brings us closer to that goal by limiting big tech’s ability to abuse their dominance in the market. **_[The bill just passed committee, and has a real chance of becoming law. Sign our petition to let Mark know you support his efforts to rein in big tech.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41404191/328662519/-2102685019?ms=mw_em_220203_1&refcode=mw_em_220203_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGM4NzhmNC00ZDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FD_O-6vB4CUwOqvnJNX2FgqLV6-77l3bWHvBw71aQUk=&emci=f5117d85-7b84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=84c878f4-4d85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=4568237)_** Thanks, Team Warner **[Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41404192/328662520/-2102685019?ms=mw_em_220203_1&refcode=mw_em_220203_1&refcode=mw_em_220203_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGM4NzhmNC00ZDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FD_O-6vB4CUwOqvnJNX2FgqLV6-77l3bWHvBw71aQUk=&emci=f5117d85-7b84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=84c878f4-4d85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=4568237)**

Friend, there's been an exciting development in the Arizona governor's race:
**FIRST,** experts at Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight called this race a toss-up – meaning Democrats have a chance to win the governorship.
**THEN,** GOP extremists from Marjorie Taylor Greene to Donald Trump himself descended on Arizona to fire up their base, prop up our extremist opponent, Kari Lake (R), and keep our state red.
**NOW** , Democrats across Arizona are lining up behind Marco Lopez (D) because they know he's the leader we need to defeat extremism in our state – and Latino Victory Fund just gave him a _major_ endorsement right as the election year is kicking off.
It's not hard to see why Marco is gaining so much support. He's a voting rights champion and an Obama administration alum – and he's committed to building a state that works for all people.
**But endorsements don't win elections – votes do. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: My friend, Max
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresshttps://secure.actblue.com/donate/email20220203 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email20220203]
Friend,
I want to tell you about one of the very best candidates running for office in 2022: my friend Max Rose.
Max and I met in 2017, back when we were both running our very first campaigns for Congress. We bonded quickly over our shared service background. Max earned a Purple Heart and a Bronze Star for his service in Afghanistan. Max is very New York – brash, competitive and different from the midwest in many ways. But I was impressed by his compassion, intelligence, and ability to connect with the folks he was running to serve.
During that first campaign cycle, we both flipped longtime Republican seats that were critical to flipping the House. And once we were sworn in and became freshman representatives, Max was a friend and vital partner to me in the Problem Solvers Caucus, the fully bipartisan caucus made up of Republicans and Democrats where we work to find common sense solutions.
Selfishly, people like Max – hard workers who are willing to reach across the aisle to anyone serious about improving Americans' lives – make my job a lot easier. We were able to work together on important issues such as combating the opioid crisis and lowering the cost of prescription drugs.
And now, Max is running to represent New York’s 11th Congressional District.
Bottom line: Congress is better when people like Max are in it. That’s why I’m asking if you would consider splitting a contribution between our two campaigns as we work to hold on to the slim Democratic majority in the House. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email20220203] We both have tough fights ahead and your contribution will help us get back to delivering results for the American people.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email20220203]
Elissa

# [#]
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkin] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]

name: Casey Wardynski & Team Wardynski
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CASEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Our campaign is on a roll. Help us DOUBLE DOWN today! >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/b9cc65e483aeb01c/b70cc6c81063b7ddc3d6b838967d376c/36963)
---
Peter, _We’d like to take a moment to thank each and every one of you on this email for your tremendous support during the past few months_ _._ Because of your support, **[we were able to raise $148,368.14 in Q4 of 2021.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/b9cc65e483aeb01c/8f5be938312c6d0ec3d6b838967d376c/36963)** We were able to raise the most funds in the Republican field for AL-05. This was only possible because of your support and we want to say – thank you! January was also a great month for our campaign, and we’re happy to report that we reached our monthly fundraising goal!
---
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/b9cc65e483aeb01c/eb01f18b1127d3f6c3d6b838967d376c/36963)
---
But the battle for our nation’s future is just heating up, and November will be here before you know it. With Supreme Court Justice Breyer now retiring – it's all hands on deck to hold the Senate accountable and ensure we flip the U.S. House of Representatives in November! **I know you’ve been bombarded with donation requests over the past week, but we – Casey and all of Team Wardynski – are asking that you chip in your February donation today to help us DOUBLE DOWN on our momentum and build out our campaign war chest.**
---
[**DONATE HERE >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/b9cc65e483aeb01c/eb2fc15051de56c9c3d6b838967d376c/36963)

Together, we will take back the House, and get a great victory for freedom! Thanks again for your vital support, Casey Wardynski and Team Wardynski

clean_body: Our campaign is on a roll. Help us DOUBLE DOWN today! >>> | | | Peter, We’d like to take a moment to thank each and every one of you on this email for your tremendous support during the past few months . Because of your support, We were able to raise the most funds in the Republican field for AL-05. This was only possible because of your support and we want to say – thank you! January was also a great month for our campaign, and we’re happy to report that we reached our monthly fundraising goal! But the battle for our nation’s future is just heating up, and November will be here before you know it. With Supreme Court Justice Breyer now retiring – it's all hands on deck to hold the Senate accountable and ensure we flip the U.S. House of Representatives in November! I know you’ve been bombarded with donation requests over the past week, but we – Casey and all of Team Wardynski – are asking that you chip in your February donation today to help us DOUBLE DOWN on our momentum and build out our campaign war chest. Together, we will take back the House, and get a great victory for freedom! | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41404329/328665645/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDRiYjE1Yi00Zjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uTApFIW2qhNJMrrswKAC1bv4Y2ygBSdKqBpeCE-u4PQ=)

Peter, February is Black History Month. And although we must always celebrate and acknowledge Black American history, this month is a particular time to reflect on the many trailblazers, icons, and changemakers who have made invaluable contributions to our society.

At a time when Republicans are attempting to cover up our nation's racist history, it is more important than ever that we uplift the truth and grapple with our past in order to pave a better path forward for Black Americans – and all Americans.

As a Member of Congress, I believe it is critical that Congress takes action on racial justice legislation like:
* Protecting Black history in schools
* Passing the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act
* Securing voting rights with the John Lewis Voting Rights Act
* Legalizing marijuana and commuting sentences for non-violent drug offenses
* Canceling student debt
* And so much more

[**Peter, if you’re with me, will you sign my petition demanding Congress take action on critical racial justice legislation NOW in honor of Black History Month? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41404330/328665646/-256427180?refcode=MTFC_20220203_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDRiYjE1Yi00Zjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uTApFIW2qhNJMrrswKAC1bv4Y2ygBSdKqBpeCE-u4PQ=&emci=844cfe4b-3785-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=2d4bb15b-4f85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=18839602) | [5,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED: SIGN ON FOR RACIAL JUSTICE ACTION NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41404331/328665647/-256427180?refcode=MTFC_20220203_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDRiYjE1Yi00Zjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uTApFIW2qhNJMrrswKAC1bv4Y2ygBSdKqBpeCE-u4PQ=&emci=844cfe4b-3785-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=2d4bb15b-4f85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=18839602)

clean_body: | = Peter, February is Black History Month. And although we must always celebrate and acknowledge Black American history, this month is a particular time to reflect on the many trailblazers, icons, and changemakers who have made invaluable contributions to our society. At a time when Republicans are attempting to cover up our nation's racist history, it is more important than ever that we uplift the truth and grapple with our past in order to pave a better path forward for Black Americans – and all Americans. As a Member of Congress, I believe it is critical that Congress takes action on racial justice legislation like: Protecting Black history in schools Passing the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act Securing voting rights with the John Lewis Voting Rights Act Legalizing marijuana and commuting sentences for non-violent drug offenses Canceling student debt And so much more | Thanks for your support, Peter – and happy Black History Month! \-- Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, our Democratic House Majority is seriously at risk. The leadership of progressive Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time. name: Andrea Salinas
subject: The system is rigged, and we’ve got to fix it
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41404467/328670795/-1943795144?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWUwNjg5My01MTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W_TIdrn23NHddyqSMnK9o6_T6JNrkIgcAvY8hY-r6yA=&emci=0de9f9b8-6f79-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=e9e06893-5185-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=5643047)
---

| | Do you know what makes me angry? The fact that teachers pay a bigger share of their income in federal taxes than billionaires do. And it's not just teachers. It's almost everyone. We pay our fair share; billionaires should too. Throughout this challenging pandemic, the richest have only grown richer. They've created and exploited loopholes in our tax code so **they pay only a**** _fraction_****of what they owe.** It's wrong. We need to fix it. I believe that change can happen if we work for it. It's time for Congress to raise taxes on wealthy corporations, impose a minimum tax on corporate national and foreign profits, impose a surcharge on stock buybacks, and more. **[Sign the petition and urge Congress to pass tax fairness. It's time for billionaires to start paying their fair share.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41404468/328670796/-1982149769?source=2022Tax_AS&referrer=group-andrea-salinas&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-andrea-salinas-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2022-01-taxfairness-email%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWUwNjg5My01MTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W_TIdrn23NHddyqSMnK9o6_T6JNrkIgcAvY8hY-r6yA=&emci=0de9f9b8-6f79-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=e9e06893-5185-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=5643047)** **As income inequality rises in America, more and more families live paycheck to paycheck.** Working families have to worry about the pandemic, rising inflation, job loss, and much more, all while paying a quarter to a third of their incomes in taxes. Meanwhile, the ultra-wealthy continue to get richer and richer, often paying an effective tax rate of as little as 3.4%. I know the struggles so many families are dealing with right now. Laws that favor the wealthiest Americans mean that some are allowed to hoard their wealth, while many can't break the cycle of poverty. [**Change is possible. wealthy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41404471/328670797/-1982149769?source=2022Tax_AS&referrer=group-andrea-salinas&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-andrea-salinas-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2022-01-taxfairness-email%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWUwNjg5My01MTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W_TIdrn23NHddyqSMnK9o6_T6JNrkIgcAvY8hY-r6yA=&emci=0de9f9b8-6f79-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=e9e06893-5185-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=5643047) clean_body: | | | Do you know what makes me angry? The fact that teachers pay a bigger share of their income in federal taxes than billionaires do. And it's not just teachers. It's almost everyone. We pay our fair share; billionaires should too. Throughout this challenging pandemic, the richest have only grown richer. They've created and exploited loopholes in our tax code so they pay only a fractionof what they owe. It's wrong. We need to fix it. I believe that change can happen if we work for it. It's time for Congress to raise taxes on wealthy corporations, impose a minimum tax on corporate national and foreign profits, impose a surcharge on stock buybacks, and more. As income inequality rises in America, more and more families live paycheck to paycheck. Working families have to worry about the pandemic, rising inflation, job loss, and much more, all while paying a quarter to a third of their incomes in taxes. Meanwhile, the ultra-wealthy continue to get richer and richer, often paying an effective tax rate of as little as 3.4%. I know the struggles so many families are dealing with right now. Laws that favor the wealthiest Americans mean that some are allowed to hoard their wealth, while many can't break the cycle of poverty. Let's make sure billionaires are paying their fair share. body:
| |
---
Friend, did you see the message I sent around yesterday?
**Because you're one of our top supporters, my team specifically chose _you_ to share your input in our crucial Election Year Strategy Survey – but right now, we're just 58 responses short of our critical goal.**
I'm counting on your invaluable insights to set a winning strategy for Democrats as we fight to defend a 50-50 split Senate from GOP control. We're running out of time to make the early investments needed to win key battleground races, so I need you to weigh in immediately.
**Please, before this survey closes at 11:59 p.m. tonight, take just a moment to share your thoughts.**
**Here's the link:[http://surveys.signforgood.com/rosen-priorities-2022](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41404633/328675514/975827424?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1629-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTg5ZWNhYy01Mzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aZZsES-P-yWfo7JO1b1kknn84dXAu2u7j4PhH5D52zY=&emci=d2e713e2-9384-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=d189ecac-5385-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=3800590)**
Thanks so much. Your feedback will be a big help.
Jacky
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Jacky**
Date: Wed, Feb. 2, 2022
Subject: counting on your input by midnight
Your name is on that list, friend.
| | |
---
Friend,

Because of top supporters like you who stepped up to win back the House, Senate and White House for Democrats, we’ve been able to make real change for working families across the country.
But there’s still a lot of progress to deliver for the American people – on everything from voting rights to reproductive freedom – and it all comes down to defending our razor-thin Senate majority.
As I fight to make sure Democrats don’t lose a single seat during this pivotal election year, I need _your_ help. **My team pulled together a list of our top supporters – those who we believe can share the invaluable insights we need to win this November – and your name is on that list, friend.**
**[So I’m personally asking: Will you take our Election Year Strategy Survey now to help Democrats defend and expand our 50-50 Senate majority and deliver bold progress for the American people?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41404635/328675516/975827424?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1629-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTg5ZWNhYy01Mzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aZZsES-P-yWfo7JO1b1kknn84dXAu2u7j4PhH5D52zY=&emci=d2e713e2-9384-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=d189ecac-5385-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=3800590)**
| | [Begin the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41404637/328675518/975827424?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1629-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTg5ZWNhYy01Mzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aZZsES-P-yWfo7JO1b1kknn84dXAu2u7j4PhH5D52zY=&emci=d2e713e2-9384-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=d189ecac-5385-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=3800590)
---
I mean it when I say the stakes could not be higher. Top political experts from Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight to CNN are reporting that Republicans are favored to take back the Senate, which would spell the end of our entire agenda.
We need all hands on deck to protect key battleground seats – including Catherine Cortez Masto’s seat right here in Nevada – and compete for pickup opportunities everywhere we can. **But the only way we can do that is with the critical input of top grassroots supporters like you.**
**[Please friend, you were specifically chosen to take our Election Year Strategy Survey and help shape our strategy to defend our Democratic Senate majority. Can I count on you to take just a moment before our midnight deadline to submit your response?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41404639/328675520/975827424?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1629-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTg5ZWNhYy01Mzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aZZsES-P-yWfo7JO1b1kknn84dXAu2u7j4PhH5D52zY=&emci=d2e713e2-9384-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=d189ecac-5385-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=3800590)**
Thank you for taking the time. I look forward to going over your insights.

Jacky Rosen
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/d2e713e2-9384-ec11-94f6-281878b85110/d189ecac-5385-ec11-94f6-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTg5ZWNhYy01Mzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aZZsES-P-yWfo7JO1b1kknn84dXAu2u7j4PhH5D52zY=&id=105090150) | | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada

# _Help Endorse Jonah Schulz!_

The Strongsville GOP will be holding their candidate endorsement meeting on Monday, February 2nd at 6:30pm. We need a YUGE turnout of patriots to attend and vote to endorse Jonah Schulz for Congress. Other endorsements will include Senate, Governor, state and local races.

In order to be a voting member you must:
1\. Be a current 2022 Strongsville GOP Member. ($25 for the year, can be paid online or at the door)
2\. Have attended 3 or more Strongsville GOP events within the last 12 months.

Doors open at 5:30pm
_**Location**_ : Best Western Plus Strongsville
15471 Royalton Rd., Strongsville, OH 44136
---
|
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lori=20Chavez=2DDeRemer?=
subject: Crime is still on the rise
body:
Our police need our help

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/ed88dc9fb734/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-6727794?e=c87c5d8d97)
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-2-3-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast23

Friend,

The crime crisis isn’t going away thanks to the Radical Left’s efforts to defund the police.

Right here in Oregon, Portland has become a lawless place filled with violence with homicides hitting record numbers.

As crime continues to surge, it’s important we fight for our law enforcement officers as they struggle through this difficult time of being short staffed and underfunded. As mayor of Happy Valley, I FULLY funded our police force and will lead that fight in Congress.

Can I count on your contribution today so that when I’m in office, I can STAND UP for our police and RESTORE FUNDING?>>> (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-2-3-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast23)

https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-2-3-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast23?amount=100
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-2-3-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast23?amount=50
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-2-3-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast23?amount=25
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-2-3-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast23?amount=10

I have the deepest respect for the police and they deserve better than the situation the Radical Democrats created for them.

Chip in today so together we can restore proper funding and resources to the brave men and women who dedicate their lives to protecting our communities.>>> (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-2-3-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast23)

https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-2-3-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast23

Thank you,

Lori Chavez-DeRemer

https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-2-3-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast23

Hello,
I picked up the newspaper to see a rather peculiar headline... a knee-slapper.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41405036/328681090/-42398318?refcode=em20220203pm2-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODY2YmFjMy01NTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T30wGTOV_ao3JjJ4PJTOndBKrZIx0I55H7Mnqh99yPY=)
Apparently my opponent Senator Chuck Grassley is kicking off his 64th-year in elected office by announcing that he is for term limits... especially for others. (Awaiting word from him on age limitations for elected office.)
My view is that we either change the way elections are funded or we institute term limits. The perversion of money in today’s elections keeps even insurrectionists in office.
Unlike Grassley, I will abide by term limits in the U.S. Senate. **For now, let’s use the ballot box to ‘term limit’ Chuck Grassley’s generational grip as Iowa’s senior senator and finally give him the dignified retirement he deserves.**
The early polls show this will be a close race. But knowing the GOP of today, chances are they will attack my military service, my rural roots, my Iowa values... Mitch McConnell is already raising millions into Super PACs to spend on TVs all across Iowa.
**Right now, we’re facing our first deadline of the month, and we’re still shy of our $55,000 goal and what we need to turn Iowa blue. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on grassroots donors like you:**
[**Please, if you’re able to, may I count on you to chip in $5 or more right now – every dollar you can afford – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41405037/328681091/-42398318?refcode=em20220203pm2-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODY2YmFjMy01NTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T30wGTOV_ao3JjJ4PJTOndBKrZIx0I55H7Mnqh99yPY=)

name: Digital Team
subject: Americans are tired
body:

In Maryland, Governor Larry Hogan has proven that this works, so we are on the road telling it like it is! In the past few years we have seen too many partisans pitting their side against another to gin up support instead of sitting down to find common ground and better ways to govern. **It's time to put politics aside to get things done.** **It's time for you to join our movement to end toxic politics as usual. ** [**Join An America United's "Coalition to End Toxic Politics"**

Most want elected officials who will tell it like it is, get things done, and find bipartisan, common sense solutions. In Maryland, Governor Larry Hogan has proven that this works, so we are on the road telling it like it is! In the past few years we have seen too many partisans pitting their side against another to gin up support instead of sitting down to find common ground and better ways to govern. It's time to put politics aside to get things done. It's time for you to join our movement to end toxic politics as usual. From soaring inflation and gas prices to feeling less safe in their own communities in the face of rising crime, Americans look toward our elected officials for answers, but fail to find the leadership needed to tackle these problems head on. Together, we can send a message to status quo politicians that Americans demand results, not pandering for votes. Fellow Conservative,

I’m grateful for your support in this race – you know what’s on the line:

Susie Lee is vulnerable, and we can send her packing this November...

**And I am the _ONLY true America First constitutional conservative_ in this race!**

I’m writing today because I just reviewed our latest internal fundraising report, and I’m extremely concerned about where we stand. The bottom line is that we’re way behind our goal as we ramp up for our 120-day push to the primary election.

Today, I’m asking for your help as we work to get caught up.
[**Will you contribute $5, $10, $25, $50, or $100 to fuel our fight?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/197dcb250501724edc9f99905c540ea9/37373/659c15576f250d8b/68a65a7357258702c3d6b838967d376c/37373)

---
Susie Lee is a radical-left liberal who DOES NOT represent the majority in our district, and it’s catching up with her. After prevailing by 9 points in 2018, her margin of victory was slashed down to just 3 points in 2020.

**The bad news is that she’s built up a massive campaign war chest ..._and you know the D.C. Democrats are going to pull out all the stops to protect this seat!_**

We can’t let up for a moment in this fight, and I’m counting on you.

[**Please make your most generous possible donation today.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/197dcb250501724edc9f99905c540ea9/37373/659c15576f250d8b/ad34e5b4a1884aefc3d6b838967d376c/37373)

Thank you, again, for all your support in this fight!

\- John

clean_body: Take a stand to DEFEAT radical-left liberal Susie Lee. Learn more. >>>> | | | Fellow Conservative, I’m grateful for your support in this race – you know what’s on the line: Susie Lee is vulnerable, and we can send her packing this November... And I am the ONLY true America First constitutional conservative in this race! I’m writing today because I just reviewed our latest internal fundraising report, and I’m extremely concerned about where we stand. The bottom line is that we’re way behind our goal as we ramp up for our 120-day push to the primary election. Today, I’m asking for your help as we work to get caught up. Susie Lee is a radical-left liberal who DOES NOT represent the majority in our district, and it’s catching up with her. After prevailing by 9 points in 2018, her margin of victory was slashed down to just 3 points in 2020. The bad news is that she’s built up a massive campaign war chest ...and you know the D.C. Democrats are going to pull out all the stops to protect this seat! We can’t let up for a moment in this fight, and I’m counting on you. Thank you, again, for all your support in this fight! \- John id:2022-02-01-18:16:34:934t | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by John Kovacs for Congress | |

Peter,

President 45 knew the deal with Iran was bad news. That's why he ended it.

Now, Biden's all over the headlines working to "quickly" get it back in place. Even now, Iran is dictating the terms indirectly through mediators...

That is not what a strong America does.

So, Peter, [**will you follow this secure link and demand an end to Bumbling Biden's begging?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7efa5efa46ca4b84b58b14f5060739a9&_e=YUiUuXeOgtkfRdI9x07W_HQeRKCr2Oz92B2qkP1ACQnUnG25FSWffoF1-fkFlNXzycWpppqneJ34DYPuzUTKUEPeQSfeRFasT2p4EY-0scys9a1lPym2f6qN8yWyzMGevMiCVVgWST7Kw4a66JS1gUVU3VHqL4rp7Re8ccUpG_g1AhJ6H7JdPCRZNvkD2Zr0IIRyhowm7nSXFRFWm5N-2ObH9PSRm0FL5TSPySzxBmEcLzROMmdfm2SWOpd3nYcWfgE3aLE26_Q2Y3Ed58iLikv4tReYQn3AB6iKdMjRuHjLFZi5TiM9pa1Ef9vcduTvn-8CGi3cUfaxm0w76Vfre1Kep1EFsIpf7ZPoXFNJz2ny9Qs46hrZ0B3NingnMEmvQZr1hLnTssXvTyp0Ui9hG5CgUotNGSx-Ny7bvrSCcmAcQQ1fF1UyIq7QKN70jln8) Iran is in the driver's seat, and that is never safe for America.

Awaiting your response,
\- Senate Republicans

name: Tim Ryan
subject: We need to abolish the filibuster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2233%2E3611125%2EXQUzd6 ][IMG]

Folks, I’ve HAD IT with the filibuster.

This outdated procedure allows a single Senator to hold bills hostage and
obstruct the will of the people who elected them.

Plain and simple, the filibuster is anti-democratic and needs to go.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/EM_BS_RYA_220203_EN_PetitionTest_A1_copy_U1_X1_M1?t=1007&akid=2233%2E3611125%2EXQUzd6 ]If you agree, add your name to my petition calling on the Senate to end
the filibuster. We need 5,000 folks to sign on to our petition in the next
24 hours! Will you be one of them? >>

[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/EM_BS_RYA_220203_EN_PetitionTest_A1_copy_U1_X1_M1?t=1008&akid=2233%2E3611125%2EXQUzd6 ]Sign on >>

4,534 Signatures Still Needed

Coming out against the filibuster was a risky decision. But it was the
right thing to do. Right now, Democrats have a Senate majority, but
because of the filibuster, we can’t get anything done.

Abolishing the filibuster means finally being able to pass essential,
popular legislation like the John Lewis Voting Rights Act and Build Back
Better—things hardworking folks across the country are counting on us to
deliver.

We need to end the filibuster once and for all. [ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/EM_BS_RYA_220203_EN_PetitionTest_A1_copy_U1_X1_M1?t=1009&akid=2233%2E3611125%2EXQUzd6 ]Will you join me in
calling on the Senate to end the filibuster by adding your name to our
5,000 supporter-strong petition? I really need you to back me up on this,
team.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/EM_BS_RYA_220203_EN_PetitionTest_A1_copy_U1_X1_M1?t=1010&akid=2233%2E3611125%2EXQUzd6 ]Sign on >>

4,534 Signatures Still Needed

Thanks for making your voice heard,

Tim Ryan

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=2233%2E3611125%2EXQUzd6 ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=2233%2E3611125%2EXQUzd6 ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!

clean_body: Did you see this exciting news? A new poll just confirmed what I’ve known all along: Our campaign is surging ahead! We’re dominating in the primary... Peter, Did you see this exciting news? A new poll just confirmed what I’ve known all along: Our campaign is surging ahead! We’re dominating in the primary election... Over 60% of polled voters are already with us! And multiple polls show us tied against Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham in the general election! This is a big deal, Peter... It’s the strongest position our campaign has been in since we launched just a few months ago. But I need YOUR help to capitalize on this huge moment for our campaign. This new polling just goes to show that our message is resonating with New Mexico voters... That it’s time to send MLG packing and replace her with a governor who will actually listen to us. They know that I am the only true common sense conservative leader in this race who will actually do what it takes to get things in New Mexico back on track. We will secure the border, get serious about fighting crime, put parents back in charge of education, and kickstart our economy by cutting taxes and regulations. And we’ll restore faith in our elections by passing a Voter ID law in New Mexico! New Mexicans deserve a governor who will fight for them and stand up to Far Left elites who want to undermine our values. That’s what our campaign is all about, and it’s clear from this new polling that our campaign has what it takes to win. If we want to stay on track to really win this thing, I know that we can do this, but we’re going to need your help, Peter! Thanks, Mark Ronchetti | | | Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer. name: =?utf-8?Q?Kelvin=20King?=
subject: Check Out Our New Informational Video!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4341f6c67a7b/check-out-our-new-informational-video?e=7bbb93570f)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Republican Activist,

Democrats' so-called "voting rights" legislation was defeated in the U.S. Senate last month. While this is a huge victory for our country, the fight is far from over. We cannot allow voters to forget how Stacey Abrams used the left's false rhetoric to steal the MLB Allstar Game (along with $100 million in revenue) from Georgia last year. Since then, Democrats have continued to attack our state and circulate deceptive claims of "voter suppression."

In fact, [President Biden and VP Harris visited ](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=fad15e62f1&e=7bbb93570f)[G](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=16b1e3de24&e=7bbb93570f)[eorgia](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=ea8821b15a&e=7bbb93570f) in January to push for the unconstitutional "voting reform" bills and perpetuate the racist narrative surrounding them. Senator Warnock took it one step further by declaring Georgia "ground zero for voter suppression." And now, [Democrats in the State House are pursuing a full repeal of SB 202](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=4e45d98409&e=7bbb93570f), Georgia's Election Integrity Act.

_The bottom line - _It's up to us to defeat the false narrative surrounding the Democrats' so-called "voting rights" agenda and ensure Georgia voters don't fall victim to the lies being pushed by the liberal media and far left.

With that said, we've created this informational video for Republican leaders, grassroots activists, and local party members across the state. We hope this tool will equip you to battle the left's false narratives and speak the TRUTH. Watch the NEW video below:
---
| [ ](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=4b85d0ef64&e=7bbb93570f)
---
| We ask you to please share this video with your family and friends using this [link](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=807f6bb528&e=7bbb93570f), OR copy and paste the caption below and share it to your social media platforms!

_We can't let the liberal left continue to spread a false narrative about their so-called "voting rights" agenda and our election integrity bill in Georgia! Please watch this informative video and share it with your friends and family! [youtu.be/WgpiSxsJS8I](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=f13c727cc8&e=7bbb93570f)_

The work you do every day to defend our Georgia values is vital to defeating Raphael Warnock and the far-left's agenda in November. We can't #WinforAmerica without you.

---
| Very Respectfully,
---
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=bd49d66aa7&e=7bbb93570f)
---
| | [](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=36981ce082&e=7bbb93570f)
---

| | [](mailto:kelvin@kelvinking.com)
---
|

Kelvin King for Georgia, Inc.
2900 Delk Rd, Ste 700, PMB 268
Marietta, GA 30067

name: =?utf-8?Q?Timothy?=
subject: Congressman Louie Gohmert Endorses Timothy Barr for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4ac46205fffa/congressman-louie-gohmert-endorses-timothy-barr-for-congress?e=061a1ea0d5)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,

I am honored to have received the endorsement of Congressman Louie Gohmert (TX-01), the 6th member of the House Freedom Caucus to support our campaign. Congressman Gohmert has become a household name among conservatives across the country due to his consistent record of fighting for freedom in Washington. Read his full statement below:

"Congressman Jody Hice is the gold standard of conservative representation. It's no secret his leadership will be hard to replace. Fortunately, Georgia's 10th District has the opportunity to send a fighter to Washington who will stand up to RINOs and radicals alike. I am endorsing Timothy Barr because he has a proven record of standing up for what's right and will be steadfast in the fight for freedom!”
---
|
---
| It is truly humbling to have earned the endorsement of so many conservative leaders, both from Georgia and across the nation. These members, including Congressman Louie Gohmert, have served in the trenches as America's last line of defense against socialism and tyranny for years. Our country owes them our gratitude.

Like Congressman Gohmert said, I am ready to join the Freedom Caucus to take on the fake Republican RINOS and radical socialist Democrats in Washington. Our campaign will keep sharing that message with the people of the 10th District. While each endorsement we've received has been a tremendous honor, I will not take for granted the hard work required to earn the endorsement of the Georgia voters.

For Freedom,
---
|
---
| [DONATE](https://VoteBarr.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0aae7015df298a880b9f30703&id=2b6287ba00&e=061a1ea0d5 "DONATE")

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Your support is keeping us on the road
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Hello —

We recently wrapped up a statewide rural tour where I had the opportunity to meet with folks across Wisconsin and discuss my plan for our rural communities. Being on the road so much leaves a lot less time for fundraising, but this grassroots team stepped up in a big way.

Thanks to supporters like you, we raised what we needed to hit our monthly fundraising goal in January and keep this campaign going strong. Your generous contributions directly fund our work on the ground — allowing us to stay on the road, traveling all over Wisconsin, and getting our message out to voters.

I'm choosing to run this campaign by showing up, listening, and earning the trust of the people of Wisconsin, especially in areas Democrats don't typically spend a lot of time in. That's how we're going to beat Ron Johnson in November and get this seat back to work for everyone across the state.

Look, building a campaign that can compete everywhere and talk to everyone doesn’t come cheap! I'm not taking a dime of corporate PAC money — never have, never will — which is why I appreciate everyone stepping up and contributing whenever we ask for help. The response to these messages is always incredible.

I'm also grateful for all the folks who have taken the time to meet with me on the road. The important conversations we've had are shaping my priorities in this campaign, and that’s how this should work. It’s what people should expect from anyone asking for their vote.

I look forward to getting back on the road very soon, and hopefully, meeting more of you in your neck of the woods. Thanks again for all you do.

Forward!

— Sarah Godlewski

Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put Wisconsin workers and families first. She's the only Democrat who is beating Ron Johnson in the latest head-to-head poll of our race. With your help, we can flip this seat. Chip in to join us:

Contribute: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-february22

Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
Sarah for Wisconsin
PO Box 166
Madison, WI 53701
United States
This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are the best way for us to stay in touch, but if you need to go, please unsubscribe here: [https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/dcd9f5e9-5985-ec11-94f6-281878b85110/ded9f5e9-5985-ec11-94f6-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWQ5ZjVlOS01OTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_tYCwYLaSQcf2Wl9CNvvHIv_jwpNqHQMLse4XsYO1vI=&id=121241219] If you only wish to receive our most important updates, submit this form for fewer emails [https://action.sarahforwisconsin.com/a/less-email]. If you'd like to support Sarah's campaign for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin, please add a donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-donate?refcode=em2021&amount=10] to help us win.

name: Ron Johnson
subject: Just your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion.
|
---
| | | Friend,

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children's future.

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn't good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama's extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014.

As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama's administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort.

By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration.

During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife's--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats' complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future.

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government's failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans' lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart.

As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations.

President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.

I believe America is in peril. Much as I'd like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don't feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don't want you to hear.

In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn't your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven't made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don't expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail.

Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win.

So I will humbly ask, Friend, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA.
---
| | | [ENDORSE RON JOHNSON](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1bb4389ea8b845e5b6428e3abd0308e9&_e=Dth2M3w0pSok8naB3RXKgdEMVSymrfD178l8CqKhASzSrdPnDmqs3gPz3td_pAJxC_UmWjPlWI3BXTR8Lj4oVRTuwPCgWiZn9Y-Ql4o8fz7p-ADBnONZXUjtYzd2R1DF-JJLPMCTFf9w1vjZTMxKU-ZKACdzMW50BVqxvHBuziIv7Jc3Iy0LSRA9O2kM_qtEM4Fi92QZK-LCx5Qpzm86uafYyIlgP2IdDZyRuZB6kGQHKjwXoWTyZNPQWQcmNLmYNQzzqAUxdBHerTZVbSuVydCznDWXP6FF3bMoaVxTaOxAYLNO0T7_KsWiZgNL2-c1eLDUWcBcOt47B5LxfewU45oDmKOPrGyxUtS4cHr0rk5jNhKhtoJP2lcaATgCQ3-unaBQ_fDxZy47i3Lkm06doh5omaL9RPEOogJTPDbgfOAC19RSaIFGPFXgyrLsqNIxxwMf9JPRynyRIbp8CoEIov6PyE0fBcvffRhj872qcdLfl6SwxQ-V6YWeJ-3ltW-Q "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON")

# _Help Endorse Jonah Schulz!_

The Strongsville GOP will be holding their candidate endorsement meeting on **Monday, February 7th** at 6:30pm. We need a YUGE turnout of patriots to attend and vote to endorse Jonah Schulz for Congress. Other endorsements will include Senate, Governor, state and local races.

In order to be a voting member you must:
1\. Be a current 2022 Strongsville GOP Member. ($25 for the year, can be paid online or at the door)
2\. Have attended 3 or more Strongsville GOP events within the last 12 months.

Doors open at 5:30pm
_**Location**_ : Best Western Plus Strongsville
15471 Royalton Rd., Strongsville, OH 44136

name: Morgan Harper HQ
subject: Do you know why today is special?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Today marks exactly 90 days from our primary election day.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220203-609-footer-ak&t=2&akid=609%2E90090%2EAm5EUd)
Hey — today is a _really_ special day for our campaign. Do you know why?
**We’re officially 90 days away from our Democratic primary election day** — the day when we can officially make Morgan our Democratic nominee for the U.S. Senate in Ohio. 🎉
And we just completed our first major 2022 milestone to win this seat and flip Ohio blue: **we filed to be on the ballot. ✅**
[****](https://act.morganharper.org/go/24890?t=3&akid=609%2E90090%2EAm5EUd)
_Major thanks to anyone who signed a petition or was a petition circulator._
Now our next major stepping stone on our path to victory is raising as much money as possible before election day.
[**_Will you donate $90, $9, or anything you can to help us celebrate this momentous day AND to give us the resources we need to build our long-term strategy to win this race?_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/24890?t=4&akid=609%2E90090%2EAm5EUd)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/24896?refcode=em20220203-609&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=609%2E90090%2EAm5EUd)**
Your donation today will have an even bigger impact than that same amount made really close to election day, because with your help now, our campaign can invest in a long-term strategy for victory.
[**_Can you donate $9 right now to help us ramp up our campaign in the next 90 days?_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/24890?t=24&akid=609%2E90090%2EAm5EUd)
Onwards,
Morgan Harper HQ
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220203-609-footer&t=25&refcode2=609_90090_Am5EUd&akid=609%2E90090%2EAm5EUd)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=609%2E90090%2EAm5EUd)

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Will You Help Fuel Our Investigations and Lawsuits?
body:
Already, this early into the New Year – Judicial Watch’s work is exploding in volume and growing in historic importance.

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I want to again thank you for all your support as we confront our biggest challenges in our 28-year history!
In fact, we are carrying our largest caseload _eve_ r...
**[And I ask you to join Judicial Watch now.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57805&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57805&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)
---

The pace of our work and calls for legal and investigative assistance we're receiving from around the country are _accelerating_.

Many concerned citizens and honest public officials are seeking Judicial Watch's help to enforce the rule of law. _Demands_ on us are at an all-time high.

That's why [I urge to make a special donation today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57805&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=), as we are:

* **_Adding more resources to our highly successful election integrity work_**. We are pursuing "clean the voter rolls" lawsuits in four states...and after issuing new "warning notices" to 14 counties and five states, we anticipate more (and successful!) new lawsuits in the very near future.

* **_Aggressively moving forward with exposing the extent of taxpayer-funded Critical Race Theory teaching, and our groundbreaking civil rights lawsuits on behalf of teachers fired because they dared to criticize it_**. We are also challenging illegal policies that discriminate on the basis of race, and recently won a huge court victory in Asheville, NC, which _in response to a Judicial Watch lawsuit_ quickly ended its indefensible "blacks only" scholarship program.

* **_Continuing to confront and expose the Biden Border Crisis as well as our legal challenges against illegal "sanctuary" policies that unlawfully prohibit local police from cooperating with federal immigration authorities_**. The radical Biden open borders agenda must be exposed as we also engage in our independent legal efforts to overturn illegal sanctuary policies - like our lawsuit against a deadly sanctuary policy in Santa Clara County (San Jose), California.

But there is so much _more_ work to do to combat voter fraud, address the illegal immigration crisis, and fight for your right to know what our government is up to with a number of policy issues in the year ahead.

_[And we need additional help to get these jobs done...and done right](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57805&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)_. Now more than ever _Judicial Watch is the one conservative and "rule of law" institution in Washington that Americans can rely on to stand firm for our Republic_.

It is a tribute to you and our reputation and hard work that our talents are in such demand. And we _can_ meet all our challenges...with [your support today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57805&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=). Thank you!

Sincerely,

Tom Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57805&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)

name: Erica Smith
subject: This North Carolina town stands as a symbol of Black determination and endurance
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

Here’s something you may not know about me:

In the North Carolina State Senate, I represented Princeville, a town in
the heart of NC-02 — and the very first town incorporated by Black people
in U.S. history.

This Black History Month, I wanted to tell you more about Princeville,
North Carolina.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/38246?refcode=em20220203-846&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=846%2E3698%2E22MWGC ][IMG]

It was the honor of a lifetime to represent Princeville in the North
Carolina State Senate for three terms. Generation after generation, the
people of Princeville have developed a strong sense of pride in our
history and in our community. Today, Princeville stands as a symbol of
Black determination and endurance.

The town was incorporated in 1885, but its history as an independent Black
community predates that. At the close of the Civil War, many former slaves
settled in the swampy flood plain across the Tar River. The refugees
called their new community Freedom Hill. Eventually, the name was changed
to Princeville in honor of Turner Prince, an African-American man who
helped build many of the community’s homes.

During Reconstruction, the community exercised its political strength by
electing Black men to office. Princeville and Edgecombe County voters
elected eleven Black men to the state legislature to serve fifteen terms
from 1877 to 1890.

But with the emergence of the white supremacist movement in North
Carolina, Black voters and officeholders were gradually excluded from the
political process. Racist literacy tests and poll taxes excluded Black
people from voting. Black voters were attacked or threatened by opposing
whites, and their ballots were altered or discarded altogether.

More than 100 years later, I'm bringing the legacy of Princeville with me
as I run for Congress in North Carolina’s 2nd District. And I *promise* I
will fight to advance racial justice and protect our right to vote from
attacks that are still happening today in Republican state legislatures
across the country, including right here in North Carolina.

But the only way we’re going to win is with your help: [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/38246?refcode=em20220203-846&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=846%2E3698%2E22MWGC ]Times are tough,
and I know not everyone can give right now. But if you can, will you
please make a donation to our campaign? $5, $3, or even $1 has a huge
impact in sending me to Congress, where I’d be one of the only Black
representatives from North Carolina.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/38246?refcode=em20220203-846&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=846%2E3698%2E22MWGC ]Donate $5

Thank you from the bottom of my heart,

Erica ❤️

Erica Smith for Congress

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220203-846-footer&t=1022&refcode2=846_3698_22MWGC&akid=846%2E3698%2E22MWGC

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=846%2E3698%2E22MWGC

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: My friend Ilhan Omar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Ilhan is a threat to the status quo.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220203-2767-header&t=1&akid=2767%2E2526796%2EVVOy17)
Friend, last cycle, Rep. Ilhan Omar’s challengers and ultraconservative groups **spent upwards of $20 million to attack and try to unseat her in the most expensive congressional race in Minnesota.**
Ilhan’s race was a top target because she works every day to challenge the systems of power and corruption to deliver tangible victories for working people. She’s a threat to the status quo.
Ilhan just kicked off her re-election campaign, and she is bound to face another expensive race — she’s already upsetting the corporate interests hell-bent on stopping the bold, progressive agenda that Ilhan, me, and other progressives in Congress are fighting to pass. And Republicans’ bad-faith and racist attacks will only ramp up.
Ilhan’s campaign, like ours, is powered by the people — so **she’s counting on grassroots support to prepare for the fights ahead and keep up her work for progress.**
[Friend, if you’re able, will you make a contribution so Ilhan has the support to power her campaign and stay in Congress?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220203?refcode=em20220203-2767-P_FND_ANO_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2767_2526796_VVOy17&akid=2767%2E2526796%2EVVOy17)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220203?refcode=em20220203-2767-P_FND_ANO_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2767_2526796_VVOy17&akid=2767%2E2526796%2EVVOy17)**
Unlike corporate Democrats, Ilhan’s no. 1 priority is making a meaningful difference in the lives of working people in Minnesota and across the country.
Ilhan will always put people over profit, because like me and so many other people in our country, she knows what it’s like to live paycheck to paycheck and have student loan debt. She’s going to the mat to make sure Democrats deliver an agenda that represents the progress people voted for — from investing in bold climate action and affordable housing, to expanding Medicare.
We need Ilhan’s voice in Congress to help advance the fight for racial, economic, social, and environmental justice for all, which is why it’s so important that she’s ready for everything corporate lobbyists and GOP mega-donors throw at her in the coming months. That means building on a strong grassroots foundation to fund online ads, canvassing teams, campaign materials, and more.
[So, please, make a donation of any amount to Ilhan’s re-election campaign today. Every single small-dollar donation makes a real impact.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220203?refcode=em20220203-2767-P_FND_ANO_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2767_2526796_VVOy17&akid=2767%2E2526796%2EVVOy17)
Pa’lante,
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220203?refcode=em20220203-2767-P_FND_ANO_END&t=23&refcode2=2767_2526796_VVOy17&akid=2767%2E2526796%2EVVOy17)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220203-2767-P_FND_ANO_END&t=24&akid=2767%2E2526796%2EVVOy17)**
---|---

We need Ilhan’s voice in Congress to help advance the fight for racial, economic, social, and environmental justice for all, which is why it’s so important that she’s ready for everything corporate lobbyists and GOP mega-donors throw at her in the coming months. That means building on a strong grassroots foundation to fund online ads, canvassing teams, campaign materials, and more. Pa’lante, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com
